Eve geldikten sonra HГјseyin amcasДұnДұ ziyarete gittiДҹini ve orada Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷun kendisini arayarak ЕҹГјpheli bir araГ§tan bahsettiДҹini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir. MiranвҖҷДұ arabadan indirip aracДұyla ЕҹГјpheli aracДұ kontrol etmeye gittiДҹini, bu sДұrada Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷДұ gГ¶rdГјДҹГјnГј ancak selam vermeden geГ§tiДҹini, Г§ГјnkГј iki buГ§uk aydДұr onunla konuЕҹmadДұДҹДұnДұ ve aralarДұnda вҖңArif olayДұвҖқ nedeniyle bir kДұrgДұnlДұk olduДҹunu belirtmiЕҹtir. NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹunu ise HГјseyin amcasДұnДұn yanДұndayken, saat 06:30-06:40 civarДұnda Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷdan gelen telefon Гјzerine, ancak tam olarak Gizem kДұzДұnДұn kendisini arayДұp вҖңBaba Narin kaybolmuЕҹвҖқ dediДҹinde Г¶ДҹrendiДҹini ifade etmiЕҹtir. NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹunu Г¶ДҹrendiДҹinde, herkesten Г¶nce Еһakir BaЕҹГ§avuЕҹвҖҷu aradДұДҹДұnДұ ve durumu bildirdiДҹini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir (Saat 20:18).

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
text:
Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, Salim GГјranвҖҷДұn ifadesindeki bazДұ kritik noktalara odaklanmДұЕҹ ve Г§eliЕҹkileri yГјzГјne vurmuЕҹtur:

Telefon Ses KayДұt ProgramДұ: SalimвҖҷin telefonunda bulunan ve arayanlarДұ kaydeden bir programДұ neden indirdiДҹi sorulduДҹunda, unutkanlДұk nedeniyle toplantДұ saatlerini ve adreslerini kaydetmek iГ§in kullandДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmiЕҹtir. Ancak Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹu gece (22 AДҹustos 2024, saat 00:31) bu programДұn devre dДұЕҹДұ bДұrakДұldДұДҹДұnДұ ve bunun ЕҹГјpheli bir hareket olduДҹunu vurgulamДұЕҹtДұr. Salim ise programДұ kendisinin silmediДҹini veya devre dДұЕҹДұ bДұrakmadДұДҹДұnДұ, anlamadДұДҹДұnДұ iddia etmiЕҹtir. Bu programДұ kayДұnbiraderinin oДҹlu Еһeyhmuz KayaвҖҷnДұn yГјklediДҹini ve Еҹebeke Г§ekmediДҹi zamanlarda kayДұt yapmadДұДҹДұnДұ ona sГ¶ylediДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.
Telefon GГ¶rГјЕҹmeleri ve WhatsApp GeГ§miЕҹinin Silinmesi: Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, SalimвҖҷin telefonundaki gГ¶rГјЕҹmeleri ve WhatsApp geГ§miЕҹini neden sildiДҹini sormuЕҹtur. Salim, hayat kadДұnlarДұyla ve eskortlarla gГ¶rГјЕҹtГјДҹГј iГ§in sildiДҹini itiraf etmiЕҹtir. Ancak Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, bazДұ eskort mesajlarДұnДұn hala durduДҹunu, asДұl silinmesi gerekenlerin silinmediДҹini ve rutin konuЕҹmalarДұn silinmesinin ЕҹГјpheli olduДҹunu belirtmiЕҹtir. Salim, bu silmelerin ayrДұca Arif kardeЕҹinin ahДұrДұnda KeleЕҹ mermisi yakalanmasДұ ve arama tarama faaliyetleri nedeniyle de yapДұldДұДҹДұnДұ eklemiЕҹtir.
NarinвҖҷi Kimin Г–ldГјrdГјДҹГј ve ЕһГјpheleri: SalimвҖҷe NarinвҖҷi kimin Г¶ldГјrdГјДҹГј sorulduДҹunda, вҖңBen gГ¶rmemiЕҹim kim Г¶ldГјrdГјвҖқ cevabДұnДұ vermiЕҹtir. Д°lk baЕҹta Гјvey annesinden ЕҹГјphelendiДҹini, Г§ГјnkГј bir ГјfГјrГјkГ§ГјnГјn onun evinin etrafДұnda bir Еҹeyler olduДҹunu sГ¶ylediДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir. Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, inanmadДұДҹДұ bir ГјfГјrГјkГ§ГјnГјn sГ¶zГјne dayanarak Гјvey annesinden ЕҹГјphelenirken, yaklaЕҹДұk 15-20 gГјn boyunca NevzatвҖҷtan ЕҹГјphelenmediДҹini ve neden daha Г¶nce bunu dile getirmediДҹini sorgulamДұЕҹtДұr. Salim ise Nevzat ile aralarДұnda kГјГ§Гјk bir вҖңmusibetвҖқ olduДҹunu jandarmaya sГ¶ylediДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.
TanДұklarДұ YГ¶nlendirme Д°ddiasДұ: Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, SalimвҖҷin amcasДұnДұn kДұzlarДұ Birsen ve MelikeвҖҷye NarinвҖҷi saat 17:40вҖҷta gГ¶rdГјklerini sГ¶ylemeleri yГ¶nГјnde telkinde bulunup bulunmadДұДҹДұnДұ sormuЕҹ, Salim ise вҖңAsla. Hepsinin ifadesini dГ¶verek deДҹiЕҹtirmiЕҹlerвҖқ diyerek reddetmiЕҹtir. Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, jandarmanДұn neden Г¶zellikle SalimвҖҷe suГ§ isnat etmek iГ§in tanДұklarДұ dГ¶vdГјДҹГјnГј sorgulamДұЕҹtДұr.
Kolluk Kuvvetlerini YГ¶nlendirme: SalimвҖҷin, jandarmayДұ sГјrekli olarak ЕҹГјpheli yerlere (Г§ingeneler, kДұrmДұzДұ araba, Suriye Г§adДұrДұ gibi) yГ¶nlendirdiДҹi tutanaklara geГ§miЕҹtir. Salim bunu reddederek, duyduДҹu sГ¶ylentileri aktardДұДҹДұnДұ, kendisinin gГ¶rmediДҹini veya bilerek yГ¶nlendirmediДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.
HTS Baz Verileri ve Olay Yeri: Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, HTS (baz istasyonu) verilerine gГ¶re SalimвҖҷin saat 15:19вҖҷda Arif GГјranвҖҷДұn evinin Г§evresinde, 15:20вҖҷde ise eve girdiДҹinin iddia edildiДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir. Salim bunu reddederek, kendisinin mДұsДұr tarlasДұnda olduДҹunu ve evin yakДұn olduДҹu iГ§in bazДұn oradan sinyal vermiЕҹ olabileceДҹini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir. AyrДұca, baz verilerine gГ¶re NarinвҖҷin cansДұz bedeninin bulunduДҹu yere olay gecesi saat 22:47вҖҷden 22:55вҖҷe kadar gittiДҹinin iddia edildiДҹini ve bunun ЕҹГјpheli olduДҹunu vurgulamДұЕҹtДұr. Salim ise kesinlikle oraya gitmediДҹini, kГ¶yden Г§ДұkmadДұДҹДұnДұ ve bu iddialarДұn kendisine atДұlan bir вҖңkumpasвҖқ olduДҹunu savunmuЕҹtur.
AraГ§taki DNA Д°zi: Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұ, SalimвҖҷin arabasДұnДұn ЕҹofГ¶r koltuДҹunun altДұnda NarinвҖҷe ait DNA bulunduДҹunu belirtmiЕҹtir. Salim, bu arabanДұn kendisine ait olmadДұДҹДұnДұ, yeДҹeninin olduДҹunu ve birГ§ok kiЕҹinin, Г¶zellikle de Г§ocuklarДұn bu arabayДұ kullandДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶yleyerek DNAвҖҷnДұn oraya nasДұl gelmiЕҹ olabileceДҹini aГ§ДұklamДұЕҹtДұr. AyrДұca NarinвҖҷin aДҹzДұndan Г§Дұkan kГ¶pГјklerin eline bulaЕҹДұp arabaya silme ihtimali sorulduДҹunda вҖңKesinlikle yok Г¶yle bir ЕҹeyвҖқ diyerek reddetmiЕҹtir.

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: DuruЕҹma SavcДұsДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
text:
DuruЕҹma SavcДұsДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
DuruЕҹma SavcДұsДұ, Mahkeme BaЕҹkanДұвҖҷnДұn sorularДұna ek olarak SalimвҖҷin beyanlarДұndaki Г§eliЕҹkileri derinleЕҹtirmeye Г§alДұЕҹmДұЕҹtДұr:

KДұrmДұzДұ Araba ve ГҮingene Д°ddialarДұ: SavcДұ, SalimвҖҷin ses kayДұtlarДұnda KГјrtГ§e tercГјme tutanaklarДұnda kДұrmДұzДұ eski bir araba ve Г§ingenelerden bahsettiДҹini belirtmiЕҹ, Salim ise hatДұrlamadДұДҹДұnДұ ve bГ¶yle bir konuЕҹma yapmadДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
Su Kesintisi Konusu: NevzatвҖҷДұn kendisini 15:08вҖҷde su kesintisi iГ§in aradДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶ylemesine raДҹmen, SalimвҖҷin su arДұzasДұnДұ gidermek iГ§in kimseyi aramamasДұ veya resmi bir iЕҹlem yapmamasДұ sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr.
Telefon Ses KayДұt ProgramДұ: SalimвҖҷin, ses kayДұt programДұnДұ kendisinin silmediДҹini sГ¶ylemesi Гјzerine, SavcДұ, programДұ yГјkleyen kiЕҹinin veya bir telefon tamircisi olan BadinвҖҷin silmiЕҹ olabileceДҹini sormuЕҹ, Salim bunu reddetmiЕҹtir.
HTS Baz Bilgileri: SavcДұ, NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹu akЕҹam saat 22:00 civarДұnda SalimвҖҷin Dicle Гңniversitesi bГ¶lgesinden baz sinyali verdiДҹini, bu bГ¶lgede GГјran ailesine ait bir Г§ay bahГ§esi olduДҹunu belirtmiЕҹtir. Salim bunu kabul etmemiЕҹtir.
Terlik OlayДұ: SavcДұ, NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹu ertesi gГјn Muhammed KayaвҖҷnДұn Suriyeli Г§adДұrДұnДұn orada bir terlik bulduДҹunu ve bu terliДҹi bir buГ§uk saat arabada sakladДұДҹДұnДұ belirterek, bu iЕҹi SalimвҖҷin ayarlayДұp ayarlamadДұДҹДұnДұ sormuЕҹ, Salim вҖңKesinlikle bГ¶yle bir Еҹey yoktur. Benimle ilgisi yokвҖқ diye yanДұtlamДұЕҹtДұr.
Ceset BГ¶lgesi ve KanДұt Ekleme: SavcДұ, SalimвҖҷin gece 22:44вҖҷte NarinвҖҷin cansДұz bedeninin bulunduДҹu yerden baz sinyali verdiДҹini ve jandarma ve AFADвҖҷДұn gelmesinden sonra olay bГјyГјyГјnce, Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷДұn koyduДҹunu sГ¶ylediДҹi tek taЕҹДұn Гјzerine kalan iki taЕҹДұ ve Г§alДұ Г§ДұrpДұyДұ ekleyen kiЕҹinin kendisi olup olmadДұДҹДұnДұ sormuЕҹtur. Salim bunu Еҹiddetle reddederek, dere yataДҹДұnДұn uzun olduДҹunu ve 8 kez aranan yerde cesedin bulunmamasДұnДұn kendisinin gidip bulmasДұnДұn imkansДұz olduДҹunu sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
AraГ§taki DNA UyumluДҹu: SavcДұ, araГ§tan Г§Дұkan DNAвҖҷnДұn NarinвҖҷin kДұyafetlerinden Г§Дұkan DNA ile uyumlu olduДҹunu vurgulayarak cГјmlenin derinliДҹini anlamasДұnДұ istemiЕҹtir. Salim, NarinвҖҷin o gГјn arabaya binmediДҹini ve arabanДұn baЕҹkalarДұ tarafДұndan da kullanДұldДұДҹДұnДұ tekrarlamДұЕҹtДұr.
Zaman ГҮeliЕҹkileri: SalimвҖҷin HГјseyin amcasДұnДұn yanДұndan ayrДұlДұЕҹ saati ile okul kamerasДұna yakalanma saati arasДұndaki 30 dakikalДұk fark (Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷun aramasДұndan sonra hemen Г§ДұkmadДұДҹДұ iddia edilmiЕҹtir) sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr.

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: DiyarbakДұr Barosu AvukatlarДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
text:
DiyarbakДұr Barosu AvukatlarДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
Avukatlar, SalimвҖҷin beyanlarДұndaki tutarsДұzlДұklarДұ ve olayДұn detaylarДұna dair Г§eliЕҹkileri ortaya koymaya Г§alДұЕҹmДұЕҹtДұr:

Av. AydДұn Г–zdemir вҖӢ

Kamera Tespiti: SalimвҖҷin oДҹluna kГ¶ydeki kameralarДұn yerlerini tespit etmesini neden sГ¶ylediДҹi ve bu bilgileri jandarmaya teslim edip etmediДҹi sorulmuЕҹtur. Salim, herkese bu talimatДұ verdiДҹini ve bilgileri jandarmaya ilettiДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.
Kaybolma Saati: SalimвҖҷin telefon gГ¶rГјЕҹmelerinde NarinвҖҷin kaybolma saatinin (15:30-16:00) daha erken olarak geГ§mesi sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr. Salim, bunu hatДұrlamadДұДҹДұnДұ ve sГ¶ylentilere dayandДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmiЕҹtir.
ГҮingene Bilgisi: ГҮingenelerin NarinвҖҷi kaГ§ДұrmДұЕҹ olabileceДҹi bilgisini nereden edindiДҹi sorulmuЕҹ, Salim hatДұrlamadДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
Nevzat ile Д°liЕҹki: SalimвҖҷin, Nevzat ile iki buГ§uk aydДұr konuЕҹmadДұДҹДұ iddialarДұ ile Arif ve GazalвҖҷДұn вҖңkardeЕҹ gibiydilerвҖқ ve вҖңbirlikte aradДұlarвҖқ Еҹeklindeki beyanlarДұ Г§eliЕҹkili bulunmuЕҹtur.
Telefon GГ¶rГјЕҹmeleri: Mehmet Еһerif GГјran ve Nevzat Bahtiyar ile olay saatlerine yakДұn yapДұlan yoДҹun gГ¶rГјЕҹmelerin iГ§eriДҹi ve zamanlamasДұ sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr. Salim, Mehmet Еһerif ile tarla ve elektrikГ§i konusunu, Nevzat ile ise su meselesini konuЕҹtuДҹunu yinelemiЕҹtir. ElektrikГ§ilerin sabah aramamasДұna raДҹmen kendisiyle Г¶Дҹleden sonra gГ¶rГјЕҹtГјДҹГјnГј iddia etmesi Г§eliЕҹki olarak belirtilmiЕҹtir.
WhatsApp Silme Nedenleri: Mermi bulunmasДұ ve hayat kadДұnlarДұ gibi iki farklДұ silme nedeninin hangisinin doДҹru olduДҹu sorulmuЕҹ, Salim вҖңД°kisi de doДҹrudurвҖқ demiЕҹtir.
AlДұЕҹveriЕҹ SonrasДұ Dinlenme: SalimвҖҷin alДұЕҹveriЕҹ sonrasДұ yemek yiyip dinlendiДҹi yГ¶nГјndeki beyanДұnДұn daha Г¶nceki ifadelerinde yer almamasДұ sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr.
Telefon Еһifresi ve EЕҹinin Telefon KullanДұmДұ: EЕҹinin telefonunu kurcalayДұp kurcalamadДұДҹДұ ve eskort gГ¶rГјЕҹmelerini gГ¶rme endiЕҹesi sorulmuЕҹ, Salim Еҹifre koyduДҹunu ve eЕҹinin nadiren telefonunu kullandДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmiЕҹtir.



Av. Derya YДұldДұrДұm вҖӢ

Giysi DeДҹiЕҹtirme: SalimвҖҷin daha Г¶nceki savcДұlДұk ifadesinde eve geldikten sonra ГјstГјnГј deДҹiЕҹtirdiДҹini belirtmesine raДҹmen, mahkemede bunu reddetmesi ve aynДұ elbiseyle tarlaya gittiДҹini sГ¶ylemesi Г§eliЕҹkili bulunmuЕҹtur.
Davetiye DaДҹДұtДұm ToplantДұsДұ: DГјДҹГјn davetiyeleri iГ§in yapДұlan gГ¶rev daДҹДұlДұmДұ toplantДұsДұnДұn yeri (Erhan aДҹabeyin evi) ve katДұlДұmcДұlarДұ teyit edilmiЕҹtir.
DSД° KanalДұna YГ¶nlendirme: KГ¶yde daha Г¶nce Г§ocuk boДҹulma vakasДұ olup olmadДұДҹДұnДұ bilmediДҹi halde, SalimвҖҷin neden jandarma ekiplerini doДҹrudan DSД° kanalДұna yГ¶nlendirdiДҹi sorulmuЕҹtur. Salim, kГ¶peklerin oraya gittiДҹini ve yetkilileri arayarak suyu kestirdiklerini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
вҖңCihazвҖқ KonuЕҹmasДұ: Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷun tarladaki bir cihaz iГ§in kendisini aradДұДҹДұ yГ¶nГјndeki SalimвҖҷin beyanДұna raДҹmen, RamazanвҖҷДұn bГ¶yle bir konuЕҹma yapmadДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmesi Г§eliЕҹki olarak Г¶ne sГјrГјlmГјЕҹtГјr.



Av. Nahit Eren вҖӢ

вҖңFДұskiyeвҖқ KonuЕҹmasДұ DГјzeltmesi: Ramazan Atasoy ile olan KГјrtГ§e konuЕҹmanДұn tercГјmesindeki вҖңfДұskiyeвҖқ ifadesinin aslДұnda вҖңbendin orada taЕҹlarДұn orada bir Еҹeyin dГјЕҹmГјЕҹвҖқ Еҹeklinde olduДҹunu, bunun muhtemelen kaГ§ak elektrik iГ§in kullanДұlan bir alet olduДҹunu ve Narin ile ilgili bir sohbet olmadДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmiЕҹtir.
Kurgusal Alibi Д°ddiasДұ: Avukat, SalimвҖҷin tГјm savunmalarДұnda kendini olay saati dДұЕҹДұnda bir yerde gГ¶sterecek bir вҖңkurguвҖқ iГ§inde olduДҹunu, olay gГјnГјne ait bazДұ eylemlerini (Г¶rn. HГјseyinвҖҷlerin evine gitme, kДұzlarДұnДұ UzunbahГ§e KГ¶yГјвҖҷne bДұrakma) Г¶nceki tarihlere (19 veya 20 AДҹustos) kaydДұrdДұДҹДұnДұ iddia etmiЕҹtir. Salim, gГ¶zaltДұ sГјresince baskДұ altДұnda olduДҹunu ve uykusuz bДұrakДұldДұДҹДұnДұ, bu nedenle beyinlerinin doДҹru Г§alДұЕҹmadДұДҹДұnДұ savunmuЕҹtur.
Evden ГҮДұkДұЕҹ Saati ve Baz Verileri: SalimвҖҷin evden Г§ДұkДұЕҹ saatiyle ilgili Г§eliЕҹkiler (02:52вҖҷde baz verilerine gГ¶re ArifвҖҷin evinin aralДұДҹДұnda olmasДұ, eЕҹinin yemek yedikten sonra hemen Г§ДұktДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶ylemesi) ve Dilek/Rezan ile ev iГ§inde yapДұlan telefon gГ¶rГјЕҹmelerinin HTS kayДұtlarДұnda gГ¶rГјnmesi sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr. Salim bu gГ¶rГјЕҹmeleri hatДұrlamadДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmiЕҹtir.
Arama Faaliyetleri ve Cesedin Yeri: SalimвҖҷin EДҹertutmaz DeresiвҖҷndeki arama faaliyetlerine katДұlДұmДұ ve NarinвҖҷin bulunduДҹu yeri bilip bilmediДҹi sorgulanmДұЕҹtДұr. Salim, dereye aramaya gitmediДҹini, sadece suyun kesildiДҹini bildiДҹini ve cesedin yerini bilmediДҹini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
Olay Yeri Gece Ziyareti: Baz istasyonlarДұnДұn kendisini gece olay yerinde gГ¶sterdiДҹi iddiasДұnДұ tekrar reddederek, вҖңBaz nedir bilmiyorum ama ben gitmemiЕҹimвҖқ demiЕҹtir.
DilekвҖҷten KayДұp Haberi: SalimвҖҷin, kДұzДұndan NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹunu duyduДҹunda verdiДҹi tepkinin ses kaydДұ (Mehmet Еһirin ile kГ¶ye gitme talimatДұ) dinletilmiЕҹ ve tepkisinin yeterince ЕҹaЕҹkДұnlДұk iГ§ermediДҹi ima edilmiЕҹtir. Salim, sonrasДұnda вҖңLГјtfen susmak istiyorumвҖқ diyerek cevap vermeyi reddetmiЕҹtir.

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: Aile ve Sosyal Hizmetler BakanlДұДҹДұ AvukatlarДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
text:
Aile ve Sosyal Hizmetler BakanlДұДҹДұ AvukatlarДұвҖҷnДұn SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
BakanlДұk avukatДұ, tanДұk ifadelerindeki Г§eliЕҹkilere ve SalimвҖҷin davranДұЕҹlarДұna odaklanmДұЕҹtДұr:

Av. Abdullah YДұlmaz вҖӢ

TanДұklarДұ YГ¶nlendirme: Melike GГјran ve Birsen GГјranвҖҷДұn ifadelerine gГ¶re, SalimвҖҷin onlara NarinвҖҷin kaybolma saatini 17:40 olarak sГ¶ylemeleri yГ¶nГјnde talimat verdiДҹi iddia edilmiЕҹ, Salim bunu kesinlikle reddetmiЕҹtir.
Hediye GГјranвҖҷДұn Telefon DeДҹiЕҹikliДҹi: Narin kaybolduktan birkaГ§ gГјn sonra eЕҹi Hediye GГјranвҖҷДұn telefonunu deДҹiЕҹtirmesinden haberi olup olmadДұДҹДұ sorulmuЕҹ, Salim bilgisi olmadДұДҹДұnДұ sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
Nevzat ile Д°liЕҹki ve GГјran AilesiвҖҷnin Tutumu: Arif GГјran ve Gazal BahtiyarвҖҷДұn (NevzatвҖҷДұn eЕҹi) Salim ve NevzatвҖҷДұn вҖңkardeЕҹim derlerdiвҖқ Еҹeklinde yakДұn bir iliЕҹkileri olduДҹuna dair beyanlarДұ hatДұrlatДұlmДұЕҹ, Salim bunu reddederek, iki buГ§uk aydДұr Nevzat ile konuЕҹmadДұДҹДұnДұ ve evin sДұvasДұ meselesinden sonra gГ¶rГјЕҹmediklerini tekrar etmiЕҹtir. GazalвҖҷДұn вҖңNarin kaybolduktan sonra GГјran ailesi bizi aralarДұna almadДұвҖқ Еҹeklindeki ifadesi de gГјndeme gelmiЕҹ, Salim bunu reddetmiЕҹtir.
ГҮeliЕҹkili Д°fadeler ve HTS verileri: Dosyadaki 12 adet Г§eliЕҹkili ifadeye dikkat Г§ekmiЕҹ ve SalimвҖҷin sadece kendi lehine olanlarДұ hatДұrlayДұp HTS verilerini kabul etmediДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.



Av. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan вҖӢ

Silah TaЕҹДұma: NevzatвҖҷДұn ifadesinde SalimвҖҷin kendisini silahla tehdit ettiДҹini belirtmesi Гјzerine, SalimвҖҷin silah taЕҹДұyДұp taЕҹДұmadДұДҹДұ sorulmuЕҹ, Salim beylik silahДұ olduДҹunu ancak NevzatвҖҷДұ tehdit etmediДҹini sГ¶ylemiЕҹtir.
KayДұp haberini Г¶Дҹrendikten sonra eve gitme: NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹunu Г¶Дҹrendikten sonra SalimвҖҷin eve uДҹrayДұp uДҹramadДұДҹДұnДұ sormuЕҹ; Salim, eve gittiДҹini belirtti.
Elbise deДҹiЕҹtirme: SalimвҖҷin ГјstГјnГј deДҹiЕҹtirme meselesini kabul edip etmediДҹini sormuЕҹ, Salim ГјstГјnГј deДҹiЕҹtirmediДҹini ifade etti.

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: SanДұk MГјdafilerinin SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
text:
SanДұk MГјdafilerinin SorularДұ ve Odak NoktalarДұ вҖӢ
Salim GГјranвҖҷДұn mГјdafileri, mГјvekkillerini savunmak ve iddialarДұ Г§ГјrГјtmek iГ§in teknik ve mantДұksal argГјmanlar sunmuЕҹtur:

Av. Mustafa Demir (Enes GГјran MГјdafi) вҖӢ

WhatsApp Verilerinin GeГ§ersizliДҹi: Avukat Demir, dosyaya giren вҖңsilinen WhatsApp verileriвҖқ belgesinin aslДұnda hatalДұ olduДҹunu, HTS kayДұtlarДұnДұn kopyalanДұp Гјzerine 2 saat 38 dakika 27 saniye eklenerek oluЕҹturulduДҹunu iddia etmiЕҹtir. Bu listenin WhatsApp aramalarДұ olmadДұДҹДұnДұ, hatta DEPSAЕһ gibi 444вҖҷlГј hatlarДұn WhatsApp Гјzerinden aranamayacaДҹДұnДұ belirterek, iddianamenin вҖңalgДұlarlaвҖқ hareket ettiДҹini vurgulamДұЕҹtДұr.
MДұsДұr TarlasДұ ve Ceset Yeri: Harita Гјzerinde NarinвҖҷin cansДұz bedeninin bulunduДҹu yer ile SalimвҖҷin HTS kaydДұna gГ¶re bulunduДҹu iddia edilen 135 dГ¶nГјmlГјk mДұsДұr tarlasДұnДұn uzaklДұДҹДұnДұ gГ¶stermiЕҹ, geniЕҹ bir alanda olmanДұn ceset yerine gitmek anlamДұna gelmediДҹini savunmuЕҹtur.
Askeri Гңs KamerasДұ: KГ¶ydeki askeri Гјs kamerasДұnДұn kГ¶yГј вҖңayna gibiвҖқ gГ¶rdГјДҹГјnГј ve NarinвҖҷin kaybolduДҹu saatlerdeki gГ¶rГјntГјlerin incelenmesi halinde gerГ§eДҹin ortaya Г§ДұkacaДҹДұnДұ, ancak bu kayДұtlarДұn incelenmediДҹini veya istendiДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.



Av. Onur AkdaДҹ (Salim GГјran MГјdafi) вҖӢ

WhatsApp Arama KayДұtlarДұ Д°ddiasДұnДұn Sahte OlduДҹu: Avukat AkdaДҹ, SavcДұlДұДҹДұn вҖңWhatsApp arama kayДұtlarДұnДұ geri getirmesine yГ¶nelik resmi belgenin sahte olduДҹunuвҖқ iddia ederek, HTS kayДұtlarДұnДұn manipГјle edildiДҹini tekrarlamДұЕҹtДұr. Bu durumun, вҖңsavcДұlДұk makamДұnДұn mГјvekkil aleyhine kati surette tartДұЕҹmasДұz bir kanДұt elde edemeyince resmen suГ§ delili uydurmuЕҹ olmasДұвҖқ anlamДұna geldiДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir.
Nevzat ile Д°liЕҹki ve Medya Etkisi: SalimвҖҷin Nevzat ile Г§apkДұnlДұk veya kadДұnlar hakkДұnda konuЕҹmadДұДҹДұnДұ, NevzatвҖҷДұn ifadelerinin medya (Г¶zellikle Didem ArslanвҖҷДұn programДұ) etkisiyle 9 EylГјlвҖҷden sonra Salim ve YГјksel aleyhine deДҹiЕҹtiДҹini, bunun NevzatвҖҷДұn вҖңdersini Г§alДұЕҹmasДұвҖқ olduДҹunu Г¶ne sГјrmГјЕҹtГјr.
AraГ§taki DNA ve Camlar: NarinвҖҷin zaman zaman SalimвҖҷin eski, Fuat GГјranвҖҷa ait olan ve birГ§ok Г§ocuДҹun bindiДҹi arabaya binmesinin normal olduДҹunu, bu durumun DNAвҖҷnДұn varlДұДҹДұnДұ aГ§ДұklayabileceДҹini belirtmiЕҹtir. AyrДұca, NevzatвҖҷДұn NarinвҖҷi вҖңsaДҹ camdan aldДұmвҖқ demesine raДҹmen, arabanДұn saДҹ arka camДұnДұn bozuk olduДҹunu belirterek, NevzatвҖҷДұn ifadesiyle Г§eliЕҹki olduДҹunu vurgulamДұЕҹtДұr.

title: Salim GГјran Mahkeme Д°fadesinin KapsamlДұ Г–zeti
section: SonuГ§ вҖӢ
text:
SonuГ§ вҖӢ
Salim GГјranвҖҷДұn ifadesi ve sorgulama sГјreci, karmaЕҹДұk bir dava ve birГ§ok Г§eliЕҹkiyi barДұndДұrmaktadДұr. Salim, Гјzerine atДұlДұ tГјm suГ§lamalarДұ (NarinвҖҷin Г¶ldГјrГјlmesi, kanДұtlarДұ gizleme, tanДұklarДұ yГ¶nlendirme, kolluk kuvvetlerini yanДұltma, DNA bulgularДұ, HTS verileri) reddetmiЕҹtir. SavunmasДұ, olay gГјnГј rutinini detaylandДұrarak bir alibi sunmaya, HTS ve WhatsApp verilerinin manipГјle edildiДҹini iddia etmeye ve diДҹer suГ§lamalarДұn baskДұ altДұnda alДұnmДұЕҹ ifadeler veya sГ¶ylentilere dayandДұДҹДұnДұ belirtmeye odaklanmДұЕҹtДұr. MГјdafiler, Г¶zellikle WhatsApp veri raporunun gГјvenilirliДҹini sorgulayarak ve askeri Гјs kamerasДұ gibi dДұЕҹ kanДұtlarДұn incelenmesi talebinde bulunarak SalimвҖҷin masumiyetini desteklemeye Г§alДұЕҹmДұЕҹlardДұr. Mahkeme heyeti ve diДҹer avukatlar ise SalimвҖҷin ifadelerindeki tutarsДұzlДұklarДұ ve kendi lehine olanlarДұ hatДұrlayДұp aleyhine olanlarДұ inkar etme eДҹilimini sГјrekli olarak vurgulamДұЕҹtДұr.

title: Evaluation of Evidence and Grounds вҖӢ
section: Evaluation of the Concrete Case вҖӢ
text:
Evaluation of the Concrete Case вҖӢ
In the evaluation of the concrete case, it was understood from the reports made on 08/21/2024 that the deceased Narin had gone missing, after which all the means of our State were mobilized and search efforts were initiated, and while the search activities were ongoing, at around 08:30 on 09/08/2024 during a sweep conducted by the Gendarmerie Underwater Search and Rescue officers within the EДҹertutmaz creek located in the TavЕҹantepe Neighborhood, upon reaching the coordinates 37 SFB 06008-89639, a sack was seen in the part where the EДҹertutmaz creek joins the soil, wedged under rocks and covered by three stones of 40вҖ“50 cm in diameter so as to conceal it, the mouth of the sack was tied with a red string yet it was understood that a part of a body was protruding, and upon subsequent checks the lifeless body of Narin GГңRAN was reached inside the sack, and it was understood that Narin GГјran had been killed.
In the final report prepared by the First Specialization Board of the Council of Forensic Medicine (CFM) following the external and internal examination and autopsy performed on the deceased Narin GГңRANвҖҷs body and the pathological analyses conducted on the internal organ samples taken, it was stated, by unanimous opinion, that вҖңThe childвҖҷs death occurred on 08/21/2024, that there was no medical evidence indicating death by a traumatic effect other than closure of the mouth and nose and neck compression causing asphyxia, and that the childвҖҷs death occurred due to being deprived of oxygen as a result of closure of the mouth and nose and pressure on the neck.вҖқ
It is known to everyone that the deceased Narin GГјran was last seen on the school camera at 15:15:14 (the said time is approximately 4 minutes ahead of the current time), after which she left her group of friends to go home and headed toward the place referred to as the footpath. This is also established by the camera recording in the file and the statements of the friends who were with Narin at that moment.
Our court conducted inquiries as to where the deceased Narin GГјran went last and where she was found, and sought to enhance the DARAN-2 footage in the file on this matter. In line with the request of the complainant Arif GГјran and the defense counsel of the defendants to include the DARAN-2 footage in the file and the defense counselвҖҷs request to send the said video to the National Criminal Bureau (UKB) for enhancement and to obtain a report, the relevant video was sent to the UKB and a report was obtained. As stated in the report, 1.5 minutes after the last time seen on the school camera, there is a moving dark figure on the footpath in the direction of the house-stable, and this figure could be the deceased due to the clothing elements being dark in color and the figure being perceived as short and thin; it was also stated that there was a moving black element in the lower part of the stable. It was observed that the report stated that the said movement was not a pixel artifact but a real, live movement. In light of this, our court accepted that the relevant dark figure was a live, real human movement. Therefore, given that the examination in the report indicates that this figure moved toward the stable and the house area and then the moving element disappeared, and considering this finding consistent with the school camera, our court found it established that the deceased Narin, after taking the footpath, went toward the house and the stable, which is an annex of the house.

title: Evaluation of Evidence and Grounds вҖӢ
section: Evaluation of the Evidence вҖӢ
text:
Evaluation of the Evidence вҖӢ
Our courtвҖҷs evaluation of the evidence in the file is as follows;
As a result of the investigations conducted by the DiyarbakДұr Chief Public ProsecutorвҖҷs Office, a public case was filed before our court against the defendants, and it was understood that a separate investigation was conducted regarding the witnesses heard by our court, that the relevant investigation is still pending, and that a restriction order exists on the file. Upon the requests by the defendants and their defense counsel to incorporate the said file into this file, when this matter was inquired of the DiyarbakДұr Chief Public ProsecutorвҖҷs Office, it was observed that there was a restriction order in the file and that, therefore, the investigation file could not be provided within this file. The witnesses were also heard by our court, and it was observed that they did not possess information that could affect the merits in the concrete case. Only the witness Hediye stated that she was at home at the time of the incident. This matter will be evaluated in detail below. Apart from this evaluation, when all other witness statements heard are examined, it is understood that they do not contain any concrete statements that would affect the killing of the deceased Narin.
It was observed that in her statements at various stages, the witness Hediye persistently stated that she was at home at the time of the incident, that Narin never came home, that the defendant Salim and the defendant Nevzat also never came to the house, and that the defendant Enes was sleeping at home. The child Muhammed Emre, who was also at home during the incident, was heard as a witness by our court; it was intended to hear the witness Eren, but because he caused a disturbance while waiting his turn in the Forensic Interview Room (FIR) and due to his age, it was decided not to hear him, and the video recording containing the statements taken during the investigation stage was played in the courtroom.
When these witness statements are examined as a whole, it is seen that they are not consistent with the other evidence in the file that will be described in detail below; that especially the childrenвҖҷs statements, as indicated by the experts present during their taking in the FIR, were coached statements; that the statements of the witness Hediye were created to conceal the facts involved in NarinвҖҷs killing; that particularly the witness HediyeвҖҷs statements that she was at home on the day of the incident do not overlap with the other evidence; that, as will be explained below, the act of killing the deceased Narin was completed at home and subsequently the defendants reached a consensus regarding what would be done after the incident; and for this reason, our court accepted that the witness Hediye was made to give statements in this manner to conceal the incidents, and our court did not give credence to the statements of witness Hediye and the other child witnesses because they do not accord with the evidence in the file.
It was also observed that records were drawn up by the law enforcement officers conducting the investigation within the file. The relevant records were examined one by one by our court, and it was seen that, apart from the records described below that affect the intentional killing of Narin, there was no concrete data. Therefore, the signatories of the relevant records were not heard by our court, and the said records were not regarded as evidence affecting the merits in the concrete case when making the assessment. However, it was observed that in all the records kept in respect of the defendant YГјksel and in the interviews the defendant YГјksel gave to TV channels during the investigation stage, she generally made statements about how she could protect her son Enes and what she could do to prevent harm from coming to her son, and that the records in the file also indicated that the defendant made statements in the manner stated above. It was also observed that the defendant YГјksel, before the lifeless body of the deceased Narin had yet been found, continuously said that her daughter was dead and at least should have a grave. When this matter was asked of the defendant YГјksel by our court, she stated that her daughter had gone missing, and that she made such statements because the people who called her on the phone said, вҖңWe are the mafia, we will harm the defendant Enes,вҖқ but in a file where nearly every incident was recorded by law enforcement during the investigation stage, it was observed that there was no record corroborating the defendant YГјkselвҖҷs statements. Therefore, our court accepted that the defendant YГјksel knew that her daughter was dead before the lifeless body of the deceased Narin was found, and that by continually saying вҖңhow can I protect the defendant Enes,вҖқ she did not disclose and tried to conceal the truths regarding NarinвҖҷs death. It was understood by our court from the records kept that on 09/08/2024 in front of the DiyarbakДұr CFM and previously in the village there were mutual actions and statements by women; the persons involved in the incident were heard as witnesses, but since the said actions and statements were not directly related to the killing of Narin and did not contain concrete information about who knew and who committed the killing, the said witness statements were not taken into consideration by our court.

Crime Scene Examination, Autopsy Report, and CFM Reports; вҖӢ
Within the framework of the search activities, it was observed that at around 08:30 on 09/08/2024, during a sweep conducted by the Gendarmerie Underwater Search and Rescue officers within the EДҹertutmaz creek located in the TavЕҹantepe Neighborhood, upon reaching the coordinates 37 SFB 06008-89639, a sack was seen in the part where the EДҹertutmaz creek joins the soil, wedged under rocks and covered by three stones of 40вҖ“50 cm in diameter so as to conceal it; that the lifeless body of Narin GГңRAN was reached in the said sack; and that the lifeless body of Narin GГңRAN was transferred to the DiyarbakДұr CFM Group Directorate for the purpose of conducting the autopsy.
It was stated in the initial examination conducted by the Council of Forensic Medicine that there was an amputation at the left knee, and that a tibia-like bone fragment and small pieces were found next to the location where the body was discovered; that the exact cause of death and other matters would be determined by pathological, biological, and chemical examinations to be conducted.
Although it was not possible to collect entomological data during the crime scene examination and it was unknown whether the insects obtained represented the total assemblage on the body, and the temperature data could not be recorded in the microhabitat where the body was found, it was stated that, considering together the analysis of the insect fauna on the body, the colonization of the insects, and the development of the immature forms, the age of the examined samples could be 17 days (plus or minus) Вұ24 hours with respect to the time of collection (09/08/2024), and that this was consistent with the time when the deceased went missing (08/21/2024).
During the search for Narin, upon determination on 08/26/2024 that the defendant Enes GГјran had bruising on the inner part of his right arm and under his right eye, he was transferred by air to the Istanbul CFM. In the report of the 2nd Specialization Board of the Istanbul CFM dated 08/28/2024;


Considering together the localization, traumatic effects, color, size, and depth of the soft tissue lesions described and determined under the right eye and on the right forearm, these lesions were consistent with a time interval of 3вҖ“6 days,
It was determined that in the photographs taken on the first day and in the examination conducted at our Board, there was a 4.5x1.9 cm mildly ellipsoid-shaped ecchymosis in the middle of the inner surface of the right forearm, a 2.5x1.8 cm mildly ellipsoid-shaped ecchymosis lateral to this ecchymosis, and in these ecchymoses there were places with mild red discolorations, and that these lesions were consistent with a human bite mark; that the localizations of the lesions did not include the integrity of the typical and clear jaw movements encompassing all teeth, that since they were caused only by the tips, as asked, these lesions could belong to a small child (under 18) as well as to an adult, and that no distinction could be made between them,
According to the panoramic radiograph examined, only qualitative analysis could be performed; for quantitative analysis the dental cast itself was necessary; however, it was stated that, qualitatively, occurrence with the existing teeth in the panoramic radiograph could not be ruled out,
In addition, in the interscapular region on the back, there were red discolorations, the largest being 1x0.1 cm and the smallest 0.1 cm in diameter,


it was observed that a report was drawn up in this manner.
It was observed that in the interviews conducted by CFM experts with the defendant Enes GГјran for the preparation of the report, he stated that on the day his sister Narin went missing, he was very distressed, that he caused the ecchymotic-looking lesion under his right eye himself, that is, by punching his face six times out of distress, and that he also caused the bite mark on the anterior middle part of his right arm himself, that is, by biting himself.
These injuries were asked in particular of the defendant Enes both during the investigation stage and during the trial conducted by our court; in his response, it was seen that he stated that he caused the bite on his arm by biting his arm in anger because he could not find his missing sister Narin and saw his family saddened, and that the bruises on his face occurred as a result of the leaves and ears of corn striking him while searching for the missing deceased Narin in the cornfield.
In our courtвҖҷs evaluation of the injuries sustained by the defendant Enes, it was accepted that the defendantвҖҷs contradictory statements at various stages, when considered as a whole, were not compatible with the ordinary course of life.
It was further observed during the prosecution stage that a report regarding the macroscopic and microscopic examination of the hair samples found on NarinвҖҷs hand and clothing was sent to our court by the CFM. In the said report, it was determined that the mtDNA sequences of YГјksel GГјran, Enes GГјran, and Narin GГјran were THE SAME according to the data obtained by sequencing the bases in the Control Region, which shows a high degree of polymorphism in mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA), for the approximately 29 cm brown hair samples found in the left palm of Narin GГңRAN and on the black shorts, and the approximately 16 cm and 11 cm brown hair samples taken from the undershirt.
It was observed that it was stated that mtDNA is transmitted only from the mother to the child and that individuals in the same maternal lineage (such as siblings, maternal grandmother, aunt, maternal uncle, auntвҖҷs children) have the same base sequence; thus it provides information as to whether individuals come from the same maternal lineage.
It was observed that a search and examination were conducted on the vehicle with license plate 47 XX 388, which was in the actual use of Salim GГңRAN on the day of the incident and beforehand, and in the report drawn up as a result of the examination conducted by the Van Gendarmerie Criminal Laboratory on the samples obtained, it was stated that a DNA profile belonging to Narin GГңRAN was found on the seating part of the driverвҖҷs seat of the said vehicle.
Upon the findings in the vehicle with license plate 47 XX 388 in the use of Salim GГңRAN, in order to conduct a more detailed examination within the vehicle, the said vehicle was sent by tow truck to the Van Gendarmerie Criminal Laboratory, and it was stated that in the detailed examination conducted, the hair sample obtained from the inner part of the right rear door of the vehicle belonged to Narin GГңRAN.
Within the scope of the file, in order to obtain evidence, examinations were conducted on carpets, kilims, quilts, pillows, clothing, the personal belongings of the GГјran family, and other items such as stones and sand found at and around the scene; as a result of the examinations, multiple CFM reports were obtained, and it was stated in the reports that no findings constituting elements of the offense were encountered. Therefore, the said reports are not addressed one by one here; it was understood that the other reports, apart from those stated and discussed in the reasoned judgment, did not provide concrete data regarding the killing of the deceased Narin GГјran.


As for other evidence; вҖӢ
In the records kept by law enforcement officers, it was seen that the defendant Salim, who is the village headman, made constant contradictory and suspicious statements during the search activities, that he directed the law enforcement officers to places other than the scene, causing the lifeless body of the deceased Narin to be found late, and that especially on the day of the disappearance, he gave different and contradictory time information in the information he provided to law enforcement officers and other talks he had, and that in his phone calls (it was determined that these calls were identified because the defendant Salim had installed a recording program on his own phone) he constantly mentioned different times.
It was observed that the defendant Salim GГјran had installed a program on his personal phone that records calls. The conversations in the relevant program were transcribed into Turkish and placed in the file. Upon examination, no conversation relating to the killing of the deceased Narin was encountered. It was also seen that the defendant told the people who called him that he was engaged in search activities, that they were looking everywhere, that gypsies might have kidnapped Narin in a red car, and that he told the villagers to search in corn or other fields. However, it was understood that there were no recordings of the calls made on the night of the incident, 08/21/2024, and thereafter, that the relevant program was deactivated by the user at around 00:31 on 08/22/2024. Furthermore, when the defendantвҖҷs Historical Traffic (HTS) records and the call recordings on the phone were compared, it was seen that there were recordings of some calls made on the day of the incident, that recordings of some calls were deleted, and likewise that some messaging records, especially WhatsApp conversations and messages, were also deleted. When this matter was asked of the defendant by our court, he stated that he was the headman and therefore was constantly called, that he forgot some things, that he had the call-recording program installed by someone else so as not to forget, but that he did not intentionally delete it on the day of the incident and thereafter, and moreover that he deleted his WhatsApp history because he communicated with an escort. However, upon examination, it was understood that the conversations with the escort and some unimportant messages as well as some call recordings remained. Our court evaluated this as an extraordinary situation. Because it would be expected that the defendant Salim, who is the village headman, would be frequently called on the day of the disappearance and thereafter, that a forgetful person whose genuine intention is to find the missing girl would use this call-recording program more during the search for the disappearance, that the village headman would be constantly called by others and given information, that a forgetful person could later listen again to these calls and tell the law enforcement units the matters he deemed important, and perhaps have the relevant calls listened to by law enforcement. While these circumstances were present, the defendantвҖҷs deletion of the said program long in use after midnight on the day of the disappearance case, as well as his deletion of some of the call recordings he made during the day while not deleting others and similarly deleting the WhatsApp history yet keeping the escort messages he did not want to come to light and some unimportant messages, was accepted by our court as indicating that the defendant concealed something, acted in this way to hide something, did not want the lifeless body of the deceased Narin to be found, and concealed the truths regarding NarinвҖҷs death and prevented their emergence.
It was also seen that members of the GГјran family deleted their phone histories at this stage. Although this is not direct evidence affecting the concrete case, it was considered a suspicious and noteworthy behavior.
Within the scope of the investigations conducted, it was observed that the camera recordings in and around the village were examined, that the clearest last image of the deceased Narin GГңRAN belonged to the camera of the TavЕҹantepe Primary School, and since it was understood that the deceased Narin GГңRAN at 15:15:14 on 08/21/2024 left the camera angle and headed for the footpath leading to her residence, in detailed examinations it was understood that at 15:41:56 on 08/21/2024, the red-colored vehicle with license plate 23 XX 630 entered the angle of the camera belonging to the farm located on the opposite side of the TavЕҹantepe neighborhood, that the vehicle then stopped at 15:44:43 on the dirt road near the EДҹertutmaz creek, and that it left the vicinity of the EДҹertutmaz creek 38 minutes and 11 seconds later according to the camera time. Following the examination, upon understanding that the said vehicle was driven by the defendant Nevzat Bahtiyar, the defendant Nevzat Bahtiyar was apprehended and taken into custody. It was seen that when the defendant was taken into custody, he told the law enforcement officers that the deceased was killed by Salim, that the lifeless body of Narin was given to him, and that he hid it in the creek.
During the investigation stage conducted by the DiyarbakДұr Chief Public ProsecutorвҖҷs Office, expert police specialized in the crime scene and appraisers serving in different provinces were brought to DiyarbakДұr and investigations were conducted at and around the location where the deceased was last seen. In the narrowed Cell Tower Report prepared as a result of the investigations conducted;
When the HTS records of the phone number 0530XXX0653 (Turkcell) used by the defendant Salim GГңRAN were examined; it was observed that at around 14:52 on 08/21/2024 he left his own residence, that he was between his own residence and the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 14:55 he was on and around the road between his own residence and the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that he was in the vicinity of the residence of Arif GГңRAN until 15:18, that he was on the road and in the garden area between his own residence and the residence of Arif GГңRAN until 15:19, that he then headed toward the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 15:20 he came to the residence of Arif GГңRAN and then came to the stable part at the back of the house, that at around 15:22 he was inside the house, that between 15:22 and 15:26 he was in the place referred to as the empty room opposite the kitchen in the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that until around 15:32 he continued to be inside the residence of Arif GГңRAN and moved inside the other rooms, that at around 15:36 he passed to the back of the stable, then re-entered the residence of Arif GГңRAN and stayed in the residence, that at around 15:41 he again passed to the back of the stable, that at 15:42 he was on the road between his residence and the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 15:43 he was in front of the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 15:52 while he was at the residence of Arif GГңRAN he called the phone number 0531XXX1521 registered to Mehmet Selim Atasoy and had a call lasting 31 seconds, that at 16:08 he was at the back of the stable of the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 16:10 he left the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 16:10 he left the residence of Arif GГңRAN and moved toward the cornfield located above the village, that it was stated that the phone used by Salim GГңRAN at around 22:47 on 08/21/2024 came to the place where the body of Narin GГңRAN was found (this matter was corrected in the supplementary report) and left at 22:55 on the same day.
When the HTS records of the phone number 0539XXX7358 (Turkcell) used by the defendant Enes GГңRAN were examined, it was observed that at around 14:30 on 08/21/2024 he was at his residence, that he continued to receive GPRS until 15:41, that at 15:41 he gave a cell from his residence and remained in the residence and its outbuildings until 15:51, that at 15:57 he moved to the residence of Salim GГңRAN and remained there and between then and 16:04 was in an area whose exact location could not be determined, that at around 16:11 he headed toward his own residence, that thereafter until 17:50 he was in his residence and its outbuildings and moved intermittently, that after 17:50 he was outside the residence and moved around the vicinity of the residence, and that at around 18:13 on the same day he turned off his phone or it turned off in a location close to the school, and that the phone was turned on at 04:44 on 08/22/2024.
When the HTS records of the phone number 0536XXX7120 (Turkcell) used by the defendant YГјksel GГңRAN were examined, it was observed that between 14:28вҖ“15:38 on 08/21/2024 she was in her residence and its outbuildings, that between 15:39 and 16:39 she was again in her residence and its outbuildings, and that after 16:39 on the same day she continued to remain and move in her residence and its outbuildings.
When the HTS records of the phone number 0533XXX9779 (Turkcell) used by the defendant Nevzat BAHTД°YAR were examined, it was observed that at around 15:08 on 08/21/2024 he called the defendant Salim GГңRAN and spoke for 42 seconds and then left his residence, that at around 15:10 he was on the paved road between the residences of Arif GГңRAN and Salim GГңRAN and near the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at 15:18 he was very close to the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at around 15:26 he came in front of the residence of Arif GГңRAN, that at 15:27 he was inside the house and its outbuildings and remained at the house until 15:35 on the same day, that thereafter at around 15:40 he was near the school, that at 15:57 he was in the field area, that at around 16:00 he was in the area where the body of Narin GГңRAN was located, and that at around 16:35 he left the place where the body of Narin GГңRAN was found and returned toward TavЕҹantepe village.
The defense counsel of the defendants objected to the said report. Upon the objection, our court obtained a supplementary report from the experts. In the supplementary report obtained;


On 08/29/2024вҖ“08/30/2024 and on 09/08/2024вҖ“09/09/2024, the dates when Narin GГңRANвҖҷs body was found, narrowed cell-tower studies were conducted in TavЕҹantepe village; on all suspects, the residence of Salim GГңRAN, the residences of Arif GГңRAN and Nevzat BAHTД°YAR, the intermediate locations, and the streets, during different days and times, day and night, and especially while working around the residence of Arif GГңRAN and Salim GГңRAN, to avoid congestion in the cell, the phones of personnel in the area were turned off; taking such matters into consideration, using different programs, with at least two lines each from Turkcell, Vodafone, and TГјrk Telekom, step-by-step work was conducted at the residences and outbuildings of Arif GГңRAN, Salim GГңRAN, and Nevzat BAHTД°YAR and on the intermediate roads, and after hundreds of operations were performed meticulously and accurately without error regarding the main cell, side cells, and GPRS cells serving the area, determinations were made,
Because TavЕҹantepe village is located on a hill, it receives signals from many cells in the city center and surrounding areas, and due to the number of cells being quite high, this facilitated the possibility of conducting narrowed-area cell studies at the locations indicated; otherwise, if the number of cells were low, these studies could not have been detailed to such an extent; furthermore, because the area where Narin GГңRANвҖҷs body was found is below the village, the cells could serve a somewhat wider area, and due to the areas being wide in places such as where the body was found and the cornfield, the cell study could not be conducted in very great detail,
As can be seen, the TavЕҹantepe village does not receive signal from only one cell, but from at least 20 different cells, whose names are:


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar YenikГ¶y Bediuzzaman Cd,


DiyarbakДұr Sur YeЕҹilvadi 1045. Sk,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar Selahattin Eyyubi 317.sk 3-B block YaЕҹar Apt.,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BuГ§uktepe,


DiyarbakДұr Sur Abdaldede Gazi cad.168 A,


DiyarbakДұr Sur YeЕҹilvadi 1028.Sk,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar YenikГ¶y 1023.sk8-DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar 1110 sk.,


DiyarbakДұr Sur fetih,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BatДұkarakoГ§,


DiyarbakДұr YeniЕҹehir Cumhuriyet 391sk.,


DiyarbakДұr Sur Dicle,


DiyarbakДұr Ali PaЕҹa Karabulut 1 sk 8,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar baДҹcДұlar 1074 sk 52,


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar 1169 sk BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar 1188 street,


DiyarbakДұr YeniЕҹehir YeniЕҹehir 24 Dedeman Hotel Plaza Hotel


DiyarbakДұr Sur Abdaldede Gazi Cd. 168


DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BuГ§uktepe UzunbahГ§e (DДұykuyuluhoyuk) BaДҹlar, DiyarbakДұr



The numbered cell towers skip from 14 to 19. There are 18 cell towers in the reasoned judgment.
it was determined that there are cell towers with these names, and the cell towers are recorded and listed in the HTS records obtained from the Bilgi Teknolojileri ve Д°letiЕҹim Kurumu (BTK) for the defendants in the file.

Furthermore, by way of example of the cells located at the residence and outbuildings of Arif GГңRAN;

On the day of the incident for Salim GГңRAN,

At around 15:20 he came to the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cell was 666342808032 - opr:Turkcell (DSEMA32L) - DД°YARBAKIR SUR ABDALDEDE GAZI CD. 168 A (DIYSURESKIMARYL) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 15:22 he passed to the stable part, and his cell was 666339323022 opr:Turkcell (SUZAN22L)вҖ“DД°YARBAKIR SUR DICLE (DIYSURKIRK) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
Between 15:22 and 15:26 he was inside the house, and his cell was 665754107021 opr:Turkcell (DBYMZ21L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR YENД°KГ–Y BEDД°ГңZZAMAN CD. (DIYYENIKOYMEZAR) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 15:36 he entered the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cells were 665754107021 - opr:Turkcell (DBYMZ21L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR YENД°KГ–Y BEDД°ГңZZAMAN CD. (DIYYENIKOYMEZAR) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR and 666342808032 opr:Turkcell (DSEMA32L) - DД°YARBAKIR SUR ABDALDEDE GAZI CD. 168 A (DIYSURESKIMARYL) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 15:52 when he spoke with Mehmet Selim ATASOY he was at the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cell was 666342808032 - opr:Turkcell (DSEMA32L) DД°YARBAKIR SUR ABDALDEDE GAZI CD. 168 A (DIYSURESKIMARYL) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 16:08 he was at the back of the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cell was 666339323023 - opr:Turkcell (SUZAN23L) - DД°YARBAKIR SUR DICLE (DIYSURKIRK) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 16:35 he was in the cornfield located in UzunbahГ§e, and his cell was 666239512047 - opr:Turkcell (DBKUY47L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR BUГҮUKTEPE UZUNBAHГҮE (DIYKUYULUHOYUK) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR,

On the day of the incident for Nevzat BAHTД°YAR,

At around 15:10 he was on the road between the residences of Arif GГңRAN and Salim GГңRAN and near the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cell was 666242016022 - opr:Turkcell (DIYBA22L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR SELAHATTД°N EYYUBД° 317. SK. 3 B-BLOCK YASAR APT. (DIYBAYINDIRLIK) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 15:18 he was near the residence of Arif GГңRAN, and his cells were 66628530027 - opr:Turkcell (DIYKA27L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR BAДһCILAR 1074. SK. 52 (DIYKARANFILSOK) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR and 666340655041 opr:Turkcell (DCARK41L) - DД°YARBAKIR SUR YEЕһД°LVADД° 1045. SK. (DIYCARIKLI) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 15:27 he was at the residence and outbuildings of Arif GГңRAN, and his cell was 665754107021 - opr:Turkcell (DBYMZ21L) - DД°YARBAKIR BAДһLAR YENД°KГ–Y BEDД°ГңZZAMAN CD. (DIYYENIKOYMEZAR) BAДһLAR, DД°YARBAKIR,
At around 16:00 he was in the area where the body of Narin GГңRAN was found, and his cell was 666316337031 - opr:Turkcell (DISHA31L) - DД°YARBAKIR SUR YEЕһД°LVADД° 1028. SK. (DIYSURHASIRLI) SUR, DД°YARBAKIR


we can observe these named cells.
That merely looking at the cell numbers and making comparisons would lead to error; when making the said determinations, the data regarding signal strength obtained as a result of our measurements made in the area, the sequence of cell transitions in the personвҖҷs HTS report, making the distinction between auxiliary, main, and side cells in the cells serving the area, and the other matters we have stated are evaluated.
That in narrowed-area cell studies there can be not even the slightest matter open to interpretation, the results of the work take direction according to the calls in the HTS and the density of the cell or the variability of the cells; knowing that the abundance of cells provides an advantage and ease in determining the locations of events and persons is important, and in conducting these studies, it should be emphasized that there may be an error of approximately 2 meters and 1 minute arising from transitions between cells and movement.
Furthermore, in our first report it was stated that the phone number 0530XXX0653 used by Salim GГңRAN gave a cell from the cornfield at the place where the body of Narin GГңRAN was located between 22:47 and 22:55 on 08/21/2024; here, by the area stated as the cornfield is meant the field near the place where the body of Narin GГңRAN was found.


it was stated.

Narrowed cell-tower report вҖӢ
In our courtвҖҷs evaluation regarding the narrowed cell-tower report; the said report was not taken as the sole basis for the judgment by our court; when the said report is evaluated together with the statements of the defendant Nevzat, the Analysis Report of the DiyarbakДұr Provincial Gendarmerie Command in the file, the HTS records regarding the GSM lines used by the defendants, the cell data, cell tower information, the DARAN-2 camera recordings, the UKB report, the statements of the defendant YГјksel and the defendant Enes that they were at home, the farm camera footage, and the camera footage belonging to Ruhi Kaya, our court found that the said report is consistent with the other evidence accepted by our court as evidence, that the relevant information and documents corroborate each other; accordingly, our court placed reliance on the data in the said narrowed cell-tower report.
It was observed that the defendant Nevzat made multiple different and contradictory statements at various stages. Our panel especially examined the defendantвҖҷs demeanor and conduct in the videos of the statements he gave during the investigation stage and while giving statements before our court. As a result of this examination, it was observed that the defendant had difficulties in expressing himself, that he could not complete sentences when forming them, that he narrated the events not in chronological order but in a confused manner, and that when narrating an event he did not recount it in full but briefly; therefore, both during the investigation and prosecution stages, his statements could only be obtained by constantly asking him questions, and likewise when his defense against the opinion was taken by our court, when he was asked to make a defense without any questions being asked, he could not fully express himself and conveyed sentences incompletely and incorrectly; considering also that the defendant and his defense prepared for the final defense, it was observed that the defendant had difficulties in expressing himself, and thus our court understood that the defendant expressed himself by giving short, brief answers to the questions asked. For this reason, our court evaluated the defendantвҖҷs statements as a whole and gave credence to his statements before our court that were consistent with the evidence in the file. Furthermore, what should be noted here is that in all his statements at various stages, consistently, the defendant stated that the deceased Narin was killed by the defendant Salim and that her lifeless body was handed over to him.
In the defendant NevzatвҖҷs statements, which our court credited, he stated in summary that;

At around 15:08 he called the defendant Salim due to a matter regarding water,
After a while, the defendant Salim called him down from the top of the place where ArifвҖҷs residence is located,
Thereafter, together with the defendant Salim they entered ArifвҖҷs house,
Meanwhile, when he entered the house, all the doors of the rooms except one were closed,
He did not see anyone else in the house other than the defendant Salim,
The defendant Salim took him to a room inside the house and showed him the lifeless body of Narin lying on the floor,
At that moment, he saw fluids flowing from the mouth of the deceased Narin due to death,
The defendant Salim told him that he was together with the defendant YГјksel,
That because he saw this, he killed the deceased Narin,
Furthermore, that he threatened him with a gun and told him to dispose of NarinвҖҷs body, otherwise he would kill his son and harm his family,
Upon this, that he wrapped the lifeless body of Narin in a blanket and left the house,
That he took the lifeless body of Narin to his own stable and placed it in a sack,
That during this time he met the defendant Salim again,
That upon the defendant Salim saying вҖңtake it to the lake and dismember,вҖқ he put the sack containing the lifeless body of Narin into his car, left there, and took it to the EДҹertutmaz creek

it was observed that he so stated.
In his defense at various stages, the defendant Salim stated in summary that he did not accept the charges against him, that he was at home on the day of the incident, that he then went to the field, that he learned by phone that the deceased Narin had gone missing, and that he did not accept the statements of the defendant Nevzat.
In her statements at various stages, the defendant YГјksel stated that,

She denied the charges against her,
On the day of the incident, the witness Hediye came to the house, and that they folded laundry together while chatting,
She learned that her daughter, the deceased Narin, had gone missing in the evening when she did not come home,

In her defense before our court, the defendant YГјksel stated that,

She persistently emphasized her chastity,
That the statement in the defendant NevzatвҖҷs declaration that the defendant Salim said, вҖңI killed her because I saw my relationship with YГјksel,вҖқ was a slander,

Our court formed the opinion that the defendant YГјksel did not have a relationship with the defendant Salim during the incident, and as will be explained below, it was accepted that because the defendants Salim, YГјksel, and Enes jointly killed the deceased Narin for a reason that our court could not understand, in order to conceal the real motive, the defendant Salim made a statement of this sort to the defendant Nevzat, and that this statement was made to conceal the real motive that led to NarinвҖҷs killing.
In his defense at various stages, the defendant Enes stated that he denied the charges against him, that he came from the province of Malatya in the morning of the day of the incident, that he slept at noon-afternoon because he was tired, and that he met with his friends in the evening.


Analysis report of the DiyarbakДұr Provincial Gendarmerie Command вҖӢ
In the analysis report prepared by the DiyarbakДұr Provincial Gendarmerie Command; it was observed that the HTS records and cell data of the phone number 0530XXX0653 used by the defendant Salim GГјran, the phone number 0533XXX9779 used by the defendant Nevzat Bahtiyar, the phone number 0536XXX7120 used by the defendant YГјksel GГјran, and the phone number 0539XXX7358 used by the defendant Enes GГјran were examined and compared. In the said report;

It was observed that in the time period after 15:15, which is the time when the deceased Narin GГјran was killed, the relevant phone numbers were in the village and at different angles from the same cell towers; it was seen that at around 15:16 the defendants used the cell tower 665638530027 opr: Turkcell DIYKA27L DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar 1074 street 52 (Diykaranfil street). In the evaluations made here, it was seen that the defendants acted together and were aware of each other in the time period when the deceased Narin was killed.
It was seen that the situation of jointly using the same cell by the defendant Nevzat and the defendant Salim increased between 15:25 and 15:46; it was observed that the defendants predominantly used the cell towers named 665754107021 opr: Turkcell DBYMZ21L DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar YenikГ¶y BediГјzzaman Street DД°YYENIKOYMEZAR BaДҹlar DiyarbakДұr, 66638854032 opr: Turkcell DSALI32L DiyarbakДұr Sur Ali PaЕҹa Karabulut 1. Street 8 DД°YSURALД°PAЕһAMAH Sur DiyarbakДұr, 666337679027 opr: Turkcell D7MIN27L DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar BaДҹcДұlar DIYYEDД°EMД°NOTOP BaДҹlar DiyarbakДұr; considering that the cell tower information used was at the same angle, it was interpreted that the defendants were related to each other and were in the same location at the times stated.
It was seen that after 15:46 the defendant NevzatвҖҷs cell information was mobile while the defendant SalimвҖҷs cell data was stationary; it was understood that this meant that the defendant Nevzat left the scene and the defendant Salim remained at the scene.
It was understood from the cell data used that after 16:13 the defendant Salim left the village and went to the cornfield on the BatДұkarakoГ§ road, and after 16:13 the defendant Nevzat returned to the village.
It was observed that the defendants Salim GГјran and Enes GГјran were in different angles of the same cell tower at 15:41 and 15:42. Again, the defendant EnesвҖҷs conversation at around 15:45 with the person named Kerem SГјmer clearly shows the cell data.



Video recordings вҖӢ
In the examination of the video recordings in the file; it was seen that during the prosecution stage, a UKB expert report was requested to enhance the DARAN-2 footage, and the report sent stated that at 15:18:47 (the said time is 6 minutes ahead of the current time) there was a dark figure in the stable next to the residence of Arif GГјran, and that at 15:19:05 there was an intense light flare reflected from beside the stable into the camera and there was mention of vehicle movement. It was seen that both the complainant party and the defendantsвҖҷ counsel agreed that the said vehicle was later determined to be other vehicles reflected in the farm camera.
Again, under the other data arranged under the heading of Movement detected at the scene; it was observed that at 15:23:06 there were 2 dark figures in front of the stable, and at 15:25:53 there was a dark figure in the place referred to as the back of the stable.
Considering the distance of the relevant DARAN-2 camera to the house of Arif GГјran and its annexes, known as the scene, and the video quality, it was seen that it was stated that the video could only be enhanced to this extent.
It was also seen that there were farm camera recordings belonging to Mehmet Sait Tek in the file. An examination record of the relevant footage was included in the file. Upon examination, it was seen that at 15:41:56 (the camera time and date are current) a suspicious vehicle was traveling from the TavЕҹantepe neighborhood toward the Г–zdemir neighborhood GГ¶nenli clustered houses (EДҹertutmaz creek) direction, that thereafter at 16:22:04 the vehicle left the EДҹertutmaz creek (the said vehicle remained at the EДҹertutmaz creek for approximately 38 minutes and 11 seconds), and thereafter at 16:23:54 the vehicle passed in front of the camera located in the Г–zdemir neighborhood GГ¶nenli clustered houses; it was understood in the examination that the vehicle was a red Еһahin-brand vehicle, and after this work the defendant Nevzat Bahtiyar was apprehended. It was also seen that at around 22:35 another vehicle that could not be identified went to the EДҹertutmaz creek.
It was also seen that there were camera recordings belonging to a person named Ruhi Kaya in the file. It was observed that the parties to the case, namely the complainant party and the defendantsвҖҷ counsel, agreed on the relevant footage, and that the parties concurred that the white vehicle passing there belonged to the defendant Salim. In our courtвҖҷs examination, it was seen that at 16:15:29 a white vehicle was traveling in the upper right corner of the camera, and at 18:35 the same vehicle again passed in front of the camera.
In the examination conducted in light of all this evidence; our court accepted that the narrowed cell data, the statements of the defendant Nevzat credited by our court, the Technical Analysis report of the DiyarbakДұr Provincial Gendarmerie Command, the CFM reports, the camera footage, the report prepared by the UKB, and the other evidence mentioned above are consistent with each other, and that, in terms of the main subject, they support and corroborate each other.
Other evidence submitted to the file by the complainant, the complainantвҖҷs counsel, the complainant institutions, the defendants, and the defense counsel did not contribute to the concrete case; therefore, our court did not give credence to them and they are not addressed here.

title: Evaluation of Evidence and Grounds вҖӢ
section: Assessment of Participation вҖӢ
text:
Assessment of Participation вҖӢ
In our courtвҖҷs assessments on participation;
In its decision numbered 2013/91, the Penal General Assembly of the Court of Cassation stated that Article 37 of the Turkish Penal Code (TPC) No.В 5237, under the heading of Perpetration, is regulated as follows: вҖңEach of those who jointly commit the act included in the legal definition of the offense shall be liable as a perpetrator.вҖқ If the act defined as an offense in the law is committed in concert by more than one accomplice, joint perpetration as regulated in Article 37/1 of the TPC will be at issue. Taking into account the views in the doctrine as well, two conditions must be met together for joint perpetration: 1- There must be a joint decision among the perpetrators to commit the offense. 2- There must be joint control over the commission of the offense. In joint perpetration, since there is joint control over the act in addition to a joint decision to commit the offense, each accomplice is in the position of a вҖңperpetrator.вҖқ In determining whether joint control over the act has been established, the roles undertaken by the accomplices in the commission of the offense and the significance of their contributions should be considered. Joint perpetration will also be at issue where the accomplicesвҖҷ contributions to the commission of the offense complete each otherвҖҷs acts. Accordingly, it has been stated that each joint perpetrator makes an effective, functional contribution to the execution of the offense.
In its decision docket No.В 2017/1-279, decision No.В 2019/30, the Penal General Assembly of the Court of Cassation explained as follows: вҖңIn the first paragraph of Article 37 of the TPC No.В 5237, joint perpetration is regulated by the provision: вҖҳ(1) Each of those who jointly commit the act included in the legal definition of the offense shall be liable as a perpetrator.вҖҷ If the act defined as an offense in the law is committed in concert by more than one accomplice, joint perpetration as regulated in the first paragraph of Article 37 of the TPC will be at issue. Taking into account the views in the doctrine as well, two conditions must be met together for joint perpetration: 1- There must be a joint decision among the perpetrators to commit the offense. 2- There must be joint control over the commission of the offense. In joint perpetration, since there is joint control over the act in addition to a joint decision to commit the offense, each accomplice is in the position of a вҖҳperpetrator.вҖҷ In determining whether joint control over the act has been established, the roles undertaken by the accomplices in the commission of the offense and the significance of their contributions should be considered. To determine whether a personвҖҷs conduct has reached the stage of participation in an offense, and if so, to determine the level of participation, all the evidence must be evaluated together, taking into account not the situation at one stage of the act, but the decision made to commit the act, the manner in which that decision was executed, and the behaviors before, during, and after the incident. For one of the most important elements sought in joint perpetration is the personвҖҷs joint control over the act during the commission of the offense.вҖқ
In its decision docket No.В 2017/937, decision No.В 2017/484, the Penal General Assembly of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңAccording to the provisions on participation in the Law No.В 5237, their reasoning, and the practices of the Court of Cassation, the forms and level of participation are determined by the measure of control established over the commission of the act. The forms of participation envisaged in the system of the Penal Code as statuses of liability are regulated as perpetration, instigation, and aiding. With the expression in Article 37(1) of the TPC, вҖҳeach of those who jointly commit the act included in the legal definition of the offense shall be liable as a perpetrator,вҖҷ the scope of the concept of perpetration has been kept quite broad, and anyone who establishes control over the conduct enabling the commission of the offense is deemed a perpetrator. Establishing control over the conduct may occur in the form of jointly carrying it out, and also encompasses jointly performing the conduct based on an implicit or explicit division of labor. Accordingly, even those who do not perform the act that results in the offense but prepare the necessary environment for anotherвҖҷs performance of that act are deemed perpetrators; therefore, many of the acts directed at the victim during the commission of the offense must be assessed as perpetration pursuant to Article 37 of the TPC. To determine whether a personвҖҷs conduct has reached the stage of participation in an offense, and if so to determine the level of participation, it is necessary to evaluate all the evidence together, taking into account not the situation at one phase of the conduct, but the decision made to commit the conduct, the manner in which that decision was executed, and the behaviors before, during, and after the incident. For the intent to commit an offense (mens rea) may form at every stage until the offense is completed. The will to participate may form at any stage of the offense. In light of these explanations and the provisions of Article 37, for joint perpetration it is required that more than one person jointly decide to commit the offense, that to realize this decision the acts of execution of the offenseвҖ”i.e., its material elementвҖ”be jointly carried out, and that joint control be established over the execution of the act. Since the will to participate and intent are concepts related to a personвҖҷs inner world, where these are not expressly stated, this fact of the inner world must be determined by looking at behaviors reflected in the external world.вҖқ
In its decision docket No.В 2015/1-1146, decision No.В 2019/206, the Penal General Assembly of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңAlthough he saw the scene, from a point at a distance that prevented establishing joint control over the killing that took place inside the garden, the accused watched the incident from beginning to end; the act whereby the deceased was struck by Kerem Mutkan with a lug wrench and screwdriver he took from his own vehicle, and by Recep Kazak with a piece of wood, and then stabbed to death by the accused Resul, was committed in concert by Resul, Recep, and Kerem, who, by jointly deciding and establishing control over the act, acted in participation in the commission of the offense defined as killing; the accused, on the other hand, neither engaged in any preventive conduct to show that he did not side with the acts of Resul, Ekrem, and Recep during the commission of the act, nor left the scene until the other accused completed their acts against the deceased, and by waiting at the scene, he emboldened and facilitated the commission of the acts by the accused outside the scope of this review; and after the incident, he took the principal perpetrators of the offenseвҖ”Resul, Recep, and KeremвҖ”into the vehicle under his control and left the scene. When these matters are assessed as a whole, it must be accepted that the accusedвҖҷs act constitutes, not the offense of harboring a criminalвҖ”an offense against the administration of justice that can be committed solely to save a person who committed a crime from investigation, arrest, detention, or execution of the sentence without participating in the offense in any wayвҖ”but the offense of intentional killing by facilitating the execution of the offense by aiding during the commission of the intentional killing of the deceased Erkan TГјnkler.вҖқ
In its decision dated 03/19/2013 and numbered 1-81/91, the Penal General Assembly of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңWhen the facts that the accused D, upon seeing that his friend M had been injured by the deceased, instead of separating D and the deceased together with the bar staff witnesses present at the scene and immediately taking his friend, who had a stab wound in his leg, to the hospital, attacked the deceased with the knife he had on him; that he remained with the accused M until the end of the incident; that he did not utter any words or engage in any conduct to prevent the act of intentional killing carried out by the accused MвҖ”are assessed together, it must be accepted that the accused D participated in the intentional killing committed by the accused M.вҖқ
In its judgment docket No.В 2020/2086, decision No.В 2021/934, the 1st Criminal Chamber of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңIt was established that the deceased child Kenan, aged 5, lived together with his mother DГ¶ndГј and his motherвҖҷs boyfriend Д°brahim Halil; that according to the Forensic Medicine report, on the date of the incident he died as a result of traumatic intracranial changes together with fractures of the skull and facial bones due to the impact of a blunt object; that there were previously healed bone fractures on his body; that it was understood he had previously been battered by the accused or the accused; that on the day the deceased died, after he fainted, the accused did not call 112; that upon understanding the deceased had died, the accused, acting with unity of idea and action, took the deceased and buried him in land belonging to the father of the accused Д°brahim Halil KДұlДұnГ§; thereafter, when the family members asked about the deceased, they stated that they had placed the deceased in a state institution; and finally, the accused DГ¶ndГј went to the police and filed a missing person report regarding her minor son. When these matters are assessed together, since it is understood that the accused DГ¶ndГј acted in solidarity with unity of idea and will and established joint control over the result, committing the offense together with the other accused Д°brahim Halil, she must be punished as a joint perpetrator within the scope of Articles 37 and 82/1-d-e of the TPC regarding the offense against the deceased.вҖқ
In its judgment docket No.В 2023/6009, decision No.В 2024/5580, the 1st Criminal Chamber of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңвҖҰalthough the accused did not accept the charges, given that the victimвҖҷs allegation regarding the accused is corroborated by witness statements, it is understood from the accusedвҖҷs conduct during and after the incident that they participated in the offense of attempted intentional killing within the scope of Article 37 of Law No.В 5237 by acting with unity of idea and will and establishing joint control over the act.вҖқ
In its judgment docket No.В 2023/7593, decision No.В 2024/3717, the 1st Criminal Chamber of the Court of Cassation ruled as follows: вҖңConsidering that after the accused left the scene, according to witness accounts, it was understood that the deceased was still alive; that after leaving the scene, the accused Mustafa went to the house of the accused SГјleyman, sat there for a while without telling the household anything, then went to his own home and was apprehended there by law enforcement; that during this period, as can also be understood from witness accounts, he made no effort to prevent the death of the deceased, who was understood to be alive, and did not notify the police or medical teams; it is concluded that the accused acted with unity of idea and will, established joint control over the act, and thus carried out the act; therefore, the accused Mustafa is also a joint perpetrator.вҖқ
In the assessment of participation in light of the Court of Cassation decisions mentioned above; Article 37, regulated under the heading of Perpetration in the section on Participation in Offenses in our Turkish Penal Code, provides that: вҖңEach of those who jointly commit the act included in the legal definition of the offense shall be liable as a perpetrator.вҖқ Anyone who establishes control over the conduct enabling the commission of the offense is deemed a perpetrator. Establishing control over the conduct may occur in the form of jointly carrying it out, and also encompasses jointly performing the conduct based on an implicit or explicit division of labor. The will to participate in question may be realized pursuant to a decision taken beforehand, or it may be realized by agreeing over the act during a spontaneously developing incident. What must be noted here is that the act must not yet be fully completed, that is, the offense must not be consummated. Acts occurring after the completion of the offense are not accepted as participation but will give rise to other offenses (as will be explained below with respect to the accused Nevzat, hiding or destroying evidence of the offense). The matter of participation is generally regulated in our law, and what constitutes participation has been shaped by the decisions of the Court of Cassation. However, since each concrete case contains different characteristics in itself, it is necessary to assess the matter of the accusedвҖҷs participation separately in each concrete case. Therefore, the participation of the accused in the act that occurred may take different forms, and in each case the acts carried out by the accused must be described separately. However, as noted above, sometimes it is not possible to ascertain what the acts of the accused were in the act that occurred. In such situations, it will suffice to determine whether the accused acted in participation in the act in question; the inability to determine what the accusedвҖҷs acts were will not create a doubt in favor of the accused in the concrete case. How will it be determined whether the accused participated in an act? Since the will to participate and intent are concepts related to a personвҖҷs inner world, where these cannot be clearly determined, this fact of the inner world can be determined by looking at behaviors reflected in the external world. Whether the accused who were together during the incident participated in the offense can be understood from their behaviors after the incident. In cases where an accused does not engage in any preventive conduct to show that he does not side with the act that took place beside him; where the person committing the offense draws strength from other persons present during the commission of the offense; where what is to be done after the completed act is jointly determined; where, by supporting the person committing the offense during and after the offense, efforts are made to conceal, hide, or prevent the discovery of the evidence of the offense; where, despite the duty to prevent any harm that may befall the deceased, the necessary intervention is not made to the person committing the act by acting contrary to this duty; where, foremost by notifying 112, no concrete conduct is engaged in to show the absence of participation in the actвҖ”under such circumstances, it will be accepted that the accused acted in participation.
