title: Defense by Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Counsel for the Defendant
section: Law. Adnan AtaЕҹ вҖӢ
text:
Law. Adnan AtaЕҹ вҖӢ

Examination of the Camera Footage and Responsibility вҖӢ
Actually, Presiding Judge, when you look at the entire file, let me begin like this вҖ” one is tempted to say I am the counsel of Nevzat Bahtiyar, the owner of TavЕҹantepe village. When we look at the entire file вҖ” I will explain the reasons in detail shortly вҖ” first, regarding my client, since there were accusations about my client in the defense preceding ours, we need only to respond. It is not in the indictment, but we must respond to these claims about my client. There were not only accusations about my client; they also said that the DARAN-2 footage was examined 19 days later. Presiding Judge, the DARAN footage was not examined 19 days later. There are records in the file showing that the DARAN footage was examined on August 28вҖ“29. Not only the DARAN-2 camera; the farm camera that saw the red car was also examined on August 28вҖ“29. However, Presiding Judge, the hours of examination: the farm camera was examined after 17:00, and the DARAN-2 footage after 18:00. Despite these cameras being examined on August 28вҖ“29, the reason why my client and the other defendants could not be identified is not my client, it is the GГјran family. The reason these cameras were reviewed for these hours is not my client вҖ” as I said, it is the GГјran family. Presiding Judge, a moment ago, regarding my clientвҖҰ The sound is not coming through like this, Presiding Judge.


Baseless Allegations Against Nevzat Bahtiyar вҖӢ
Alright. Now, Presiding Judge, the second matter вҖ” abuse was mentioned. Again, in the defense preceding ours, we observed the following. Throughout the investigation, about the GГјran family вҖ” I say вҖңthe GГјran family,вҖқ please, I am not pointing at any individual or target, I do not want to list names one by one вҖ” approximately 39 witnesses were heard in this file. Nearly 25 are from the GГјran family, Presiding Judge. No one, including the father, named my client as a suspect. That is the first point. The second point: after September 8, first a claim of a 50,000-lira or 40,000-lira debt was raised. That claim did not hold up, Presiding Judge. No one believed it, we did not believe it either. Afterwards, it was alleged that Nevzat Bahtiyar was having a relationship with his sister-in-law. By showing that the phone used did not belong to Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs sister-in-law, we refuted that claim too, and ultimately an unpleasant, baseless вҖ” I will call it a disgusting slander вҖ” allegation of pedophilia or perversion was raised about my client. There is no basis to it, Presiding Judge. An allegation without any foundation. A moment ago, our colleague Mr.В Ali raised something. For example вҖ” if we are talking about Enes GГјran in this file, if we are talking about an allegation regarding Enes GГјran, we have a gendarmerie record about him. The mother says, вҖңWhen my sons are at home, I entrust my daughter to MaЕҹallah.вҖқ As our colleague also said, everyone can attach a meaning to this record, or a meaning can be attached to this sentence by the mother. When we make an allegation, Presiding Judge, let me state this first: we proceed from the records in the file. Therefore, we do not accept this allegation which has no foundation and is supported by no evidence. Indeed, we denounce it as a disgusting allegation. Likewise, as is known, the number of people interviewed in the village during the investigation stage вҖ” no need to say вҖ” there is not a single finding, not a single suspicion about my client in this regard. We do not accept this allegation in any way. In the defense preceding ours, a sentence about Narin was put as if the crime scene were inside the house. Presiding Judge, my client has no knowledge of the crime scene. Concerning the crime scene, our client has made no single concrete statement to date.


The Consistency of the ClientвҖҷs Statements and the Contradictions of the GГјran Family вҖӢ
In his final and consistent statement, once my client felt his family was safe, he said the same thing throughout all his statements. When he arrived, our sister Narin was on the floor in the room and foam was coming from her mouth. He never described the crime scene. Again, todayвҖҷs defense and the defense before ours show us something else, Presiding Judge. We heard the following in the defense: вҖңIf Enes GГјran harms his sister Narin GГјran, why would Salim GГјran not call his father? Why would he not call his father and say вҖҳYour son did such a thing to your daughter, where are you, comeвҖҷ?вҖқ вҖ” such an expression was used. Presiding Judge, on the day Narin disappeared, we know from the file that Arif GГјran did not learn of his daughterвҖҷs disappearance from his family. According to his own statement, he learned it first from his neighbor, and then, Presiding Judge, from someone in the neighboring village. On the day Narin disappeared, Salim GГјran speaks with all family members вҖ” I will not say all, rather many family members вҖ” but he does not call the father. Salim, who supposedly must call the father if Enes did something to Narin, does not call the father when Narin disappears. This situation clearly shows us that Salim GГјran in fact wanted to stay away from the father in some way. What I have said so far, Presiding Judge, concerns the claims preceding us, and I must respond to them at least partially because this is our final word. Changes in Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs statements were mentioned. Presiding Judge, Nevzat Bahtiyar spoke today. Today and yesterday were the days he spoke most freely. It is a matter within the discretion of your court. One week after this hearing, on November 7, protection was assigned to his family. In the clearest sense, on that day his family requested assurance for him, and from that date onward at least my clientвҖҷs mind was, at least regarding his family, partly at ease. Since that date his statement has not changed at all. If a change of statement shows anything, Presiding Judge, we have seen very well the changes in the statements of all the members of the GГјran family during this process. As I said earlier, I want to say that I am the counsel of Nevzat Bahtiyar, the owner of the village вҖ” when we cover the surnames in the file, Presiding Judge, you would think NevzatвҖҷs surname is GГјran. Everything that has happened is as if done to protect Nevzat, but it is not.


Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Situation and the Allegation of Coldbloodedness вҖӢ
We know very well that my client Nevzat Bahtiyar is SalimвҖҷs close friend, SalimвҖҷs companion, and on a day when family members were not in the village because of wedding invitation distribution, Salim GГјran called him and made him an accomplice to the crime вҖ” truly the poor man of the village. There is a matter, Presiding Judge. Regarding my client, the words вҖңcold-blooded, cold-blooded, cold-bloodedвҖқ are always used. As you know, even in a statement you made use of, Presiding Judge вҖ” today my clientвҖҷs family is not here. There are two reasons for their not being here. First, yes, because of security; second, the effort of us lawyers, myself and Mr.В Ali. They too wanted to come to the hearing. We did not see a need. We told them that we are personally beside Mr.В Nevzat. My clientвҖҷs family also wanted to be at his side today, but as we said, we did not consider it appropriate for the family to come вҖ” not only for our client, but for the safety of many people here, and to avoid any problem with the order of the hearing. I believe you share this view with us. Presiding Judge, at the first hearing my client experienced the same thing. At the first hearing he was alone too. Apart from being alone, he was subjected to insults and threats. At the hearing we saw the pressure the GГјran family members exerted on our client. We saw, several times, the motherвҖҷs phrase, вҖңAllah belanДұ versinвҖқ (вҖңMay God curse youвҖқ). Here, Presiding Judge, if a person does not feel safe, if a person feels helpless вҖ” at the hearing, as you know, he did not even have a private counsel he had retained. I do not criticize the other CMK-assigned counsel; we all know the truth about that. By вҖңtruthвҖқ I do not mean anything bad, but we know how that process went. Our client, therefore, felt alone and in helplessness. With the mental state this created in him, yes, unfortunately, he displayed a demeanor at the hearing. He withdrew into himself, fell silent, and appeared cold-blooded. This appearance of cold-bloodedness should not give any impression to you or the public; as I said, he was left alone. That is, at the hearing, as you will appreciate, words were sometimes said to him. At times harsh sentences were used.


The Absence of a Motive for the Murder and the Contradictions Among Witnesses вҖӢ
His family was not with him, his counsel was not with him, and with this state of mind, because of the situation he was in, this cold-blooded stance is not really a cold-blooded stance, as we said; let us call it a defense developed by a personвҖҷs psychology. Presiding Judge, there must be a chronology: first of all, there must be a motive for the murder. To this day, regarding the murder, as concerns my client, we have not seen a serious motive put forward in the file by the prosecution, by the complainants, or by the defendants. As I stated earlier, neither the money matter, nor the matter of the relationship with the sister-in-law, nor todayвҖҷs disgusting allegation is a motive for murder. Presiding Judge, at the investigation stage Yasemin GГјl used a sentence. She says: вҖңNo one outside the GГјrans can intervene with the children of us GГјrans. If there is an incident, it is within the village, within the family,вҖқ she says, and this is a very clear sentence. In that village, no one other than the children of the GГјrans can touch the GГјrans. This is the familyвҖҷs own acknowledgement, the familyвҖҷs own statement. With this statement, YГјksel GГјran in fact very easily removes my client from being a murder suspect. Presiding Judge, I will not address all contradictions one by one; I must mention some. They explained Birsen GГјranвҖҷs statement. Yesterday Mr.В Nahit also explained it, and explained it in detail. Birsen GГјran says 17:40 and supports her statement with a phone call. But the phone call also turns out to be false.


Contradictions in the Statements and the Role of Family Members вҖӢ
Presiding Judge, yesterday Mr.В Nahit вҖ” the HTS records in the file are clear вҖ” Birsen GГјran says, вҖңI spoke with my aunt at 17:40, I looked at the clock, that is why I said 17:40.вҖқ But it is said that it is not 17:40 but 14:00. And at 14:00 she has no call with her aunt. Therefore Birsen GГјranвҖҷs statement is a very concrete piece of evidence for this file. It is not merely a statement, it is more than a statement. The statement that Salim GГјran said to her вҖңtell the time as 17:40вҖқ is a statement taken in the presence of a defense counsel. Credit must be given to this statement, Presiding Judge. Hediye GГјran says she went to the crime scene twice, at 13:00 and 13:40. Since the crime scene is Arif GГјranвҖҷs house and its surroundings, I should note that her son Abdurrahman GГјran says that when he woke up he did not see his mother at home between 13:00 and 17:00. Presiding Judge, yesterday the complainant party вҖ” yes, we call them the complainant party вҖ” this file is such that normally we defend against the opinion, but today we have to develop a defense against the defense, against the opinion, and against the other defendants as well. Yesterday the complainant party explained this situation very clearly. Hediye GГјran is in fact a witness too. That is, Hediye GГјran is a witness prepared in order to remove these persons from the scope of the incident. We agree with the complainant party on this matter. Presiding Judge, Enes GГјranвҖҷs statements are very contradictory. There are important days in a personвҖҷs life; we cannot forget these important days. We cannot erase the details of those important days from our minds. I do not need to state the dates of each statement one by one; all statements are in the file. In the interview conducted by the gendarmerie, when he talks about his activities between 14:45 and 17:30, he does not mention sleeping at all. Let us say he may have been mistaken about the hours вҖ” he does not mention sleeping at all, Presiding Judge. But on later days he produced a new defense, a new argument, a new contradiction by saying, вҖңI was sleeping during those hours.вҖқ We all already know about Salim GГјranвҖҷs statements contradicting those of Mehmet Selim Atasoy and Ramazan Atasoy. Yesterday Ramazan Atasoy was also heard. Those contradictions were again not resolved. Ramazan Atasoy still insists on the hours he had stated. Our opinion is that, just as Birsen GГјran was directed, he too was directed. There is also the headscarf detail, Presiding Judge. Because it has been raised many times, we need not repeat it вҖ” the motherвҖҷs statement that вҖңthe headscarf was on the railingsвҖқ or вҖңon the balcony railingsвҖқ is not mentioned only once. It is mentioned many times by the family. Г–mer GГјran, Salim GГјranвҖҷs brother, in a broadcast вҖ” indeed in an interview with Ferit Demir вҖ” shows where Narin came from and where she went. He explains where she went. Presiding Judge, he explains it in great detail; when asked why she did not appear on the camera after going home, he says that she came by the path but, as she used this side on her way, she did not appear on the camera. He shows us the crime scene, the interior of the family. Presiding Judge, there is the matter of a red car. Our colleague just played a voice recording. Something struck me in the voice recording. In the background he is speaking with someone.


Salim GГјranвҖҷs Attempts at Directing and the Red Car Claim вҖӢ
Salim GГјran, in the conversation вҖ” now his defenses are that he relayed to the gendarmerie information he obtained from his surroundings. The voice recording they played, Presiding Judge, is a recording from after 22:40 or 22:30. It is not the first recording in which the gendarmerie was called. The gendarmerie was first called at 20:18, when Salim GГјran called the gendarmerie and directly mentions two Roma individuals and a red vehicle. There is Fadile BahtiyarвҖҷs statement. Presiding Judge, this voice recording вҖ” the one in which Salim GГјran mentions two Roma individuals and a vehicle вҖ” you may be following it, it recently surfaced in the media. It is a new piece of evidence, that is, one that the public has only recently come to know, but Fadile BahtiyarвҖҰ Mr.В Nahit is following this well, Presiding Judge.


Destruction of Evidence, Directing Witnesses, and Crime-Scene Findings вҖӢ
I know, Presiding Judge. I am following it. This voice recording was leaked on social media in the past month. Now, the voice recording in which Salim GГјran mentions two Roma individuals and a red car surfaced on social media about a month to a month and a half ago. My clientвҖҷs daughter Fadile Bahtiyar, in her statement dated September 16, says, вҖңI saw Salim GГјran and Mehmet Selim Atasoy side by side.вҖқ Salim GГјran is talking about the moment after they came from the first field and gathered at the square. He is talking about the hour at which the gendarmerie was called, 20:18, and says to Mehmet Selim Atasoy beside him, in a whisper, вҖңI will talk about a red car and two Roma individuals.вҖқ He calls the gendarmerie and does this. As the prosecution also said, this may be for two reasons. First, to point at Nevzat; second, to direct. In the recording played by our colleague, Presiding Judge, as I said, that is a recording from after 22:30, not the first recording. Therefore it does not confirm the defense of вҖңI heard it from someone elseвҖқ or вҖңI was relaying what I heard from someone else.вҖқ But there is one more thing I noticed in the recording. Salim GГјran speaks with someone. When the person on the other end asks a question about the disappearance, Salim GГјran mentions a red car, two Roma individuals, and asks вҖңisnвҖҷt that so, Mehmet Selim?вҖқ Mehmet Selim Atasoy is with him again. The person he has confirm it, or the person from whom he claims he heard it, is also Mehmet Selim Atasoy. This, together with the evidence in the file and when we look at the statements of Mehmet Selim Atasoy and Ramazan Atasoy, shows us quite clearly what in fact happened. It appears that Salim GГјran intervened with Mehmet Selim Atasoy and Ramazan Atasoy as well, after Birsen, Hediye and other family members. I say this in terms of directing. Directing the gendarmerie. Mr.В Ali explained it; I do not need to explain it at length again, but he did not mention one thing. He did not mention Arif GГјranвҖҷs allegations. In the interview record in the file, the record of the interview with Arif GГјran вҖ” in that record Arif GГјran speaks of his own family directing the gendarmerie, Presiding Judge. Look вҖ” this is not merely something that struck the gendarmerieвҖҷs attention; it is a detail that even struck the attention of the complainant Arif GГјran. Now, were all these destructions of evidence, all these contradictions, all these directings вҖ” Nevzat GГјran, I will say, Presiding Judge вҖ” done for Nevzat Bahtiyar? That is not possible. Yesterday Mr.В Nahit actually dwelled on this at length. Because he gave a very long defense, not only mine but many of our colleaguesвҖҷ defenses would be repetitive. The marks on EnesвҖҷs body, the bruise on his eye, the bite on his arm have all been discussed. But, Presiding Judge, there are marks on his back, and there are marks on his chest. As Mr.В Nahit also said, there are ecchymoses in 8вҖ“9 places. Yes, not all of them could be clearly identified, but we are talking about 8вҖ“9 marks, Presiding Judge. This is something that can result from a struggle, or an intervention, or a fight. It is not something that can result from just a corncob. To what can we attribute the bruises on EnesвҖҷs eye, Presiding Judge? Of the 91 swabs taken from Narin, many are positive for blood. Blood is positive in the earthen area of the barn, there is blood on the rocks beside the barn. There is blood at the entrance of the balcony at the house. Presiding Judge, it is certain that something happened at and around Arif GГјranвҖҷs house. The prosecution in its opinion accepts that Narin went up the slope. We join the opinion only on this point. Whatever happened, Presiding Judge, happened above that slope. The report of the National Crime Bureau also supports this. Presiding Judge, regarding the DNA found in Salim GГјranвҖҷs vehicle вҖ” yesterday I asked Salim GГјran the same question вҖ” in his statements there is a sentence: вҖңDid she get into our vehicle?вҖқ вҖ” I am using the word he used at the investigation stage вҖ” вҖңI did not see her get into the vehicle.вҖқ Presiding Judge, even the childrenвҖҷs statements were taken in the investigation file, as you know. The video recordings were examined. The school camera, Ruhi KayaвҖҷs camera; there are statements of many children. We did not see any child playing in a car. Presiding Judge, all the children of the village are at and around the school, playing in the school yard with flowers. We saw this, but, Presiding Judge, we did not see children playing in a car. We are all fathers, we all know. When we first get a car, our own child may be curious for 1вҖ“2 days and play with it, but after the third day a car is no longer a play area for children. The DNA found on the driverвҖҷs seat of Arif GГјranвҖҷs vehicle is therefore a very important piece of evidence. Salim GГјranвҖҷs. I apologize, I said Arif GГјran. Again, the matter of the three stones found on the body and, as Nahit Eren also alleged, the explanation regarding the PSAs. I wonder whether, after my client, only three stones вҖ” while there was one, more than two вҖ” that is, was a skirt left there? Were other items placed in that bag? My client explained many things sincerely, but there is no hook, Presiding Judge. Even that hook may have been taken later, Presiding Judge. We think it was taken later. We think that after my client left, the killer вҖ” or killers, I should say вҖ” went to the scene, I mean to the place where the body was, and made a further effort to conceal the body. There is a voice recording of Salim GГјran. I skipped it a moment ago, Presiding Judge. While speaking of contradictions or directing, in the recording, when people ask, вҖңShall we look at the cornfield, shall we search the cornfield as well?вҖқ, he says, вҖңIf anything, she is in the canal; what would the girl be doing in the cornfield? Do not search in the swamp over there,вҖқ such a sentence. I do not remember the exact wording, but I know the word вҖңswampвҖқ was used. I know the cornfield was mentioned. The area of the EДҹertutmaz stream around the cornfield is also a swamp, Presiding Judge. When people want to go that way, вҖңWhat business do you have over there? Narin cannot have gone there; come, let us look at the canal.вҖқ He tells them, вҖңIf you want to go, well, you know,вҖқ but he directs people to the canal, Presiding Judge. This is also one of the most important pieces of evidence in the file. When we look at the gendarmerieвҖҷs intelligence records, in many records, Presiding Judge вҖ” there is even a record, very short, 2вҖ“3 lines вҖ” saying that the body may be found in Arif GГјranвҖҷs barn. There is even intelligence suggesting that Arif GГјran may be involved. It is in the JASAT record and in the investigation file. Presiding Judge, all of these cannot be a coincidence: the blood found, the intelligence received, the DNA found in Salim GГјranвҖҷs vehicle, the bruise on Enes GГјranвҖҷs eye, the 8вҖ“9 ecchymoses on his body in separate regions вҖ” all of these show us that, whatever happened, Presiding Judge, happened in and around the barn and Arif GГјranвҖҷs house. The mitochondrial DNA matter. There is a detail there, Presiding Judge. This DNA may belong to Narin, to the mother, or to Enes, but, Presiding Judge, the lengths of the hairs there are different. There are short hairs and long hairs. Therefore, there is a possibility that all the hair and fibers obtained there belong to Narin. Yes, it is possible DNA-wise; but when we look at the lengths, one is 16 cm and the other is 29 cm, Presiding Judge. There is no possibility that both hair and fiber samples simultaneously belong to Narin. Their lengths are different; therefore, as many have said, Narin held her killer in her palm and wanted to show us. I repeat, Presiding Judge. I am not saying, based on the DNA, that those there belong to the mother or Enes. They may also belong to Narin, I accept that вҖ” but the lengths of the hairs and fibers found on Narin are different. They cannot all belong to Narin, Presiding Judge. Therefore, I believe that the DNA will in fact lead us to the killer. The final decision, of course, will be yours. Regarding the 37 carpets taken from the house вҖ” as Nahit Eren and our esteemed colleague also stated yesterday вҖ” only two DNA profiles were found. Of course, this is an abnormal situation. That is, in a house where people live, where journalists come and go, reporters, gendarmes, police. Only two DNA profiles could be identified. This in itself is an abnormal situation, but proceeding from this, when I look at YГјksel GГјranвҖҷs statement, Presiding Judge, she says in many of her statements that she washed the balcony after Hediye GГјran left. Perhaps she did not only wash the balcony, but the carpets as well. Perhaps she cleaned the crime scene. I believe that sentence in her statement, without her being aware of it, will lead us to the truth. Presiding Judge, excuse me вҖ” you know the file. Sometimes we do not remember our notes; otherwise I would have said, вҖңTaking all these matters into account.вҖқ вҖ” there is not much left, Presiding Judge.


Identifying the Scene of the Crime and the FamilyвҖҷs Power in the Village вҖӢ
Presiding Judge, everything I have said shows us one thing. The scene of the crime is clear. Narin went up that slope; whatever happened, it happened there. Whatever happened, happened within the family. Arif GГјran вҖ” this is my first defense вҖ” my condolences, let me express it from here, I do not know whether he is here or not. It is very hard for a father. Yesterday in his defense he said, вҖңCould a mother do this to her child?вҖқ I say with regret that, unfortunately, yes, we have also seen mothers who killed their children. We have also seen elder brothers who killed their siblings. I also say to him, вҖңMay Allah grant him patience.вҖқ Beyond that, I only understand him, let me put it that way. Regarding my client, Presiding Judge, we have so far spoken of the evidence at the crime scene and where it leads us. I have tried to explain this to you regarding my client. Presiding Judge, here we are. One defendant is over there, the other three are over there. What joint participation can we speak of, Presiding Judge? It is not possible for these four people to act together, to decide together. If Salim and Nevzat act, Ms.В YГјksel is left out; if Salim and Enes act, Nevzat is left out. It is not possible in any way for my client to be present at the same time and in the same environment with these four people, and to decide on something together. Why did he admit it? Why did he give an incomplete account? Why did he accept the body? I will come to the matter of why he gave an incomplete account, Presiding Judge. We watched the video of shepherd Ahmet here yesterday. We all saw shepherd Ahmet. We may not understand the Kurdish, but there are certain things we heard. Although we all heard the word вҖңEnes,вҖқ the shepherd did not confirm it. Erhan GГјran also did not confirm it. Although we all heard the phrase вҖңcomplaint to the prosecutorвҖҷs office,вҖқ saying вҖңYou will not go to the prosecutorвҖҷs office, you will not tell anythingвҖқ вҖ” whatever the exact wording, the shepherd did not confirm this. Erhan GГјran also did not confirm it. Now we watch the video, Presiding Judge, and it is evident that all 10вҖ“15 people there are quite at ease. They are carrying out an action against the shepherd there, but they have no fear that he might file a complaint against them. No family member has any fear that the shepherd could file a complaint against himself. They are in the comfort of вҖңWe are the owners of this village; we can interrogate whom we want, we can make whom we want do what we want.вҖқ Also on social media, Presiding Judge, threat messages were posted. What struck me most was a post: вҖңAs much love as you want for those who want, and as many bullets as you want for those who do not.вҖқ Presiding Judge, as far as I understand, there is no limit to this family вҖ” I should say that is beyond me to say вҖ” but yes, they are a powerful family in their own village. Despite this post they still move around very comfortably. They express certain things. Yesterday Arif GГјran, as you know, after an intervention within the courtroom, when you said вҖңRemove the members of the GГјran family,вҖқ Arif GГјran got up from his seat and came to this side and said вҖңLet no one leave their seat.вҖқ That is the kind of self-confidence we are talking about. Whether you heard it or not, I do not know, Presiding Judge, probably it was after you had left. He came there and said, вҖңLet no one leave.вҖқ Presiding Judge, you have given a decision, but the family does not even wish to comply with your decision. I am trying to describe the pressure on Nevzat Bahtiyar, Presiding Judge. Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҰ please do not interrupt; allow me to finish.


The Pressure on Nevzat Bahtiyar and the Rejection of the Allegation of Participation in the Murder вҖӢ
Colleague, please allow me, let me finish. Please, colleague, be calm. You will also speak, we will listen. I heard it myself; if you did not hear, I cannot say anything to that. Now, against a family thinking with this ease, with this power вҖ” in this comfort and with this strength вҖ” there is no possibility, Presiding Judge, for my client Nevzat Bahtiyar to stand up to them. I saw something on social media, Presiding Judge. Someone says, вҖңIf Salim says вҖҳcucumber,вҖҷ Nevzat Bahtiyar will rush with salt in hand.вҖқ That is, the friendship and relationship between Salim and Nevzat unfortunately drew my client Nevzat into the matter on the day of the incident. The narrowed base-station report, Presiding Judge вҖ” our colleague explained it; we do not know whether your court will credit it. But since the prosecution took the base-station report into account regarding participation, I say that the prosecution contradicts itself, Presiding Judge. The crime scene is the barn, the surroundings of ArifвҖҷs house, or that area. We do not know exactly. According to the narrowed base-station report, my client Nevzat Bahtiyar is the last person to go to the crime scene: 15:27. If the murder was committed in the barn, my client never went to the barn at all. If the murder was committed in the house, Presiding Judge, my client comes to the house at 15:27. In both scenarios it appears that my client went to the crime scene after the death had occurred. Regarding joint intent вҖ” as I explained a moment ago, Presiding Judge вҖ” it is not possible for my client, or for these four persons, to decide on something at the same time. My client remains outside every scenario, yet somehow an opinion on participation was given. Presiding Judge, even according to the narrowed base-station report my client вҖ” I repeat, when making your decision, Presiding Judge, I want you to visualize in your mind; you will sit and deliberate вҖ” if the scene of the crime is the barn, my client is on the path. If the scene of the crime is inside the house, my client is still on the path. Salim GГјran goes first, Presiding Judge. I say this although I do not accept the adverse points in the narrowed base-station report. Presiding Judge, I want you to think of the following. Salim and Nevzat are waiting on the path in front of their own houses. Our sister Narin went up, Enes GГјran carried out an intervention, and a sound came. The first person to intervene on hearing the sound is Salim GГјran; 7 minutes later my client goes, Presiding Judge. Where is the unity of action? There is no unity of action after the death has occurred. My clientвҖҷs failure to disclose the location of the body for 19 days is not a unity of action, Presiding Judge. It is not after the death has occurred. Not present at the moment of death. According to the narrowed base-station report, my client вҖ” the prosecution here contradicts itself вҖ” for 19 days it is true, he did not inform law enforcement; but in his candid statement he said that for 4 days he wanted to take the body from where it was and leave it by a roadside. So it would be found. Unfortunately we all know вҖ” because of the number of gendarmes in the village he could not express this; he could not carry out that act. For 4 days, Presiding Judge, he said he did not go to work in order to remove that body, and for 4 days he in fact did not go to work. He had the thought that it should be taken away from there so Narin could be found, but because of the number of soldiers and personnel in the village he could not carry out this act. 39 witnesses were heard. I am wrapping up, Presiding Judge. 39 witnesses were heard. None of the witnesses heard told any lie to protect my client. Let me also respond to that. Incidentally, regarding Gazal Bahtiyar, regarding Mehmet Bahtiyar вҖ” it was said they too lied. Presiding Judge, Mehmet Bahtiyar initially, at the first stage, misremembers the day of the incident while giving his statement. But before his statement is even finished, on the second page he corrects it. He realizes his mistake and says, вҖңThe day I was talking about was one day earlier; it was the day we all went to work together. On the day Nevzat took the body to the stream, he was not with us.вҖқ He realizes his mistake and corrects it before his statement is even finished. It is very painful, Presiding Judge. On August 28вҖ“29 the farm camera was looked at, the DARAN footage was looked at, these were examined. The other, clearer, camera we mentioned was also examined вҖ” but always after 18:00. The reason for this is the GГјran family, not my client, and it is done deliberately, Presiding Judge. A moment ago my colleague already made a statement regarding the narrowed base-station report; however, even if your court credits it, considering that my client Nevzat Bahtiyar is the last person to arrive at the crime scene, unity of action and intent is not possible. Therefore, as regards my client, the elements of the offenses of murder and participation in murder are not made out. Very briefly, very briefly, Presiding Judge. He committed this act because of fear and threat, and there was one thing I wanted from you here, Presiding Judge: to think about the crime scene. I have explained the reason to you. According to the narrowed base-station report, he is the last person to arrive at the crime scene. I want you to think of this. The second matter, Presiding Judge, is that today the entire GГјran family names my client as the killer. The fear вҖ” that is, the fear they give to people in the village вҖ” yesterday I asked the shepherd whether he had filed a criminal complaint, and he said no. He says, вҖңMay Allah not leave my right unanswered,вҖқ Presiding Judge. Out of fear, he cannot go to the prosecutorвҖҷs office. We are talking about such a family in the village. I want you to think of three things: first, that my client was the last person at the moment of the incident; second, the fear and pressure in the village; and third, Presiding Judge, that the entire GГјran family and all those persons whose statements were taken cannot have done this for my client. They have no dispute with my client. We have already explained this to them, Presiding Judge. In light of all these matters, as regards my client, we do not accept the opinion on participation in murder and on murder. Of course we will say that my client be acquitted; but regarding hiding evidence of a crime and harboring a criminal, there is his own acknowledgement. We request that he be acquitted of murder and released together with the verdict.

title: Abbreviations
text:
Reading Time
~ 1 min


Word Count
134



  



  




Bu ceberrut dГјzeniвҖҰ Elbette evde bekleЕҹen evlad-u iyal yabana atДұlДұr gibi deДҹil. Yetmez! rabinler bir aДҹДұzdan haykДұrdДұlar, asДұl isteklerini Г§ДұДҹДұrdДұlar; ГҮarmДұh!вҖҰ. Bundan 2000 yДұl Г¶nce takvimimizin henГјz baЕҹlarДұnda Д°sa MesihвҖҷe Г§ivili sopalar, kancalДұ kamГ§Дұlarla iЕҹkence ettiler, gГ¶klerin krallДұДҹДұndan sГ¶z eden bu iyi niyetli adama yahut da tanrДұnДұn oДҹluna baЕҹДұna dikenlerden bir de taГ§ kondurdular ve ertesi gГјn vali Pontis PilatiusвҖҷun huzuruna Г§Дұkarmak iГ§in zindana savurdular. O gece Pontis PilatiusвҖҷun eЕҹi bugГјn Katoliklerce olmasa da Ortodokslarca azize kabul edilen karДұsДұ Claudia Procula vali kocasДұna; вҖңOnu affedemez misin?вҖқ diye merhamet dilendi. Pontis Pilatius Д°srailoДҹullarДұвҖҷnДұn yeni bir isyanДұnda Д°mparator AugustusвҖҷun kendi kellesini alacaДҹДұnДұ sГ¶yledi, makamДұ ve adalet arasДұna sДұkДұЕҹmДұЕҹtДұ. Ve nihayet o gГјn geldi Pontis PilatiusвҖҷun yanДұ baЕҹДұna diktiler MesihвҖҷi, kan revan iГ§indeydi, kindar kalabalДұk toplanmДұЕҹtДұ; вҖңiЕҹte bu had bilmezin hal-i pГјr melГўliвҖқ dedi Pontis Pilatius, yetmez mi?

title: Guide
text:
This page explains how you can contribute to this archive about the Narin GГјran case. The site is maintained as a volunteer effort; every piece of feedback helps us fill in gaps and extend the archive.
The siteвҖҷs source code and all its content are openly published in its GitHub repository. All of the contribution paths below require a free GitHub account; the next section explains how to create one.

title: Guide
section: Ways to contribute вҖ” at a glance
text:
Ways to contribute вҖ” at a glance



What would you like to do?
Where to go




Request that a specific photo be added to the gallery
Issues


Request that a specific blog article be added to the site
Issues


Report an error, gap or incorrect information
Issues


Exchange ideas, debate or ask a question on a topic
Discussions

title: Guide
section: 1. Create a GitHub account first
text:
1. Create a GitHub account first
Both Issues and Discussions require a free GitHub account:

Go to github.com/signup.
Sign up with your email address and choose a username.
Click the confirmation link sent to your inbox.
Your account is ready вҖ” you can start contributing.

Once you have an account, clicking any of the links on this page will prompt GitHub to sign you in.

title: Guide
section: 2. Issues вҖ” requests and reports
text:
2. Issues вҖ” requests and reports
The Issues page is where concrete requests and error reports are made.

When to open an issue

A new photo to be added вҖ” you want a new photograph to be included in one of the Gallery вҶ’ Images categories (GГјran Family, Justice Vigil, Press & Interviews, etc.).
A new blog article to be added вҖ” you know of an article, column or interview that you think should be added to the Blog section.
A new video to be added вҖ” you want a new video to be added to one of the Gallery вҶ’ Videos categories.
An error report вҖ” you have spotted a broken link, incorrect information, a rendering issue or a typo on a page.
Missing information вҖ” you believe a piece of information or a document should be added.



How to open one

Open the Issues page.
Click the green вҖңNew issueвҖқ button in the top right.
Give it a short, descriptive Title. For example:

вҖңRequest: new photo for the GГјran Family categoryвҖқ
вҖңPlease add Faruk BildiriciвҖҷs column dated 12 AprilвҖқ
вҖңBroken link on the home pageвҖқ

In the Description, write what you want as clearly and in as much detail as possible:

For a photo: the source URL (Twitter/X, newspaper, agency), the date, who is in it, where it was taken, any additional context.
For an article: the title, author, where and when it was published, the online link.
For a video: the YouTube URL, the channel, the publication date, which category it would fit.
For an error: the URL of the affected page, what you expected, what you saw.

Click вҖңSubmit new issueвҖқ.

Anyone can comment on the issue you open; we reply under the issue to update its status when an item is added or a decision is made.

title: Guide
section: 3. Discussions вҖ” ideas and exchange
text:
3. Discussions вҖ” ideas and exchange
The Discussions page is for open-ended conversations. If you do not have a concrete request or error report but want to share a thought, ask a question, or comment on something, this is the right place.

When to open a discussion

You want to debate an item of information or a comment on the site.
You want to share your opinion on any aspect of the case.
You want to ask a question and see what the community has to say.
You have a suggestion for how the site could develop that has not yet crystallised into a concrete request.



How to open one

Open the Discussions page.
Click the вҖңNew discussionвҖқ button in the top right.
Choose an appropriate category (for example General, Q&A, Ideas).
Write your title and content.
Click вҖңStart discussionвҖқ.

You can also comment on, like or upvote discussions opened by others.

title: Guide
section: Questions and support
text:
Questions and support
If you get stuck at any step or arenвҖҷt sure what to do, feel free to open a question in the Discussions section. Every question and every piece of feedback helps the archive become more complete.

title: Dar Baz (Unlicensed Firearm)
section: Description
text:
Description
In this broadcast I lay out, side by side, the concrete evidence I have against the narrowed-base (cell-tower triangulation) report in the Narin GГјran case. YesterdayвҖҷs stream was cut short by technical problems, so today I start from the beginning with the 21 August 2024 night-time camera footage, the HTS telephone records and the voice memos seized from Salim GГјranвҖҷs mobile phone.

Who was in the vehicle heading to the creek?
I bring up the Said Tekin farm-camera footage with the 22:33 timestamp. A vehicle is seen moving from the direction of TavЕҹantepe towards the creek. The prosecution and the court claimed that the person inside this vehicle was Salim GГјran; the aggravated life-imprisonment verdict was built largely on that assumption. I then place three pieces of physical evidence from the very same minutes on top of each other:

HTS records вҖ” According to the 3-month telephone log requested from BTK, at 22:41 Salim GГјran was called by HacДұ Kaya; the call lasted 22 seconds.
Voice memo #1 (22:41) вҖ” In one of the 232 voice memos seized from SalimвҖҷs phone, he is walking, with a crowd of people audible around him. He is inside the village, moving.
Voice memo #2 (23:01) вҖ” In the second call, Salim clearly states his location: вҖңWeвҖҷre all by the fountain. TheyвҖҷve brought the dog too.вҖқ The line belongs to Arif GГјran.

In both recordings Salim is inside the village, at the fountain. Yet on screen, in the very same seconds, the vehicle is still moving вҖ” heading toward the creek. The person inside the vehicle cannot be Salim GГјran.


The rotating roof light: not on Salim GГјranвҖҷs car
When the vehicle makes a manoeuvre and turns its nose toward TavЕҹantepe, the headlights fully illuminate the opposite direction. Even so, a rotating roof light on top of the vehicle keeps lighting up its surroundings вҖ” this is not headlight reflection, since it is visible even when the front of the vehicle faces away from the camera. Salim GГјranвҖҷs car has no such roof-mounted light. This is an additional piece of evidence that directly contradicts the prosecutionвҖҷs claim.


The problem with the вҖңnarrowed-baseвҖқ report
One of the foundational pieces of evidence used to sentence the family to aggravated life imprisonment is this so-called report. It has no scientific basis; the expert who prepared it essentially asks the court to вҖңtrust me, the person was hereвҖқ. I am not speaking in the abstract вҖ” with camera footage, HTS records and voice memos I disprove the core assumption of the report.
The same expertвҖҷs signature also appears on a 24-page report in the GГјlistan Doku file. I will not go into the substance of the GГјlistan Doku case; the danger I want to draw attention to is that the same fabricated-evidence method could be used to lend spurious credibility to other case files as well.


Birsen GГјran and the 17:40 question
Birsen and her sister Melike had just arrived in DiyarbakДұr after a long drive from Mersin; they had only 3вҖ“5 hours of sleep and were caught up in the rush of wedding preparations. Narin had come to BirsenвҖҷs place that day at 14:00. When, the next day, statements surfaced saying Narin had also been seen near the mosque around 18:00, Birsen began to doubt the exact time. Using the timestamp (17:40) of a phone call her mother had made to her aunt as a reference, she asked Salim GГјran whether Narin appeared on the school camera at 17:40. SalimвҖҷs reply вҖ” вҖңTell them whatever time you saw her, donвҖҷt get yourselves into troubleвҖқ вҖ” was later written up by the gendarmerie as вҖңSalim was coaching the children.вҖқ Birsen never said with certainty вҖңI saw her at 17:40.вҖқ


YДұldДұray OДҹurвҖҷs Karar column
I spend the final part of the broadcast reading YДұldДұray OДҹurвҖҷs column from todayвҖҷs Karar вҖ” вҖңIn DiyarbakДұr, a Kurdish villageвҖҷs rights against the state were defended by a Victory-Party lawyerвҖқ вҖ” from beginning to end. The piece walks through:

The collective punishment that has weighed on the family ever since TavЕҹantepe was branded вҖңЕһeytantepeвҖқ; nine children who have dropped out of school, civil servants who have been dismissed.
ThursdayвҖҷs hearing in the retrial of Nevzat Bahtiyar; the courtвҖҷs rejection of Arif GГјranвҖҷs request for a new site inspection and for the Dara-2 camera footage.
Nevzat first saying вҖңSalim handed me the body in the roadвҖқ, then changing it to вҖңhe handed it over at the houseвҖқ; the narrowed-base report being retro-fitted to this new statement.
Nevzat receiving 17 years for aiding a murder (with likely release after 7), arriving at court with a firearm.
Arif GГјran standing next to two elderly Kurdish women: 75-year-old Remziye CabaЕҹ (вҖңThis state is cruelвҖқ) and 70-year-old Melek GГјran.
The 4K surveillance footage from the Dara-2 military base on the border of DiyarbakДұr Airport, claimed to have been вҖңwiped after 15 daysвҖқ; what has been submitted is as blurred as if it were shot from space.
The absence from the courtroom of the DiyarbakДұr Bar Association, the Human Rights Association (Д°HD), the Free WomenвҖҷs Movement and DEM Party.
The two remaining stops for the family: the Constitutional Court and afterwards the European Court of Human Rights.



Closing
I end the broadcast with the thought that the truth is moving like an avalanche released from the peak of a mountain, and that the number of people who believe in the GГјran familyвҖҷs innocence is multiplying by the day. For more people to clearly see that Salim GГјran did not go to the creek that night, I ask you вҖ” not for myself, but for Narin вҖ” to like and share the video.
Channel: UДҹur Korkmaz Release date: 18 April 2026

title: What was Nevzat Bahtiyar asked? Latest hearing (Part 2)
section: Description
text:
Description
Today, 16 April 2026, IвҖҷm assessing the second hearing in Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs retrial. At the morningвҖҷs hearing, in line with the reversal by the 1st Criminal Chamber of the Court of Cassation, the court reclassified BahtiyarвҖҷs conduct from вҖңdestruction of evidenceвҖқ to вҖңaiding qualified homicideвҖқ and sentenced him to 17 years of imprisonment. Parts of society did not find this ruling sufficient; those who consider Nevzat Bahtiyar the principal offender remained unsatisfied.
For most of the stream I read the remaining 29-page second part of the 6 April hearing transcript that I had started yesterday. I went through one by one: the Ministry of Family and Social Services lawyer Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹanвҖҷs appellate arguments for joint intentional killing; Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs claim вҖ” uttered for the first time today, despite never saying it before вҖ” that he had asked Salim GГјran вҖңwhy did you kill her?вҖқ; the feasibility of the 4-minute window underpinning the narrowed-base report; and the allegation that he threw the body down from the barn.
Nearly everyone who has narrated this file so far has read it through the lens of the familyвҖҷs guilt вҖ” I, on the contrary, read the evidence as someone who believes in the innocence of YГјksel, Salim and Enes GГјran. In this stream I adopted a sharp tone at times toward the mediaвҖҷs demonisation campaign, toward Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs defence lawyer Adnan AtaЕҹвҖҷs strategy, and toward figures who produce content and earn money from NarinвҖҷs body. In the coming streams I will go much deeper into the file.
Channel: UДҹur Korkmaz Release date: 16 April 2026

On a hot August evening, a small girlвҖҷs disappearance falling into gendarmerie radios captures the entire public agenda. The entire village is crucified вҖ” guilty and innocent alike. Meanwhile, the ghost in the village watches it all unfold with cool composure.

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
text:
AUTHOR


YДұldДұray OДҹur


LAST UPDATED


September 21, 2024


SOURCE


Original Source


Reading Time


~ 13 min


Word Count


2407
NarinвҖҷs final image walking from the mosque toward home is at 15:15. Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs red vehicle arrives at the riverbed at 15:40. So whatever happened, happened in those 25 minutes. If you also subtract the road from the village to the river, itвҖҷs 18 minutes. Even just reading aloud the dialogues from the statements given by Bahtiyar вҖ” who turned witness when he was caught вҖ” takes three minutes. So how is it that the confessions of the only person in the village clearly involved in the murder, who calmly recounts a horrific crime, ended up as the chief reference for the gendarmerie and the media?

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: вҖңThe recording that will solve the murder is on Halk TVвҖқ
text:
вҖңThe recording that will solve the murder is on Halk TVвҖқ
Under a breaking-news bulletin, the reporter speaks excitedly from TavЕҹantepe village:

вҖңSalim GГјran has a phone call with RвҖҰ AвҖҰ shortly after NarinвҖҷs disappearance at 15:15. In that call he asks the following вҖ” in the audio recording obtained from RвҖҰ AвҖҰвҖҳs phone: вҖҷRвҖҰ, is the girl alive or dead?вҖҷ Let me repeat: вҖҳRвҖҰ, is the girl alive or dead?вҖҷвҖқ






While he speaks, he doesnвҖҷt say вҖңR.A.вҖқ He says the full name.
Yet the person referred to is a 15-year-old farm worker.
If true, this would be a phone call amounting to a confession of the murder.
The next day the transcript was published of the recorded telephone conversation between uncle Salim GГјran вҖ” the mediaвҖҷs prime suspect вҖ” and his 15-year-old worker R.A.
The Kurdish-language conversation had been translated as follows:

Salim GГјran: вҖңAt that corner at the end something of yours has fallen, ha вҖ” something belonging to you on the slope at the end, the corner of the slope, stone.вҖқ
R.A.: вҖңYeah.вҖқ
Salim GГјran: вҖңSomeone is on the ground.вҖқ
R.A.: вҖңOK, itвҖҷs not in my hand yet, it hasnвҖҷt died yet.вҖқ

These were disconnected, contextless sentences.
But there was no sentence in the transcript along the lines of вҖңRвҖҰ, is the girl alive or dead?вҖқ that Salim GГјran had supposedly said the previous evening on Halk TV. There wasnвҖҷt even a sentence remotely similar.
In an earlier piece in this column we wrote that this disconnected вҖңhasnвҖҷt diedвҖқ sentence may also have been a translation error.
Following the doubts, the audio recording was listened to again, and a new translation of this important piece of evidence was produced.
Yesterday Anadolu Agency published a new transcript of this recorded phone call between Salim GГјran and R.A.:

1. Male (R.A.): Hello (Hello)
2. Male (Salim GГјran): RвҖҰ
1. Male: Yes (Yes, hello)
2. Male: Toward the end something of yours has fallen, near your boundary, toward the end
1. Male: Hmm
2. Male: Near your boundary, something of yours
1. Male: OK, hmm
2. Male: Near your boundary, on the boundary, where the stones are
1. Male: Yeah
1. Male: Yes, itвҖҷs on the ground
2. Male: OK, IвҖҷll go and pick it up now
1. Male: All right
2. Male: All right.






In the new transcript, there was no word like вҖңhasnвҖҷt died.вҖқ
Indeed, there couldnвҖҷt have been.
Because this telephone conversation took place at 18:35, three hours after 15:40, when Nevzat Bahtiyar took Narin to bury her at the riverbed.
Even just someone aware of the timeline should have been able to guess that this conversation could have nothing to do with the murder.
In his statement, Salim GГјran had also accounted for this conversation, even making a confession of an offense:

вҖңWhile irrigating the cornfield, I sometimes used a device to draw illegal electricity from the transformer. On the day of the incident I called R.A. so that he would pick up the device that I had left under a stone. The content of the conversation is entirely about that. It has nothing to do with NarinвҖҷs death.вҖқ

In short: the media had openly fabricated a tape.
The gendarmerie had translated and circulated a tape they were already suspicious about, incorrectly.
But this would not be the last fabrication.

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: Other false news stories
text:
Other false news stories
A few days later, another confident headline started circulating on Halk TV as breaking news:

вҖңThe Narin murder is being solved. Halk TV was right; the sister-in-lawвҖҷs statement explains everythingвҖқ






This selfish piece of news, drawing вҖңvindicationвҖқ out of a tragedy, soon began circulating in copy-paste form across the entire media:
вҖңThis statement will solve the murder,вҖқ вҖңThe knot is being untied,вҖқ вҖңSomeone has spoken.вҖқ
Hediye GГјran was the wife of NarinвҖҷs uncle, the next-door neighbour. On the day of the incident, as on every other day, she had come to the NarinsвҖҷ home.
Halk TV and the rest of the copy-paste media claimed that GГјran had said the following in her statement:

вҖңSister-in-law Hediye GГјran, who claims that Narin may have been killed in the barn, recounted that she saw mother YГјksel GГјran beating her son Enes and a scuffle taking place between them.вҖқ

A theory was even built on top of this statement:

вҖңNarin saw something. Upon this, she either screamed or reacted with something like вҖҳIвҖҷll tell my father.вҖҷ To stop her from screaming, big brother Enes covered NarinвҖҷs mouth with one hand and pressed down on her neck with the other.вҖқ

The next day Hediye GГјranвҖҷs statement came out.
It contained no barn, no scuffle, and no Enes.
This claim too had turned out to be a fabrication.





Like many other claims.
It had been alleged that the gas station attendant who claimed he had seen Narin wrapped in a blanket on the front passenger seat of Salim GГјranвҖҷs car had given a statement and handed the camera footage over to the gendarmerie. The gas station attendant turned out to be a fake profile, no statement had been given, and there was no camera footage from the gas station.
But even seasoned police-beat reporters, without sitting down to look at the investigation file, wrote planned-family-murder theories based on this claim about killing a little girl.

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: Media and political prejudice
text:
Media and political prejudice
Despite repeated reporting that HDP came first in the village in 2015, Д°YД° Party came first in 2023, and DEM took more votes than HГјda Par in 2024; despite it being established that the village had no link to Hizbullah; despite it being known that allegations of secret weapons depots in the village were empty вҖ” these facts did not stop the DEM Co-Chair from repeating the ideological clichГ©s in his head.





The claim that Narin had been killed by paramilitary forces was as ridiculous as the claim that the murder had been committed by a secret cult ritual.





But the alliance of prejudice вҖ” bringing AHaber, Halk TV, and the DEM Party together for different reasons вҖ” had blinded everyone.

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: Simple truths: 18 minutes
text:
Simple truths: 18 minutes
About the demonic вҖңOmerta VillageвҖқ вҖ” said to gather in family councils at night to set the next dayвҖҷs statements, to raise the riverвҖҷs flow rate so the body wouldnвҖҷt be found, to cut off the electricity, to stop using mobile phones, to mislead the gendarmerie with false tip-offs so the body wouldnвҖҷt be found, to be sterner under interrogation than Д°brahim Kaypakkaya in giving away nothing вҖ” and about a family and a village allegedly united to kill an eight-year-old girl and conceal the murder, you could say absolutely anything you wanted.
Nobody sat down to ask whether any of it could be true.
Yet there was no Omerta to begin with. In their statements, family members and villagers had said many things against one another.
The mukhtarвҖҷs wife said she suspected her husband; NarinвҖҷs older brother spoke of the closeness between his uncle, the mukhtar Salim, and Nevzat, and described Nevzat as a downtrodden man who would do anything for money; the mother said that Narin and the uncle had got into the back seat, not the front вҖ” putting the uncle, the mukhtar, in a difficult position with respect to the DNA found earlier on the front seat.
But in this murder case that for days, in main news bulletins, had turned into a MГјge AnlДұ show, anything that came along under headlines such as вҖңSpine-chilling claim,вҖқ вҖңDevilish plot,вҖқ вҖңTheyвҖҷve done this tooвҖқ went straight on air.
Senior journalists, for the sake of a few extra clicks, didnвҖҷt shy away from publishing вҖ” naming names вҖ” sexual fantasies for which there was zero data and zero evidence, in answer to the question: вҖңWhat did Narin see, that she was killed?вҖқ
Over the past 20 days or so, in this family everyone has been paired with everyone else, even with dogs.

вҖңShe saw her uncle S. with his sister-in-law H. in the barnвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her older brother and her cousins in a homosexual relationshipвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her older brother and her uncle in an incestuous relationshipвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her older brother with his sister-in-law in a relationshipвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her mother with her uncle in a relationshipвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her uncle, her mother, and her sister-in-law in a threesomeвҖқ
вҖңShe saw her older brother in a relationship with a dogвҖқ

The diagnosis of DiyarbakДұrlДұ masterвҖҷs-degree student Miham Akkul, who has been following the Narin murder closely from France, is very apt regarding the contradictions in these claims:

вҖңThe media was generous when it came to grand sociological put-downs like honour killing, fГ©odalitГ©, and patriarchy; but paradoxically, they were also claiming that the village, knowing about the relationship between mother and uncle, had ignored this вҖҳdishonour,вҖҷ and that even the father and Enes had swallowed it and covered up the murder.вҖқ

Another disgrace was committed: turning a little girl who is the victim of a horrific crime into a hero of the village.
But this story had been sold to millions of people вҖ” clicks and praise were rolling in вҖ” and the crowd by now treated every possibility other than вҖңthe village that committed the murder and stayed silentвҖқ as political cover-up.

вҖңWhat we have is a cacophony built for a month on baseless and contradictory claims, and inside this cacophony a vast public dazed enough to be convinced of anything.вҖқ

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: The time calculation
text:
The time calculation
A DHA reporter did very good work and drove the roughly two-kilometre route from the village to the riverbed вҖ” partly asphalt, partly dirt вҖ” at 40 km/h, in seven minutes.
So another seven minutes are gone.
That leaves 18 minutes.
WhatвҖҷs more, these 18 minutes are the maximum possible duration, assuming that the disaster that befell Narin happened immediately after the moment she was last seen on cameras.
So what could fit into these 18 minutes?
ItвҖҷs already clear that the gas-station-trip scenario вҖ” which turned out to be fake but which even seasoned police reporters still treat as if it were true вҖ” wonвҖҷt fit.
But will the two contradictory statements of Nevzat Bahtiyar вҖ” who, when the fact that his car had gone to the riverbed was established, confessed under cross-examination that he had buried Narin вҖ” fit into 18 minutes?

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs statements
text:
Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs statements
When Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs car was caught on a security camera at the riverbed, in his first statement to the gendarmerie under cross-examination he built on the gas station attendantвҖҷs claims (which had been circulating for days and later turned out to be fake) about the вҖңbody wrapped in a blanket on the front passenger seat.вҖқ
Salim GГјranвҖҷs wrapping the body in a blanket and putting it in his car, going to a gas station, and then on the way meeting Nevzat without any reason вҖ” and all of that fitting into 18 minutes вҖ” does not look at all possible.





Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs second statement, given to the prosecution, which he said is вҖңmy real statement,вҖқ contradicts the first and is even more detailed.
He took the body from Salim GГјran, brought it home, found a sack, put the body insideвҖҰ
You decide whether all of this could fit into 18 minutes:

вҖңSalim GГјran called from the garden of Arif GГјranвҖҷs residence, 100 metres from my own. He said he had business with me, that he would come by car, that I should get ready. I stopped watering the trees and waited. He arrived a few minutes later. He said, вҖҳGet into your car and follow me.вҖҷ I started following with my sonвҖҷs car. We stopped 50 metres away on the road that leads to the cemetery. When GГјran rolled down his right front window, I saw on the front passenger seat the blanket in which the child was wrapped. When GГјran got out of the car, I got out too. Pointing to the blanket, he said, вҖҳI killed ArifвҖҷs daughter.вҖҷвҖқ

Forget the actions in the statement; even just reading the dialogues aloud takes 3 minutes.





That leaves 15 minutes.
All these actions would have to take place within those 15 minutes.
Of course, only if we accept that Narin was killed immediately after she entered the path.
Is this possible?
What if not?

title: Did all of this happen in 18 minutes?
section: Questions
text:
Questions
What if Nevzat Bahtiyar вҖ” who owned the other house on NarinвҖҷs path home from the mosque, who by his own statement was definitely at home that day watering the trees in his garden, whose two statements obviously contradict each other, who calmly recounts a horrific crime вҖ” what if this man, who in the media has practically been treated as having helped uncover the truth and as a witness on whom the GГјran family is trying to push their guilt, is lying?





How is it that the gendarmerie and the media took as their chief reference the cross-examination confessions of this miserable man вҖ” who, in his own words, вҖңeither out of fear or for 200,000 liraвҖқ put a tiny girlвҖҷs body into a sack, tied the sack with the cord of her own school bag, and then placed 20-kilo rocks on top of it вҖ” the only person in the village who has definitely touched the body вҖ” only after he was caught on cameras?
How is it that the gendarmerie searched the home of a man who said вҖңI brought the body to my homeвҖқ only later?
While in the village almost the only ones not interrogated were the dogs вҖ” while even five- and six-year-old children were summoned to give statements on accusations of misleading the gendarmerie вҖ” why were BahtiyarвҖҷs wife, mother, and children, with Bahtiyar himself saying вҖңI brought the body home,вҖқ never asked what they saw at home that day?
What if the real murderer is the man who, when his car footage caught the riverbed visit, tried to escape by partially confessing?
What if the media, the politicians, the citizens вҖ” who have looked at this case from the start with prejudice and a desire to confirm their own theories вҖ” are with all these lies, claims, fantasies, and prejudices helping the killer cover up his crime?
What if the crime вҖ” every kind of crime, immorality, and silence вҖ” is not in these villagers but in the city dwellers who know everything so well, who are so moral and who talk so much?
The day this case is solved, we will learn a great deal not only about the murder, but also about Turkey.

title: The Narrowed Base Story
text:
AUTHOR


Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i


LAST UPDATED


March 28, 2025


SOURCE


Original Source


Reading Time


~ 6 min


Word Count


1034


The fact that, until today, no expert, engineer, GSM operator employee, academic or similar has written or commented on this issue, and that the whole of Turkey has been made to believe a story, is astonishing. If it had remained a harmless story, there would be no problem, but this story has been submitted as an Expert Report in murder cases resulting in life imprisonment without parole. What a disaster!
In the narrowed base study, after the date of the incident, signal measurements are carried out at the crime scene together with HTS records, and it is claimed that the locations of suspects at the time of the incident can be determined. Wow!
Let me explain why location determinations cannot be made with HTS and signal strength measurements from base stations.
What is measured is the instantaneous signal strength that mobile phones receive from base stations. It can be measured instantaneously in the unit of decibel-milliwatts (dBm), a value between -50 dBm (the strongest signal) and -120 dBm (the weakest signal). Simply put, it is nothing more than the numerical expression of the level bars you see in the upper right corner of your screens.
It is also not possible to access signal data values retrospectively. They are not stored in HTS records, at base stations, at operators, or anywhere else, but can be observed instantaneously with various mobile applications. In other words, even if signal levels were measured at the crime scene, there would be no reference data with which you could compare them.
Moreover, since signal levels are highly variable, they are of little use. They may change due to many different factors such as weather conditions, reflections, the brand and model of the phone, its hardware or antenna position, wind, the phone case or the thickness of the case, other devices in the environment emitting signals, congestion at the base stations, frequency band, etc. Even if the device on which the measurement is made is left in a fixed position, this value will change at intervals.
Let us assume that you went to the crime scene and measured the signal level at a certain point. That would still be useless, because the value you measured could be found at thousands of different points within the coverage area of the base station.
In the example study below, which I found in an academic article aimed at determining the most optimal location for a new base station, signal level measurements were made at 1,500 different points on a university campus.





As can be understood from the colors, each signal level can be observed in different places, and if the same study were carried out one day later with a different device or in windy weather, it would be seen that the coloring in the heat map had changed.
From the suspectвҖҷs HTS data, one can only infer that they were вҖңsomewhere within the coverage area of the base station from which they received a signal.вҖқ Even this inference may not be possible for the GPRS records among the HTS records that contain internet/data traffic. Because with the technology we use today, known as 4G/LTE, phones communicate simultaneously with more than one base station, thereby increasing bandwidth and internet speed, and in that case it cannot even be said which base station they are closer to.
Legally, the HTS records containing base station data and other evidence obtained from their analysis can in no way be taken as a basis for judgment; you can find dozens of Court of Cassation decisions to this effect.
Location determinations with base stations can only be made by a method called triangulation. When phones are connected to at least three base stations, the operator can approximately determine the location of the phone (with a margin of error of 500вҖ“750 meters) by using the distance information to these base stations. However, this needs to be done at the scene of the incident and at the time of the incident. In the Narin GГјran murder case, such pinpoint determinations have been made as вҖңmoving inside the house,вҖқ вҖңbehind the barnвҖқ that could not be made with such precision even if we boarded a time machine and went back to the moment of the incident. For months, people have debated by accepting narrowed base as correct, hundreds of programs have been made, arguments have taken place. By evaluating the narrowed base data, you may have prosecuted and interpreted those defendants in vain, for nothing.
There is no similar method in use anywhere in the world, no such study, academic article, or even a blog post voicing this idea. It has been used only in Turkey and, as far as I can access from open sources, in 3 cases.
Following the Narin GГјran murder, the same experts also solved the Arif MeГ§in murder, which had remained unsolved for 12 years. On a road near a small village in the Bismil district of DiyarbakДұr. Twelve years ago, was the same technology available, was there a base station there, did their locations change, how many were there? It seems no one thought to ask these questions.
If there were such a thing as вҖңnarrowed base,вҖқ for example I would like to know who killed DoДҹukan BГјyГјkДұЕҹДұk and staged it as a suicide, or Rabia Naz Vatan, who also died in very suspicious circumstances. I would kindly ask them to shed light on these murders as well so that we can see.
The third murder is the case of the Saadet Party poll watchers who were killed during the 2019 elections, which I came across in a dissenting opinion when I searched вҖңnarrowed baseвҖқ in Court of Cassation decisions. I suppose the experts have truly come to believe that location determinations can be made with this method; otherwise they could not be so conscienceless as to submit these reports in cases where concrete evidence beyond all doubt is sought and sentences as severe as life imprisonment are imposed. I will soon write this story to a few places I can reach at the Ministry of Justice; I hope that in the past six years this method, which has never existed and never can exist, has not been used frequently or taken as a basis for judgments! Otherwise, the вҖңNarrowed BaseвҖқ story will turn into a dystopian horror movie.



 Back to top

title: Analysis of Narrowed-Base Reports
text:
AUTHOR


Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i


LAST UPDATED


July 29, 2025


SOURCE


Original Source


Reading Time


~ 56 min


Word Count


9078








The Narin GГјran Murder Case: Scientific and Legal Comparison of Expert Reports

What is the aim of this study?
This report contains a scientific, impartial and fair comparison of three different reports submitted to the court in the Narin GГјran murder case (the вҖңnarrowed-baseвҖқ report dated 13 October 2024, the supplementary report dated 3 December 2024 and the expert opinion submitted in 2025 by Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i).
The analysis has been carried out according to the following criteria:

Methodology
Validity of results
Academic/technical sources relied upon
Impartiality
Legality (within the framework of the CMK)
Scientific robustness
Repeatability
Accuracy
Precision

In addition, the reports were scored out of 10.

1st Report: 13 October 2024 вҖ“ вҖңNarrowed-BaseвҖқ Analysis

A method that is not scientifically defined was used.
The method was not explained; millimetric positioning was claimed with HTS + signal strength.
Measurement data were not presented; how triangulation was performed is unclear.
The impact of mobile base stations was not indicated.
Score: 2/10



2nd Report: 3 December 2024 вҖ“ Supplementary Expert Report

Details such as the base station list, measurement tools and the use of Excel were provided.
It was stated that вҖңthere may be an error of approximately 2 meters and 1 minute.вҖқ
However, the impact of mobile bases was again ignored, and the limitations of HTS records were not discussed.
Score: 4/10



3rd Report: Expert Opinion by Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i (2025)

It scientifically demonstrated that retrospective location determination with HTS + dBm is technically impossible.
It identified base stations on site one by one and documented the impact of mobile bases.
It analyzed forensic data taken from the device and explained the methodology.
It is based on Court of Cassation case law and scientific publications.
Score: 9/10



Evaluation Summary

The вҖңnarrowed-baseвҖқ technique is not acceptable scientifically or legally.
For court decisions to rely on HTS analyses that are far from being conclusive evidence undermines the presumption of innocence.
BeЕҹikГ§iвҖҷs report is the most scientifically consistent and the most reliable in evidentiary terms.







Note



This analysis was prepared in ChatGPTвҖҷs вҖңdeep researchвҖқ mode, as a result of approximately 3 hours of uninterrupted work and source review.






The Narin GГјran Case: Scientific Evaluation of Narrowed-Base Analysis and Expert Reports

Background and Scope of Review
In the case concerning the killing of 8-year-old Narin GГјran, an expert report that claimed the defendantsвҖҷ past locations were determined point-precisely using base station signal data became one of the most critical pieces of evidence in the indictment and the courtвҖҷs judgment.
This report is the study dated 13 October 2024, known in the public as the вҖңnarrowed-base report.вҖқ At the first hearings, defense lawyers stated that the claims in this report contradicted some camera recordings; the court then decided that a supplementary expert report be obtained on 3 December 2024 in order to explain the method used, the data and the margin of error.
In addition, the reliability of the base analysis method in question was challenged by the defense, and an independent expert, Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i, conducted his own examination and submitted an expert opinion in 2025.
Within the scope of this study, the concept of вҖңnarrowed baseвҖқ will be explained scientifically, the possibilities of retrospective location determination with HTS records and signal strength data will be evaluated, and the report dated 13 October 2024, the supplementary report dated 3 December 2024 and Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§iвҖҷs expert opinion will be compared in terms of methodology, validity, impartiality, legality, scientific robustness, repeatability, accuracy and precision. The review has been conducted in a completely scientific, impartial and fair manner and is based on academic and legal sources. In the final section, the strengths and weaknesses of each report are summarized and an overall assessment is presented with a 10-point scoring.


What is the вҖңNarrowed-BaseвҖқ Concept?
Narrowed base (also referred to as вҖңnarrow area baseвҖқ) is a method that claims to determine a mobile phoneвҖҷs past location with extraordinary precision using base station data after the date of the incident. However, this term is not a known technique or technology; it has no place in the literature or in practice. Forensic digital experts familiar with the subject also heard this concept for the first time through the Narin GГјran case.
When Tuncay BeЕҹikГ§i first heard this expression, he thought it was a GPS-based system, but later saw that what was called by this name actually had no scientific basis.
In his research, he came across the use of this term in a murder case committed in 2019 in Malatya in TГјrkiye; he stated that such a technology does not exist globally, that there is no such technology defined in this way anywhere in the world and that it is technically impossible to invent such a thing.
Indeed, it emerged that the method in question was вҖңknown and applied by only one police officer from KДұrЕҹehir Provincial Security DirectorateвҖқ in the whole world, and he emphasized that this was a deception that misled the entire country.
In summary, вҖңnarrowed baseвҖқ is not a location determination technique defined or accepted by scientific criteria. The claim that it can perform pinpoint location determination retrospectively based on base station data is considered to be contrary to reality and technically impossible.
Note: A base station is a transmitter providing mobile phone communication; it covers a certain geographical area and phones in that area connect to these stations in order to receive/transmit signals. HTS (Historical Traffic Search) records are, simply, a phoneвҖҷs past call and communication records вҖ“ operator logs of who, where, when, for how long called whom or used data (the traffic data, not the content of communication).


Is Retrospective Location Determination Possible with HTS Records and Signal Strength?
In short: No, it is not. It is scientifically and technically impossible to determine a mobile phoneвҖҷs exact past location with certainty relying solely on HTS records and signal strength information (in dBm) from the base station. The reasons are as follows:
The content of HTS records is limited: HTS records show which base station the phone connected to with date-time, but this gives only the geographical location at the level of the base stationвҖҷs coverage area. In a rural area, a single base station can cover tens of square kilometers. Even in a city, the coverage radius of a base cell can be hundreds of meters. Therefore, the information in HTS that вҖңit received signal from base station XвҖқ only shows that the phone was within the coverage area of that base; it does not give its exact address or a location with a radius of a few meters. Furthermore, during a phone call, even if the phone changes base, usually only the base at the start of the call remains recorded in the HTS log.

That is, even if the person moves and switches to other bases, that single call record in HTS does not reflect the movement. Therefore, location determination based on HTS is very rough, and instant base changes cannot be tracked in HTS.
The Court of CassationвҖҷs approach on this matter is also clear: there are more than 1,100 decisions stating that HTS records, which contain only call base information without content, cannot be conclusive evidence on their own.
Ruling solely on the basis of HTS base information may violate the principle that evidence must be verifiable, conclusive and free of doubt.

Signal strength (dBm) data are not available retrospectively: The strength of the signal from the base station to the phone is generally a value between -50 dBm (very strong) and -110 dBm (very weak). However, this value fluctuates constantly, and mobile operators do not record these levels. Neither at the base stations nor in the operatorвҖҷs main system nor on the phone itself is there an archive of the signal strengths received during past calls.
Therefore, if an expert claims to compare the dBm values measured at certain points days after the incident with data from the day of the incident, know that in fact there is no вҖңsignal value from the day of the incidentвҖқ that can be compared.
Because retrospective signal strength information does not exist, it is also impossible to know to what extent measurements taken later represent similar conditions.
Signal level is highly sensitive to environmental conditions: The strength of a mobile phoneвҖҷs signal is affected by many factors such as distance to the base station, obstacles between the phone and the base (mountain, buildings, trees), weather conditions (rain, wind) and the number of devices connected simultaneously (base station load).

Even the position of the antenna in the phone, the model of the device and how the phone is held in the hand can change the signal indicator.
Therefore, different signal values can be measured at different times in the same place; and similar signal levels can be seen in different places.
Signal strength cannot be used alone as a вҖңdistance measure,вҖқ because environmental conditions are not constant. For example, similar values (such as -70 dBm) may be seen at both 100 meters and 500 meters from the base station; and the signal of a phone that remains fixed at the same point can vary Вұ5вҖ“10 dB within a few minutes. Thus, a signal strength map in a region does not leave a static and uniquely meaningful footprint.
