title: Defense by Enes GГјranвҖҷs Counsel for the Defendant
section: Law. Mustafa DEMД°R вҖӢ
text:
Law. Mustafa DEMД°R вҖӢ

The LawyerвҖҷs Relationship with the Bar Association and Evidence Obtained Unlawfully вҖӢ
First of all, we too really wanted the DiyarbakДұr Bar to be here, and our other colleagues to be here; at the outset, when we thought about this, we wondered whether it would stall the trial, cause a problem. Yes, this was not our kindness вҖ” we did not make this decision. The court appreciated it, the court gave the decision. However, we also requested flexibility from the court here. The reason was this: we thought that jurists would defend the law. We thought that at least, faced with a lawlessness they saw, they would intervene, they would state that it was unlawful. Unfortunately this did not, in part, happen. I will give a name, but not to point a target вҖ” please do not misunderstand this. Mr.В Nahit himself said: вҖңYes, the fact that these prison conversations entered the file is unlawful evidence, but if it is in the file, I will ask.вҖқ That is, it does not matter to me how a piece of unlawful evidence was obtained; if it is in the file, I will ask, he said. Foreseeing that these things would not be, we thought the presence of our colleagues would be beneficial for the file, but in the process that has unfolded we saw this was not so.


The Shepherd Ahmet Matter and the Camera Footage вҖӢ
On other matters, too, as he himself explained вҖ” this matter of shepherd Ahmet вҖ” Presiding Judge, I also explained to you: on what day did the shepherd matter come out? Exactly on the day the letter came in saying that the DARAN-360-degree rotating cameras had not taken any recording. What a coincidence. There is a great omission, a very great omission. That the shepherdвҖҷs video came out on that same day and that no agenda arose concerning why the DARAN-360 rotating cameras were not collected вҖ” the opposite: this matter was discussed. Only вҖңRamazan Atasoy was taken into custody, they interrogated Ramazan Atasoy,вҖқ the news ran that way; then the shepherd was reached. I even told some of the journalists who were here, вҖңCome, go ask the shepherd, reach him.вҖқ We do not know at all вҖ” though concerning changes in statements there is a nice thing there. I asked Erhan GГјran there: вҖңHave you ever mentioned this shepherd matter anywhere?вҖқ Because he did not understand, he said вҖңno.вҖқ Whereas he had mentioned it. On a TV channel on which he appeared before this video even came out, he had told that, under the cameras вҖ” that is, in front of his own house вҖ” he had questioned the shepherd, having become suspicious of his behavior. So it was not an unknown, concealed matter. Indeed, you yourself missed it in the hearing minutes. When I asked you, you said вҖңnoвҖқ; whereas he had told it here, he did not conceal it. Really, look вҖ” after we entered this file, we constantly asked our clients questions. Not one of them told us a single lie. Whatever we asked, they told us truly and transparently, and in the later stages we saw they always spoke the truth. This subject is the same. That is, as my colleague Fatih said at the previous session, whatever they wanted to see, that is how it was looked at. So that is what was always seen. I will support this as I go on in the later stages. Unfortunately, I will not say the DiyarbakДұr Bar, but Mr.В Nahit too, because he always wanted to look this way, saw it this way. But of course he did not go off into side roads.


The Contributions of the DiyarbakДұr Bar and Transparency вҖӢ
I know he did this truly in good faith. For example: the National Criminal issued a report. Because he knew that the translation there was not correct, he did not use it at all. Then, as we explained about the WhatsApp-call matter, about the slippage, they themselves also checked it, did not use it. Indeed they do not deny what they see. I accept this, they made a contribution. In the same respect, regarding the National CriminalвҖҷs footage, they sat down and spent time on the tractor. The DiyarbakДұr Bar really worked seriously on this file. I respect their efforts for that. They were not obliged to. They took time from their children, from their working hours, and worked on this file. That is something to respect. We too respect it. Let there be no misunderstanding. If any sharp word was exchanged at late hours, we apologize for that too вҖ” we also know how to apologize. But reciprocally. For example, you also said things that stung me. I too, in the same way, stayed until late hours. For example, I am a diabetic. Inevitably hurtful words may come out of my mouth at late hours. A colleague, Mr.В BehlГјl, even warned me: вҖңBrother, you are shouting.вҖқ I looked вҖ” truly he was right. I apologize, I said. Without realizing, it can happen, but the aim must lead us to a result. Look, our colleague Fatih tried to explain this.


The вҖңIndictment of MaybesвҖқ and the Reliability of the Records вҖӢ
There is an anomaly here. This is truly a very extraordinary file. Because it is so extraordinary, it still continues this way. We are accusing a mother of killing her own child. An elder brother in the same way. That is, these are the two fundamental things we must look at. The DiyarbakДұr Bar has a WomenвҖҷs Rights Center. Look at what kind of file this is. It began with an вҖңIndictment of Maybes.вҖқ I call it the вҖңIndictment of MaybesвҖқ because it does not say concretely вҖңit happened like this.вҖқ Many things were brought in with the perspective вҖңat most it must have happened like this.вҖқ Records. We explained a part of the records at the previous session. In the existing file, the difficulties Ms.В YГјksel, who has fallen behind because of educational inequality, experienced вҖ” thinking in Kurdish and expressing herself in Turkish вҖ” because of the interlocutorвҖҷs failure to understand her state of mind, records were kept with the interlocutorвҖҷs personal interpretations added to what was said by a person who had previously raised a disabled child, lost that child, and has serious difficulty expressing herself; and by adding further words on top of these records, the indictment was drafted. We saw it. Although the esteemed prosecutor removed parts of these, the records still form the basis of the opinion. But can this work with records? We will see. I wanted to say this. That is, if we are going to say anything about the DiyarbakДұr BarвҖҷs stance, its personality вҖ” yes, that is not our place, we know our place. I want to move on to the defense afterwards.


Criticism of the Narrowed Base-Station and the Expert Report вҖӢ
Now, what was the biggest ball-stopper of this indictment? The narrowed base station. Those who look at whether there has been anything like this in Turkey before вҖ” there are dozens of files. It was mentioned here yesterday too. The incident of Rojin KabataЕҹ is still known. It could be done there too. There is also GГјlistan Doku. That is, missing girls are not alone; there are many cases. Why is this not done in them and is done here? Because this file was not coming out; it would not come out by hand. Something had to be done вҖ” either a revelation would come, or something else would happen, or a magic wand would be waved, something had to happen and this file would come out. In the supplementary report the expert says, вҖңI did not touch this file at all.вҖқ There was no chance for anyone to touch this file. In Turkey, you are going to prepare a report concerning this file вҖ” that is, even before we, as lawyers, entered the file, when clients came, we had already heard part of it. When they came, when we met with them, we looked more closely. The bar president probably was not yet here, but, as far as I know, he was still following. Because he was bar president. At that time he should have been following; everyone followed. From the DiyarbakДұr 8th Assize Court, probably from the moment it came to them, he knows, he follows. Before even the indictment came, before even seeing, he looked вҖ” it was surely looked at, there is no chance of not having lookedвҖҰ


The Reliability and Auditability of the Expert Reports вҖӢ
There is no chance of not having heard. Indeed, you have heard Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs name. You have heard Narin GГјranвҖҷs name. I am telling these. You have heard the statements there. вҖңI did not touch this fileвҖқ вҖ” the person who says this and prepares a report in this file is not telling the truth. Let no one toy with our minds. We too know what is what. We know everything. Actually you said вҖңobjection,вҖқ about the adjudication; yes, regarding your transparency and the manner in which you conducted the hearing вҖ” it could have gone very tensely, but truly you, as a panel, and my prosecutor too, took away all the tension. Thank you. Otherwise there was an acute accumulation. For example, in the first days I could not smile at all. Yesterday I too began smiling. Hence вҖ” maybe this too would become news. вҖңTheir lawyers are laughing tooвҖқ вҖ” because even the laughter came up in this file. Unfortunately, I think people were expected, with yesterdayвҖҷs mood, to speak and then to commit suicide, I do not know вҖ” other things were expected. Now let us come to the reports. Reports are important. Are these reports? All jurists know this. There is nothing here we can call a report. A report must first of all be auditable. Let them please вҖ” to whomever in the same field of expertise вҖ” take this report; if they can audit it, I will say nothing. This report is not auditable. That is the first element an expert report must bear. It must be auditable. When we take it to an expert in the same field of specialization: вҖңLook, the data is this, come on, is this correct or not? You audit it. We are not saying anything.вҖқ We took it. None of them could audit it, because вҖңIt does not explain what was done here,вҖқ he said. It is not explained what was done. An additional report was requested. The supplementary report also did not explain anything. The man is verifying himself. вҖңI behaved so carefully, believe me,вҖқ he says. You do not say it; you prepare and send it. The people who will audit will say вҖңyes, this is obtained through reliable data in a reliable manner.вҖқ He says he did triangulation. Yesterday I mentioned вҖ” I was going to ask for something with phones.


The Triangulation Method and the Variability of Signal Strength вҖӢ
With iPhone-model phones вҖ” actually yesterday, coincidentally, I had submitted an article of a forensic-IT expert on this subject. There was a professor with a PhD, Mr.В Levent. He was in the courtroom yesterday. Because it would get late I did not take the floor, so that things could proceed healthily. I do not know whether the esteemed bar president is still cross with me regarding iPhones. He said both that the pedometer would definitely not give an error, and that errors occur in Androids. Then let me talk about iPhones. Now iPhones give this: the signal data. You enter вҖң*3001#12345#*вҖқ and press the call button and it comes to the screen, Presiding Judge. You can try it too.


The Errors of the Signal Strength and Triangulation Method вҖӢ
Now, if you look here, the signal strength constantly changes. Did you have a chance to look, I do not know. Anyone can look. In triangulation two matters are important. 1) The angle of the signal. 2) The signal strength. If, as we have said, the signal strength changes while we are standing still вҖ” yesterday Mr.В Levent gave an interview to the newspaper; coincidentally he was in DiyarbakДұr for his own hearing and also followed this hearing. Indeed we said perhaps, if he is given the floor, his knowledge on this subject could also be consulted. Though since the courts have moved to the defense phase, I do not know whether it will take an expert opinion. The signal strength, as you can see, constantly changes in the place we are standing. Triangulation, if it is a mathematical operation to this degree вҖ” for example, it goes from 87 to 93, so the oscillation there is serious; the unit is not small. Even while stationary, I do not know how it is while moving. One must try. Here it says that pinpoint shots are made with this signal strength. If this is a mathematical operation, it is a probability calculation, because we must also consider 87, and we must also consider 93. I already explained this at the previous session. A signal comes like this, in a wave pattern. That is, it is not like a laser touching a point. It is a radio frequency. We can give many examples of this. The best example is like the waves formed in water, it comes like wave after wave. The first to arrive may be 87, and then a stronger 93 may come. It is an indicator for understanding the distance to the house, but by itself it is not sufficient. The angle likewise; here with the triangulations, a pinpoint location is formed. Yes, within that area, yes. How shall I say вҖ” as Mr.В Fatih also showed yesterday with a laser on the screen, he drew a circle. вҖңWhatever happened, happened here,вҖқ he said. Yes, whatever happened, happened there, but look, within that area there are other places. Where? A place he cannot deny. His own barn.


Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Barn and the Fertilizer-Sack Evidence вҖӢ
On that day Nevzat Bahtiyar took Narin to his own barn. How do we know? We have concrete data in our hands. There is a fertilizer sack. The serial number on that fertilizer sack is sequential with the sacks that came out of his barn. So the probability that he took it from there is very high. Indeed, he too, in his first statements before the prosecutor and at the interrogation, says he went to his barn. He is compelled to say it. So in fact, many things he does not say, but in the course of time he is forced to. At the hearing too, something slipped out of his mouth.


Contradictions in Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Statements and the Vehicle Matter вҖӢ
Our colleague did not notice; perhaps if it is pressed further, I am going to ask you to watch that recording. When our Fatih asked him about the car matter, he said вҖңIt is not for that.вҖқ Please watch that. What could it have been for? Before the question even came he said, вҖңIt is not for that.вҖқ What could it have been for? Nevzat Bahtiyar never leaves his barn. That is, I am speaking according to the narrowed base station at 15:08. I am going from material truth; no one can dispute this, because he himself says it. There is supporting ancillary evidence. The sack that came out is there. The serial numbers of the sacks that came out are sequential. This is a definite thing. That is, by itself it is not evidence. This is Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs only overlapping point. That too changed, as you know. At first he said вҖңfrom car to car,вҖқ then when he came to the prosecutorвҖҷs office he said вҖңI came back with my car and went to the barnвҖқ; вҖңthe barnвҖқ then always remained. Yesterday, in fact, Mr.В Fatih made a very nice Excel table, made a table. Very sound, nice. We will submit it to you in a flash drive. If you examine it, it will be understood.


The Inconsistencies in the Narrowed Base-Station Report вҖӢ
According to the narrowed base station, after 15:08, after Nevzat Bahtiyar leaves his house, he enters neither his house nor its outbuilding. How can this be? Because, as I said, it is a probability calculation. вҖңI felt like it, so I did itвҖқ вҖ” a report prepared with this approach, and they expect us to trust this. I sent him only two messages. I said, look, there are two cameras. Your narrative does not match the cameras. I also said вҖңit is not a cornfield.вҖқ There, cotton вҖ” he replied; he does not follow, but he can reply. I sent messages. I also said this in the press. He said, вҖңI вҖ” the 1-minute вҖ” the 55 thereвҖқ вҖ” the defense side also вҖ” вҖңbecause of a 1-minute error, 55.вҖқ Do not mock our minds. The Data-Storing Capacity of Base Stations and Their Unreliability вҖӢ
Base stations are like this: вҖңI am here. Right now there is a base station near the office, probably, I am connected to it. I am connected to that base station.вҖқ A base station has a capacity. Every base station is that way. They have вҖңeyes.вҖқ There is a capacity; when the capacity is full, the base stations also connect to each other in a honeycomb system. They also know each other. They are in line. When the capacity is full, it transfers you to the second base station to which it has a connection, to which it can pass you. Even if your location does not change вҖ” this is important вҖ” you are connected to this base station; the capacity filled; you have to connect to a base station again. A communication вҖ” internet or call вҖ” connects you to the most suitable, nearest base station in the honeycomb system. So they transfer each other there. You did not move. That is, you did not change your location. Here вҖ” the things they do with base stations вҖңas if it went from here to thereвҖқ вҖ” this is not real. This data is not reliable data. A colleague said, вҖңBase stations hold something, they hold data.вҖқ Base stations cannot hold any data. By law they cannot. They also do not have a place sufficient for it. They do not have storage space. Yesterday Mr.В Mahir explained this. These вҖ” this is a stunning, dreadful knowledge. There is no data to hold this. Say they do hold it. Let us assume they hold it. Likewise, EnesвҖҷs phone is not closed at the hours of the incident вҖ” that is, small things, stones laid as stones leading to hell, are paved in front of these people. For example, what is the fire matter? I want to show a video about this. As you know, a fire started in DiyarbakДұr in June. It did not stop until ГҮДұnar. TEDAЕһ said, вҖңIt is not from us. вҖңIn the summer month, in a wind-free weather, a fire broke out,вҖқ he says. In a moment вҖ” there are 1-2 videos вҖ” a single wire, no wires at all. Because at that moment the camera also goes off. If it is opened, you will see an image from there shortly.


Finding of the Slipper and the Early Suspicion of the Family вҖӢ
The slipper incident was told вҖ” now everywhere, from everywhere, every piece of evidence was collected; into this file a sack was found and taken, a garment was found and taken, another slipper was found and taken вҖ” that is, what the gendarmerie itself found. The press said, вҖңThe gendarmerie says it.вҖқ Goodness gracious вҖ” is there anything like вҖңpotato lineвҖқ in the file? There is nothing like вҖңpotato lineвҖқ in the file. How am I to trust your impartiality?


The Partiality of the National Criminal Bureau and Cyber-Attack Allegations вҖӢ
You are not impartial, you are a party. He fabricates, for example. What does he fabricate? 46 cyber attacks. These men do not even know how to use a computer properly. Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Gendarmerie Statement and the Role of the Personnel вҖӢ
Now Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs statement is in the file. Thankfully there is a video. Thankfully there is a video. I wish all statements of all suspects or defendants had been on video like this. False Tip-Offs and Their Effect on the Family вҖӢ
That man says, вҖңWere there false tip-offs?вҖқ вҖңYes, there were,вҖқ he says. вҖңThey came from TikTok.вҖқ He was going to attribute it to that вҖ” вҖңwe could not find her because false tip-offs were coming.вҖқ вҖңWas the family doing this?вҖқ he asks. вҖңNo,вҖқ he says, вҖңthey were coming to the family.вҖқ вҖңFalse tip-offs came from TikTok,вҖқ he says. вҖңFalse tip-offs were coming to the family.вҖқ For example, he says, вҖңShe is here; the family was going there, they could not find her there.вҖқ So at least the family told this, because in the searches вҖ” he is there too вҖ” tip-offs were coming to the family from everywhere. For that reason the time difference is misinterpreted. The friends actually prepared about this. They will talk only about the false news. Regarding the false news that came out, tip-offs came to the family constantly вҖ” not to one person but to all members of the family. вҖңLook, we saw someone here; it may be connected with that.вҖқ But they do this вҖ” perhaps they are also making a mistake вҖ” they go to the gendarmerie and say вҖңSuch a thing came, for your information.вҖқ We go there; for the first few, the gendarmerie goes with them; then the gendarmerie does not go anymore. вҖңGo look,вҖқ it says. вҖңIf there is something, we will come.вҖқ So here, to people who are attacking left and right, calling like crazy, they later say вҖңyou are wasting our time.вҖқ What can they do? When a person does not know, the things he does will unfortunately not be on the side that obtains results. Like in that вҖ” like in the faith-healer matter.

Yes, it was visited; there is a record. Was only one faith-healer visited? There is also a faith-healer brought by the gendarmerie. We cannot tell it now because there is no record of it. Is this BirsenвҖҷs word? Look, we saw it in NevzatвҖҷs statement. If only his footage had also existed, if only his footage had existed. Now they say there is a CMK attorney. In the presence of the attorney, NevzatвҖҷs attorney is also there. Things not NevzatвҖҷs statement passed вҖ” on camera вҖ” we all see. Now where did Birsen do the coding from? Many children come and go to BirsenвҖҷs house. Birsen does not know вҖ” she said at the hearing too. She did not know they went to the mosque. How did we combine this piece? We talked with her. She said at the hearing too. Afterwards, the Еһeyma Kaya grape-picking matter. We fully understood. When Narin came, Birsen says, вҖңHatice and Fatma went to the grandmothers.вҖқ Their grandmothers are on the side of those Еһeymas next to the mosque. Narin goes there. When Narin went there, she waits directly; the girls are ashamed to go in or whatever. Еһeyma Kaya sees her there. They are picking grape leaves there. She gives her a grape. There is also such a way to read these pieces, but people did not prefer to read. вҖңSince you researched so well, 1,700 personnel, says 17:40вҖқ вҖ” a program too, he says. Let me open it: what hour is that program? Also look; we opened it and looked; you look too. Such a sensitive file, look. The piece fits. She directly says she was too shy to enter the mosque. The mosque imam says, вҖңI saw, I called. She was in front of the door with the other children, I called, she came.вҖқ This piece also fits. She was already late getting into the mosque. We said, вҖңWhat could this 17:40 matter be?вҖқ Yes, exactly from BirsenвҖҷs phone her mother talked. She talked with her aunt. There is also a phone-screen image. BirsenвҖҷs HTS, at no. 103, registered to Taner MehmetoДҹlu, on the phone, on August 21 at 17:40. Let me show exactly.


Ms.В MaЕҹallahвҖҷs Phone Call and the Confirmation of Time Coding вҖӢ
No, I had not submitted this. That one вҖ” Ms.В MaЕҹallahвҖҷs HTS was shown. Ms.В MaЕҹallahвҖҷs is not there either. The phone number belongs to Birsen. Ms.В MaЕҹallah speaks via BirsenвҖҷs phone. I do not know the kinship relations вҖ” her husbandвҖҷs sibling was what? Sister-in-law. His gГ¶rГјmce (husbandвҖҷs sister), right? No, no. MaЕҹallahвҖҷs gГ¶rГјmce. She is her gГ¶rГјmce; with her gГ¶rГјmce she talks at 17:40. So there is a conversation. The coding was done this way. вҖңMom was talking on the phone.вҖқ That is, such a sharp time interval is given. вҖңThis sharpness вҖ” how can it be?вҖқ we too said. She is talking on the phone, there is even a screen image. They did not delete the phone, they sent it to us. We will submit that too in the thing, but because this is HTS it is more reliable. Since they can play with the data, with everything вҖ” how does this family вҖ” I do not know. They did not even know their own pedometerвҖҰ


The Reliability of the National Criminal Bureau Reports вҖӢ
Now the National Criminal BureauвҖҷs reports. Are these reports? Since it is mentioned in the opinion I must touch on it. The DiyarbakДұr Bar really, as I said, I respect their work. The juristry вҖ” at least when they see something, saying вҖңthis is wrong,вҖқ is there. They already say it. They did not say anything about this, because they too can quite clearly see and discern what is real and what is not. I thank them for their such contributions to the adjudication. Now, in the conversations there, the word вҖңprosecutorвҖқ definitely does not pass. It did not take most of the words that pass. What we could hear, but as I said, that conversation has no integrity of meaning. Besides, in our opinion that evidence is unlawful evidence. How it was obtained is not clear. It was not obtained in a manner in accordance with the law. For this reason, in our opinion, it should [be removed] from among the file; we had objected. We do not know how this came. How can these documents be obtained? Because that camera recording is at the chief public prosecutorвҖҷs office. Only in the file that is closed to us. It came from there. We do not accept it.


The Pixel Shifts and Time Differences in the Footage вҖӢ
Again about the footage вҖ” yesterday my colleague told, there is a story with a slope. That is very important. That the slope there, because of the camera angle, is not understood and has been accepted as flat вҖ” as if. Pixel shift, that is, we took the footage. We understood it would not be here. We spoke with many people; we understood it would not be here. My colleague told; Mr.В Tuncay вҖ” we partly sent to abroad, we are waiting. Even if it comes after the hearing, perhaps it will make a contribution to the material truth. There вҖ” pixel shift вҖ” when I took the footage and sent it to the family, excitedly to me, вҖңLook, Nevzat is taking here. Look, Nevzat is taking here.вҖқ I said, вҖңWhat you see as these dark spots, I see everywhere. If I go out with this, I will look ridiculous. I will not go out anywhere with this,вҖқ I said. That is, the road cannot be walked with this. This does not happen this way, I said. I did not take it into account at all, but the National Criminal вҖ” that could not distinguish between a tractor and a car, between blue and red вҖ” where it could not distinguish, could distinguish Narin. What kind of eyes he has. We already said it is a very dubious place. We also objected. For that reason also вҖ” there is a timing matter, Presiding Judge. In your letter we knew 6 minutes; you said 6 minutes 45 seconds. Probably a letter came regarding this.


The Place Narin Was Last Seen and Time Contradictions вҖӢ
Now we know the place where Narin was last seen. The school camera says at 15:11:15, she left. вҖңShe was last seen at 14:00.вҖқ According to the work done by the Criminal himself, 15:11:14 is the last sight of the tip of her foot. On the tenth page, on the twelfth page, we will take 6 minutes 45 seconds back from this recording. 15:18:49; when we go back 6 minutes, 15:12:04. Exactly 50 seconds have passed. 50 seconds вҖ” from in front of the school, that is, from the place she was last seen across the way, to what he calls the barn вҖ” 50 seconds. He teleports her. That darkness вҖ” that is, Narin вҖ” stands there. We submitted the drone footage too. Most of the journalists went there too. 50 seconds, even a child running cannot climb there. They cannot climb that slope in 50 seconds. How will she climb? Here, in 50 seconds in front of the barn. And not at the house. The darkness goes to in front of the barn, because for what? Public opinion was expecting something here. What? вҖңLet these be guilty, let them get the punishmentвҖқ вҖ” there was such a situation. They too, as I said вҖ” I said something bold, вҖңwe took the file at once, we will solve this businessвҖқ вҖ” immediately made an explanation. вҖңEveryone will see soon,вҖқ something like that he said, shared; we saw. He вҖңsolvedвҖқ so many things. These pixel shifts, as I said, are everywhere. We cannot take this into consideration. Something that is not possible time-wise. He is trying to feed us as if it is possible. If only you had not had the second report taken from there. We already objected. We had requested the rejection of the expert. Before it could be done, the report came. It does not matter. It did not come, right, Presiding Judge? вҖ” regarding the mobile base stations?


New Evidence Concerning Mr.В Salim and the Violation of Legal Principles вҖӢ
Now three new concrete pieces of evidence have emerged concerning Mr.В Salim. In my view three very important pieces of evidence. The bank receipt, the pedometer, and also the vehicle that was there at night вҖ” Mr.В Onur played it, actually, unfortunately here because there was not a great silence it was not understood well. I too listened very carefully; footsteps come, and underneath, either a little girlвҖҷs or a little childвҖҷs voice comes toward the end of the conversation. The 22:41 conversation. The car at exactly that moment вҖ” indeed news was made about it вҖ” the car is in motion at that moment. Footsteps come. Clear. Even вҖ” when I played the conversation that was made with that person to the family, HacДұ Kaya, someone, I think, who was with him during the conversation he made in Istanbul, he remembered the conversation. He said, вҖңI was with him. We вҖ” from in front of the school, in fact,вҖқ he says, вҖңjust before that, from in front of the school we were going toward the fountain,вҖқ he said. вҖңVery nice,вҖқ I said. вҖңLet us come to the school camera, we will find it.вҖқ But SalimвҖҷs footage at those hours in the village, inside the village, the school camera was not taken at those hours. We requested, it did not come. Those hours are not there. There is nothing in his favor, but what about the family? As I said, a salad was made, everything thrown in, stirred. With information pollution, вҖңexplain these.вҖқ Now, in our criminal adjudication, a person has to prove their own innocence. That is, we say to a person about something not done вҖңyou did this. Prove you did not do it.вҖқ Right now, at this stage. вҖңProve that you did not.вҖқ How much does this comply with the fundamental principles of criminal law? When we look at the indictment, everyone said this: joint perpetration. We are all jurists, we all understand what we read. Please, let us defend the law that I say. From here joint perpetration does not come out, because there is no sentence explaining which perpetrator did which act, how dominion was established over which act, how the intent of participation was put forward. What I cannot understand вҖ” вҖңhe says somethingвҖқ; there are strange things in the opinion. That is, in the indictment, and in its continuation in the opinion, I cannot understand these. These seem strange to me. That means they have a finger in everything. How lucky вҖ” somehow it can be explained; something comes out. Perhaps if we had more time, what things would come out вҖ” but look, truly it must be taken seriously and examined, studied. We have concern, because there is a dreadful pressure. No one is given the opportunity to know and tell the truth. Jurists, as I said, come out or forensic medics come out; when they tell the truth, they are subjected to a lynching. вҖңSo you became a GГјran-supporter.вҖқ Society has such a mass, ready to divide. Why? Because people bought a story. In this story this family was to be guilty. Those who played on this and the journalists who became very popular thanks to this, the вҖңdoyenвҖқ journalists, people whose name, fame, title was unknown on social media, became known. Like this, he is now consulted. вҖңThat person can say something on that subjectвҖқ вҖ” people who would never reach him began to reach him and get his opinion. So, abnormal. In 3 days the names of most of these will be forgotten. Presiding Judge, with your permission.


Those Playing a Role in the Case and the Rejection of New Evidence вҖӢ
Some of the people, as I said, determined a role for themselves here. They played on this. Although they see some truths, so that the resistance will not be broken, they impose other ideas. What are these? A payment receipt came from a bank. Immediately the man stands up and refutes this. вҖңWhere did he go to the bank?вҖқ Good, but who says he went to the bank? Automatic payment. The man already says вҖңI am at home.вҖқ вҖңIt is an automatic payment.вҖқ The court will prove this. Leave it, вҖңthis is immediately not so,вҖқ because in his own mind he has bought a ticket: вҖңdefinitely these must be guilty.вҖқ Because otherwise he himself will lose all prestige. Perhaps he will not have any reputation.


Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷs Detention and Journalism вҖӢ
Unfortunately, as I mentioned a moment ago, there is a journalist who is the reason for Ramazan AtasoyвҖҷs detention in this country. He still continues his journalism. He does not come out and say, вҖңI conveyed wrongly.вҖқ Look, everyone knows that the translation there is a joke. That child is in detention because of a wrong translation. That it is wrong is documented, stands in the file. The prosecutorвҖҷs office also knows, but what did he say? вҖңThat joke of the child belongs to youвҖқ was said. Very clear. It is very clear that it is a joke. Again the childвҖҷs вҖңI will turn around and lookвҖқ вҖ” in Kurdish вҖңI will turn around and lookвҖқ вҖ” was called вҖңвҖҳshe has not died yet.вҖҷвҖқ Indeed вҖңthe girl has not died yetвҖқ was said. That journalist also added the word вҖңgirl.вҖқ That is not in the translation. In the wrong translation вҖ” the gendarmerieвҖҷs wrong translation вҖ” the gendarmerie says, вҖңLook, the first translation may be this thing. вҖҳShe has not finished yet.вҖҷ The second meaning may be вҖҳshe has not died yet.вҖҷвҖқ He stood up; by divorcing it from its context, while the indictment was being drafted, he said, вҖңwords have been added to some records.вҖқ My prosecutor removed those words, thank you. For example, in the records there was something like YГјksel GГјran was вҖңas if certainвҖқ her daughter had died; those parts вҖ” вҖңit was as if definitely certainвҖқ вҖ” you have removed. In the records words added not present in the record вҖ” there are many such things, now we have seen this. At 14 years old, at least for him, for the GГјrans вҖ” this child has no connection with the GГјrans. We are not his lawyer either, but I see, my conscience aches. Simply because of a wrong translation, a laborer, a poor child, is still in detention. The child is a child. The child, a child. On the first day he came here, we all saw his fear in his eyes. In AGO he said, вҖңIf I knew something I would tell,вҖқ but as I said, if he came into contact, вҖңhe can be detained because of these people, can receive the heaviest punishmentвҖқ is the perception. Because вҖ” вҖңwhy did he form a sentence that could protect Salim to his own interest? How can he form it? He should not form it either, he should accuse. This way Salim should receive the punishment.вҖқ EveryoneвҖҷs perception, viewpoint was this. The child is still a hostage, I think. Why is our file not opened? Why does it not go together? So much time has passed; there is no evidence collected. No action is taken. We make requests; our requests are not even processed. Can there be such a thing? Can there be such a thing? What shall we do? That is, shall we not appear on the media or go into the field? Nothing is left we can do from our hand. As I said, a design was created. At least can we break it вҖ” how shall we break it? Let me say it too, let us give the correct documents, narrate to people through documents: вҖңLook, it is not like this.вҖқ


The DNA on the Carpets and the GendarmerieвҖҷs Procedures вҖӢ
Carpets were mentioned вҖ” вҖңthere is DNA on the carpets.вҖқ Let me say: how healthily were those examinations done? Which work done by the gendarmerie was done healthily? I claim that too was unhealthy, not done properly. On carpets there is hair and other things too. Only with a blue light they looked, because they were searching for something like blood or cadaveric fluid вҖ” there is no other DNA. They clung to something, clung to a possibility. вҖңIf the girl, as he says, cadaveric fluid came from her mouth, we carried out the examination this way,вҖқ they said. But there is DNA. There are other DNAs. I claim there are others beyond what there is. вҖңNo, the carpets were washed, thatвҖҷs why there is nothing.вҖқ How? вҖңNo DNA at allвҖқ? Well, who told the press this? Again, the gendarmerie. I claim they told it. They said, вҖңThere is such a thing.вҖқ Now he will say вҖңthere is noneвҖқ вҖ” at the investigation stage, the prosecutorвҖҷs office did not leak. The CMK attorneys вҖ” Mr.В Nahit, our president, explains. вҖңHe instructed them all. All were marked.вҖқ No leak from our DiyarbakДұr Bar attorneys вҖ” so from whom then was it leaked? Let us not forget, there is even a photograph of Ms.В YГјksel with handcuffed hands while in the interrogation. There is one of her coming before the judge with handcuffs. There are photographs, in the press. What shall we explain further? To whom shall we say what? For days, for hours, we explain these. We try to explain these, but it does not work.


Contradictions in Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs Description of the House and Misinterpretations вҖӢ
We have photographs of the house. We asked him. вҖңWhich room did you enter?вҖқ вҖңOn the left,вҖқ he said at first. вҖңHe said left, but I do not know what is in the room,вҖқ he said. We submitted the footage. The expert, in the narrowed base station, says вҖңempty room.вҖқ There is no such thing as вҖңempty room.вҖқ In the house all rooms are full. The gendarmerie also knows. There are photographs of a part. Where might вҖңempty roomвҖқ be? Where? I am saying. We said it is a wrong probability calculation. With a wrong probability calculation they proceed. Nevzat Bahtiyar went out, took the girl. He put her in his own barn. This region вҖ” as Fatih showed yesterday, there is that regional thing вҖ” we can interpret it as we wish. Yes, in triangulation, in that region a place appears; we could interpret it as we wish. Regarding joint perpetration вҖ” fine, ultimately think, you have taken a mother, detained her. Afterwards, saying вҖңsorryвҖқ is probably not easy either. вҖңConcrete, strong evidenceвҖқ вҖ” but what would have been necessary was, there must be such strong evidence. Then we too should have said, вҖңFine, ultimately there is something in the middleвҖқ вҖ” but no, there is not in the file.


Social Perception and Historical Examples of Unlawful Decisions вҖӢ
But unfortunately this happened. In peopleвҖҷs perception вҖ” вҖңif she has been detained, there must be something.вҖқ People looked at it this way. вҖңIf there is nothing, she is not detained either.вҖқ Probably cause and effect here went otherwise than should be. Unfortunately it was said, вҖңIf someone is in detention, he has a connection with the offense.вҖқ Whereas it is not so. Look at the file, we see the file. As I said, we looked at all the evidence one by one. Regarding the mother, in the opinion already вҖ” Mr.В YДұlmaz even shared; my prosecutor said, вҖңThis is not ethical.вҖқ Fine, whether it is ethical is debatable; I cannot directly say вҖңit is ethicalвҖқ either, in order to protect my colleague, but this file, as I said, proceeds by perceptions, unfortunately. Because it proceeds by perceptions, let us not treat it as normal, standard routine. People must first digest something. In many countries of the world unlawful decisions were previously given. We know the Central Park incident. In New York, the African-American boys had no connection; on society a perception of lynching was created. Indeed, the then-American President Donald Trump even started an execution campaign. He spent serious money on this matter. Something is known: later these boys were understood to be innocent. With DNA, an informant confessed his own crime. Again in France there is a similar woman found in a lake. Because of her the family is accused. There were incidents of suicide. That is why I say, here, to a very great decision вҖ” will it be today, will it be tomorrow вҖ” I no longer know; a decision will be given. All вҖ” God willing, let us see вҖ” followed by all of Turkey, something that will pass to history as a stamp will occur.


The Request for Acquittal for Enes GГјran вҖӢ
I can say this in this case. Look. I am truly proud of defending my own clients, of being in this case. God willing, I was able to carry this out sufficiently worthily. Finally, regarding the file вҖ” yes, there is much we can tell. We have partly submitted it in writing. We previously told at the last session. Let me not repeat. My colleagues will also tell. I have tired you very much. Thank you for patiently listening. I thank you separately for your patience during the adjudication process. When the whole file is evaluated, there is no evidence sufficient to accuse my client Enes GГјran. By the principle that the defendant benefits from doubt вҖ” probably it will be so, because too much doubt was created, unfortunately; also, a respected journalist of ours coined the phrase вҖңsuspect inflationвҖқ in this file. Truly a very nice phrase. In this file there was suspect inflation. Everyone became a suspect. I request that the acquittal of the client be decided in accordance with the principle of in dubio pro reo.

title: Defense by Enes GГјranвҖҷs Counsel for the Defendant
section: Law. Recep KIZILOK вҖӢ
text:
Law. Recep KIZILOK вҖӢ

Opening Statement and General Objection вҖӢ
I will not speak at length. My colleagues have already explained everything. We do not concur with the prosecutionвҖҷs opinion on the merits. Our colleagues have already explained it in detail. The purpose of the legal system is to establish the material facts in a manner that leaves no room for doubt. There is no concrete evidence in the prosecutionвҖҷs opinion. Whatever is present is, I believe, based on interpretations. I will review the opinion in general terms.


The Slipper Matter of Muhammed Kaya вҖӢ
Now, regarding Muhammed Kaya and the slipper. Muhammed Kaya finds a slipper and places it in his vehicle. Later, Osman GГјran, thinking it might belong to Narin, notifies the family and then the law-enforcement units. When it is established that it does not belong to Narin, they construct a rationale about the law-enforcement units being misdirected. How, in your view, can law-enforcement units be misdirected? I also think about this вҖ” there is no question of misdirection here. Nor is there anything related to a material fact. For that reason it is not something particularly to be taken into account. It is also not a matter imputed to my client.


The Power Lines and the Fire Allegation вҖӢ
The second matter is the power lines. A fire breaks out as a result of the power lines contacting each other. It is rationalized that this was done by the family in an organized manner to shield the culprit. I particularly wish to state this: did the family decide to set the village on fire so that the gendarmerie, who were about to find NarinвҖҷs body in the stream, would not find it? When you think logically, my mind cannot grasp it. How are these situations linked to this offense? I consider this to be entirely assumption, interpretation, and imagination.


The Village Where Narin Disappeared and Kinship Ties вҖӢ
Thus, the third matter. We see in the opinion that because most people in the village where Narin disappeared are relatives, because vehicles of outsiders do not enter, and because she disappeared in a place very close to the home, it is concluded that the family did this and that the family hid it in an organized manner. Yet when we truly think about it, as jurists we must establish the material truth through concrete data. Not through assumption and interpretation. Here there is entirely assumption and interpretation. There is no material fact. The concept of вҖңfamilyвҖқ also means mother, father, and sibling. Who is meant by вҖңfamilyвҖқ here? We must also consider this.


The Bruise on EnesвҖҷs Eye and the Bite Mark вҖӢ
The bruise on my client EnesвҖҷs eye, and also a bite mark. This matter has been much discussed. Perhaps one of the circumstances causing him to be tried here today is the forensic medicine report. There is nothing adverse. At the previous hearing several witnesses were heard, and these witnesses declared that on the day of the incident they did not see anything about a tooth mark on Enes or a bruise on his eye. That is, there is no imputation, no offense, and despite this a scenario is developed. And my client is accused regarding this.


The ClientвҖҷs Statements and Request for Release вҖӢ
The statements my client gave both at the law-enforcement level and before the judicial authorities are entirely sincere and realistic. It is quite normal for him to be mistaken about the time. My colleague showed a photograph. You saw how he collapsed at that moment; a person in that psychological state can also make mistakes about the time and can forget things. I consider that to be a normal situation. For these reasons, there is no concrete evidence of the offenses imputed to my client. All of it is assumption. He has been in custody for a long time. My client has not even seen his sisterвҖҷs body or her grave. I particularly request that he be tried without detention, that if your court is of a different view at this stage, he be released subject to one or more judicial control conditions, that he be acquitted of the prosecutionвҖҷs opinion, and that if your court is of a different view, the provisions most favorable to him be applied.
