Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : And Arif GГјran did not know either, is that so?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then let me ask these and move to other matters. Now, in SalimвҖҷs statements вҖ” in his first statements вҖ” he claims he was doing field work, then went home, that he was not at the locations in question. Later, after this incident, he again goes to the field. Do you know what Salim did after this incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : What did you do after you left the body in the field?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : After leaving it, I went to my sister-in-lawвҖҷs house.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You went to your sister-in-law ZeynepвҖҷs house, okay.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : She had prepared cheese for us; I took the cheese and went home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now Nevzat, the matters you describe вҖ” to find the right phrasingвҖҰ you are describing them very coolly. Now you say you saw a corpse for the first time in your life, correct? You say, вҖңI saw the body, I did not know what to do, therefore I could not dismember it,вҖқ but after leaving the body there, you continue your life as if nothing had happened.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : These two are very difficult. Are you seeing a corpse for the first time in your life?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You have the right not to answer this question вҖ” have you ever killed someone before in your life?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You saw a corpse for the first time in your life, you disposed of that corpse, and then, as if nothing had happened, you went to get cheese from your sister-in-law, is that so?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I am asking repeatedly because we are extracting words with tweezers; since we are extracting words with tweezers, so that they are properly recorded in the minutes. Friends, pay attention to the questions I ask so that you too may ask the same questions вҖ” it is your right вҖ” but as far as possible when asking the same question, please be mindful of this. Apart from вҖңthrow it into the stream, dismember it,вҖқ did you have any other meeting or conversation with Salim, did you provide him with any information at all?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Until you yourself sought effective remorse вҖ” rather, let us not call this effective remorse вҖ” until you confessed, you did not speak with anyone on this matter, is that so?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : That is so.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You decided by yourself to confess as well, is that so? Why did you confess?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My conscience.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In any case, let us say your conscience did not accept. We do not know what Salim did with the blanket. No message came to you in prison; like вҖңaccept the murder, change your statements,вҖқ there was no such message, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Your brother said on this matter, вҖңA message was sent to my elder brother by Ali RДұza; let Nevzat accept all the blame, we will give him a car and a field.вҖқ Did such a request come to you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It did.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You said no.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, now an offer came вҖ” my brother said there is such an offer вҖ” but they did not come and tell me.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I see, so no one came and made such an offer to you, but your brother came and said вҖңBrother, there is such an offer.вҖқ Then did any message come to you from your spouse?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : None came.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You have the right not to answer this question; Arif GГјran alleges that Salim had a relationship with your spouse. There is such a press statement. There are also some reports that you are slandering. Is such a thing true?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not say such a thing; I did not see it with my own eyes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You do not know. Are you slandering the Arif GГјran family, Salim, or the GГјran family?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Is there any enmity between you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : They say this: In the objection to detention by Salim GГјranвҖҷs attorney, there is the following claim: вҖңNevzat was giving money; again on the day of the incident he gave money to Narin; he accustomed Narin to himself and on the day of the incident he killed Narin; he had been planning this 3вҖ“4 days in advance. For this reason he was giving money to the children.вҖқ What do you say about this allegation?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Were you giving money to the child?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I did not.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Again, the defense attorneys of the defendants say that after leaving school, for Narin to go to her own house she had to pass in front of your house or in front of your barn; is that correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It is a bit farther; there is a distance of 30вҖ“40 meters.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So after passing that path, in order for her to reach her own house, does she need to pass in front of your house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Even if she passed from another place, then it would be very far. The nearest вҖ” that is, the distance is there; she passed from there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Well then, were you under any plan at that time; now, let me say this вҖ” I am speaking of the objections in the objection petition of the defendantsвҖҷ counsel; this is not the courtвҖҷs acceptance. Let there be no misunderstanding on this matter; I am reading the objection petition in the detention objection of the defendantsвҖҷ counsel, okay? Now they claim this: that your mother heard that all the men of the GГјran family were out of the village to distribute invitations, that your mother heard this and told you, and upon this you made a plan to kill Narin; on the day of the incident you waited for Narin in front of the house, when Narin arrived you took her and killed her.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It is not true.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Do you have any enmity with the GГјran family?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Are you their worker?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Are you someone engaged in plastering work in the village; do you do it in the village or in the city?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do it in villages.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Do you work in the GГјran familyвҖҷs field?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then there are contradictions among your statements. Is the statement you have given here in court of your own free will to our court correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : These are the clearest statements you have given, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In the statements you gave to the prosecutorвҖҷs office you told different things because you were afraid, is that so? Salim gave you the slippers, is that so?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Did he say anything while giving the slippers?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, he did not say anything.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In the sense of вҖңTake these, conceal the evidence,вҖқ is that so?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I took them and put them in the sack.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Is there anything else we did not ask or forgot? Let us look at our notes; Mr.В Prosecutor, do you have anything to ask?вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Trial Prosecutor вҖӢ
text:
Trial Prosecutor вҖӢ

Trial Prosecutor : We have questions to ask. Nevzat Bahtiyar, just now in your statement before the court you said that Salim frightened you with a firearm.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Between 15:27 and 15:35 on the day of the incident, the four of you are in the same place; I am referring to our own base station data. Was it during this period that he threatened you? Did he have a firearm with him? Where did this threat with the firearm occur?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : He had a firearm with him; he drew it.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : What did he do after drawing it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : He threatened me with the firearm: вҖңYou will dispose of this corpse; otherwise I will take your son and then call you, and in front of your eyes I will shoot him in the head. Then I will shoot you in the head.вҖқ He made such a threat to me; I was compelled.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So he did this with the firearm he had with him?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Mr.В Prosecutor, my apologies. Then according to your allegation Salim sees Enes during a sexual intercourse; therefore, what was SalimвҖҷs attire at that time?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Was it clothing hastily put on?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Was there any sweat due to the incident or anything that caught your attention?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not pay any attention.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Was he as composed as you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : In the WhatsApp logs retrieved for Salim GГјran there is a 41-second call from you at 17:46; 9779 is your number, is it not? There is a 41-second call from this number; I am speaking of 17:46. You took her to the stream and handled the matter, did you not? What did you discuss in this call?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not speak at all.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : There is a 41-second call.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not speak at all.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Okay, at 22:44 in the evening Salim goes to the place where our girl NarinвҖҷs lifeless body was found, by giving some information and from the camera footage. You mention a single stone or 2вҖ“3 stones, correct? There are additional twigs and brush left on the body; could Salim GГјran have done this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have no idea; I did not see.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why did you call on WhatsApp? I am missing that.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not call anyone.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You use the number the prosecutor mentioned, do you not?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Normally I called him once.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In the information provided, in the WhatsApp history it has been determined that you called Salim at 17:46 at the time in question.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I never called; I do not know.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : At that time had you gone to your sister-in-law for cheese?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was in ГҮarДұklДұ at 17:30.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : On the day of the incident, you say again that you carried Narin in your arms to the stream, correct? Into a sack, you put her into the sack, you did not tie the mouth of the sack with a rope. You walked toward the stream. In August, in the heat of August, you walked toward the stream. A 25-kilogram girl вҖ” were you alone?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was alone.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Salim was not with you; you walked. You looked for a rope; where did you find a rope there?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I had cut the strap of the bag; I tied it with that.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : How did you trust going without taking a rope? Where would you find a rope there among the stones and gravel?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : At that moment a rope did not cross my mind at all.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Yes, Mr.В Nahit, please.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: DiyarbakДұr Bar Association вҖӢ
text:
DiyarbakДұr Bar Association вҖӢ

Law. Nahit Eren вҖӢ

Law. Nahit Eren : If we could have silenceвҖҰвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Yes, silence please. Could everyone be seated?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Your Honor, before moving to the question, of course we are discussing evidence here. I will say only one sentence. First of all, your decision to accept the DiyarbakДұr Bar AssociationвҖҷs request to join was meaningful and valuable for this case file. We have been following the case file since the first day. And today, all of us have taken our place in this trial to bring out the material truth. I will begin asking my questions to Nevzat. Nevzat, how long have you known Salim?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : WellвҖҰ 30 years, there are 30 years. It may be more because we have been together since childhood.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You were very close friends.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes, correct.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You meet constantly.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Constantly вҖ” that is, not constantly. I meanвҖҰ when we had time he would call me, I would call him. We would go to the coffeehouse.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : For example, where would you meet?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Mostly вҖ” that is, we would meet at the coffeehouse. I mean we would also meet in the village.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Would you come together in the village and walk on those paths?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I mean we would make tea and drink it. That is, we would sit.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you ever go to his house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have gone.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you enter the house and be a guest?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have been a guest.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you go any time close to the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You did not.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : We went once. ThereвҖҰ Not on the second day of the incident. I went up. The Gendarmerie was there. LikeвҖҰ I stayed for 15вҖ“20 minutes and went down.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Alright, let us come to the day of the incident. You said you called Salim at eight past three (15:08) on the day of the incident.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Do you remember the sentences you spoke when you called Salim?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Do you remember what you discussed?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : What we discussed вҖ” I told him to check the water. He said, вҖңAlright, I will call the team. Let the team come and check.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Was it your houseвҖҷs water that was not running?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes. Water was not running in our house.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Well, did you make any request to the municipality about this in any way?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have no knowledge.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : In the municipalityвҖҷs determination reflected in the file there is a minute stating there was no water malfunction at your house. Are you aware of this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have no knowledge.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Alright, you spoke at 15:08. After you spoke, can you fully describe the direction for us? Your direction of going. You said you went to water the trees.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Where did you water the trees?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : In the courtyard.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You watered in the courtyard in front of where your house is located?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How many minutes did the watering take?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : From where did you bring the water?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : From my motherвҖҷs.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Was the hose attached?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The hose was attached.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : What distance? Between your house and your motherвҖҷs?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : About 20 meters.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : From there to your house there is a hose connected.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes. I had connected it. IвҖҰ As I was coming I connected it. I thought I would water the trees a bit.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Could you tell again how many minutes you watered?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You do not remember. In her statement to the prosecutor, your spouse Gazal says that you called Nevzat вҖ” pardon, that you called Salim. Then she says you left the house. He was actually going to water the trees but he did not water the trees.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes, there are no trees. I was in the backyard at that time. I had really gone there to the backyard a bit. I was there.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : The trees in front of the house, or the ones behind the house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The back. The ones at the back. I was there. She did not see me.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Alright. You called Nevzat вҖ” pardon, you called Salim. Salim told you these things. After you talked with Salim, did you go toward ArifвҖҷs house or toward SalimвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I went toward ArifвҖҷs house.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You went toward ArifвҖҷs house. The HTS records say you went toward between ArifвҖҷs and SalimвҖҷs houses.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I did not go that way.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You did not go toward SalimвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Well, the first time you went, how long did Salim have contact with you outside?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Since you spoke with Salim on the phone that day, did you have any intention to come together as usual in the friendship you had, knowing he was at home?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did he come to the garden and call you from above?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Can you tell us how many minutes after the minute you spoke?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You do not remember.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : For example, can you say this? I watered such-and-such number of trees or such-and-such an area of vegetables, I changed the water this many times. This would take 2вҖ“3 minutes; then Salim called me вҖ” can you say that?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I cannot.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You cannot. Then did you head directly to the house? Did you head directly to SalimвҖҷs house? What did he say to you outside such that you headed to SalimвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : HeвҖҰвҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : I am asking about the first contact. You say he called out to you. You went. Salim is standing in front of ArifвҖҷs house. You made contact with Salim. What did Salim say to you at the first moment? The first moment. Did you greet each other, for example?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : What did he say to you? Well, you are talking about a 30-year friendship. Regarding entering inside, entering together with Salim вҖ” because Arif has a statement: he said Nevzat had never in his life entered ArifвҖҷs house. Have you ever previously entered ArifвҖҷs house in your life? Unrelated to this incident.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I have gone once.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : When?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Do you not remember why you went? For example, the year.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember. I went once but I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You went; Salim is there. You made contact. Without saying what he said, you headed toward the house.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : After I went there I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : I am not asking about Narin. From the moment you made contact with Salim, I am talking about the time until you entered the house. You did not speak; he said вҖңLet us enter the house.вҖқ You entered together without questioning anything?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You entered the house. Were there shoes in front of the door?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Were there old shoes? I will ask shortly so let me ask now. You took the slippers from in front of the door and put them into the blanket вҖ” when you took them, were there other shoes?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Were there old ones? That is, in front of the door was there an arrangement of shoes that would show us a crowd inside the house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В It did not catch my attention.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Do you not remember? Think, think. Bring that moment to your mindвҖҷs eye.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I am thinking.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : What is the distance between SalimвҖҷs house and ArifвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know that much.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : But we can see SalimвҖҷs house quite easily from ArifвҖҷs house, right?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Was there a vehicle in front of the house? Was there a vehicle?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not look that way at all. That is, it did not catch my attention.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : But when you walk, when you go to SalimвҖҷs door area, when you go toward ArifвҖҷs house, you see SalimвҖҷs house. A vehicle is a big thing. Something all of us would see. You did not see a vehicle there. A white vehicle belonging to Fuat.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not see. I did not see at all.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You did not see.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not see.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Well, did you see any of SalimвҖҷs children, his daughters, at that time?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I did not see. There was no one at that time.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Even if there was, I did not see.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You entered inside.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How many minutes did you stay inside?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : For example, you say вҖңWe entered insideвҖқ; you tell me all the doors were closed. He took us to a room. You said NarinвҖҷs lifeless body was on the floor in the room. Yes. When you saw NarinвҖҷs lifeless body, what was your reaction?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : A bit вҖ” I saw it. Then I was afraid. I hesitated a bit.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : What did you say to Salim at that moment? The first thing you said. From the moment you saw Narin. The first sentence you said to Salim?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You spoke, but you do not remember. You spoke, you do not remember. Was there any problem? Did you ask why this girl was on the floor?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not ask.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Well, in normal life, if such a thing happened, would you not ask?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You do not know. Was it because of the friendship between you that you did not ask?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : If Salim did it or whoever did it, if Salim brought you, did you say there must be a truth here? Did you not think anything?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : At that time I did not think anything.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You did not think anything?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not think.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Alright, you saw. On the floor. Just now when the presiding judge asked, you said he brought the blanket from outside.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : He brought it from outside, but I do not know from where he brought it.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did he call anyone?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, he did not call anyone.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : His children?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I did not see at all.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : His daughters?вҖӢ
