Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you talk with your spouse about this incident? Did you give no information after the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you take the body there alone? Well, it has been determined that one leg of the body was severed, or that it was torn by animals.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : In your first statement you said, вҖңAt first Salim told me to cut up the body.вҖқ Did you ever cut up the body?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not touch it at all.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Was the leg severed?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember вҖ” I mean the leg was not severed or anything.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You do not remember.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean the leg was not severed.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : It was not severed.вҖӢ


It was heard that the Complainant Arif GГјran spoke loudly and said certain words.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Mr.В Arif, please. Let someone take you to the restroom. Give him water. Mr.В Arif, can you hear me? Alright. Please be a bit calmer. What is this man saying to me? I understand вҖ” please, I say. Get some water and splash your face.вҖӢ



Law. Erdem Kaya вҖӢ

Law. Erdem Kaya : Do you know Ramazan Ayla?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Ramazan Ayla вҖ” Ramazan Ayla is our son-in-law.вҖӢ


Law. Erdem Kaya : Yes, he lives in Istanbul.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Ramazan Ayla вҖ” no, he lives in DiyarbakДұr.вҖӢ


Law. Erdem Kaya : Now, the day after the incident, on August 22, you called three times. On August 23, you called twice. Do you speak this frequently every day?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Truly, I mean on this matter he was calling me. Has the girl been found, I mean what happened?вҖӢ


Law. Erdem Kaya : When you called, was he in Istanbul? Or in DiyarbakДұr?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : In Istanbul. I do not remember in DiyarbakДұr. He called me вҖ” he called regarding Narin. I mean, did you find her, what happened? I mean, is there news or not? He called me on that matter.вҖӢ



Law. Asya Cemre IЕҹДұk вҖӢ

Law. Asya Cemre IЕҹДұk : In one of your earlier statements, Nevzat, you said, вҖңWhen I first saw Narin there was blood behind her ear.вҖқ Can you tell us this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It was not blood. There was a bruise or something. It was either on the left or the right. There was a bruise вҖ” there was no blood.вҖӢ


Law. Asya Cemre IЕҹДұk : Why did you say blood then?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It had turned red.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : If the DiyarbakДұr Bar Association is finished, I give the floor to the counsel for Arif GГјran.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Counsel for the complainant Arif GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Counsel for the complainant Arif GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Berat Kocakaya вҖӢ

Law. Berat Kocakaya : Did you have any business dealings with Arif GГјran?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Did you ever engage in a car trade?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not buy, that is.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Was there any talk of money between you regarding a car? Or were you offered money by someone else due to a vehicle transaction? Did you experience any problem in a business dealing?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No problem. We only had an issue with one car.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : So that means you did business before.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : At that time I did not do any.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Can you explain that vehicle? The one with the issue?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The Antakya car. I bought it. It stayed with me for 1вҖ“2 months. A problem arose with the registration. Because of the registration I took it back and said I would return the car there. They returned it to the man; there, together with Arif, they sold the car. They sold the car, but we did not know the car was in parts. The chassis number was different, the panels all different. Because of that the man bought itвҖ” a friend had bought that car. He had an accident, the man had an accident. Due to the accident the police came. After the inspection they found the car was in pieces.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Yes, there was a problem with the car. Well then, did the people you sold it to make any demand of you? From you or from Mr.В Arif?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not knowвҖ” they said they issued us an 80,000 lira fine.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : The people to whom you sold it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I paid 50,000 lira.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : You paid 50,000 lira.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I paid 50,000 lira; I was going to pay 20,000 lira more.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Yes. Because of this 50,000 lira, do you bear any grudge or hostility toward Mr.В Arif?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I only spoke with him. He said this phrase to me: he had filed a lawsuit; if he won the case, I would pay the 50,000 lira.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : That is all? You have no other business dealings? And no grudge because of this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Berat Kocakaya : Alright, thank you.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Ministry of Family and Social Services вҖӢ
text:
Ministry of Family and Social Services вҖӢ

Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun вҖӢ

Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : You say you were close friends with Salim GГјran. Did you previously know about the relationship between YГјksel GГјran and Salim GГјran?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : So you learned it that day?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean, I learned it that day. I know nothing else.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : But you were very close friends.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes, but I know nothing about him.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : Well, did Narin see this as a sexual relationship? How did Mr.В Salim describe it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know; I have no information about that.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : But he said she saw them while they were having relations, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : He himself said so, but I did not see.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : Alright, now you said the last statements taken at the prosecutorвҖҷs office are true; however, in the statement dated 09/21/2024 you said, вҖңHer feet did not fit in the sack; I could not tie the mouth of the sack.вҖқ Now you say, вҖңI tied the mouth of the sack with the strap of her bag.вҖқ Which statement is true?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : While tying the strap, one foot remained outside.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : How could it remain outside?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : After closing it, one foot remained outside. I did not put the foot into the sack. I left it like that.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : So you did not dismember the leg?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : There was no lack of limbs?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : There was a body being carried in the house, talk, threats. Yet according to HTS records Enes and the mother were at home. Did you not hear any noise, argument, conversation in the house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I heard nothing.вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : And you did not see anyone. Well then, had you told Mr.В Salim beforehand where you would place the body at EДҹertutmaz stream?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : We asked this too. Anything else?вҖӢ


Law. Elif AslДұ Еһahin Torun : Nothing further.вҖӢ



Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz вҖӢ

Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : First, I would like to state this sincerely: it may have been asked, but questions are to reach a final goal, because, sir, everyone can see itвҖ” the statements are fragmentary; they change. He constantly fails to remember where he ought to remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Please proceed quickly.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : I wish to say this, sir. I consider this very important: according to HTS base records, YГјksel GГјran is at home between 14:28 and 15:38, sir. Nevzat Bahtiyar at 15:41вҖ” Mr.В Nevzat calls Mr.В Salim at 15:08; at 15:27 he is at home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Conclusion? Direct question, Counsel.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : May I have the question?вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : The question is this, sir. Because the statements constantly change, we could not draw a conclusion from the HTS records and the statements. The Prosecutor also asked; the President of the DiyarbakДұr Bar Association also asked, but Salim GГјran is at home between 14:52 and 15:19. He goes to the barn, comes and goes constantly; he is at home until 16:10.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Counsel, a questionвҖ” not a defense.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : At 17:40 he calls him; at 17:46 he calls Salim back via WhatsApp. It has not been clearly explained, sir.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He said вҖңI do not remember; I did not call on WhatsApp.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : And, sir, finally he says вҖңI saw no one at home.вҖқ When leaving the house, he says вҖңMs.В YГјksel was crying,вҖқ sir; there is a contradiction.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now how can I ask вҖңWhat did you talk about on WhatsApp?вҖқ to a man who says, вҖңI do not remember calling on WhatsAppвҖқ?вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : But sir, the statements keep changing; we will insistently ask.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I asked 33 times; he asked 33 times as well. He says he did not call on WhatsApp. To a man who says вҖңI did not call,вҖқ I cannot say вҖңWhat did you talk about on WhatsApp?вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : He says there was only Salim GГјran at home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I askedвҖ” вҖңI do not know where YГјksel came from; I saw her up on the slope.вҖқвҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Defense Counsel for Enes GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsel for Enes GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Mahir Akbilek вҖӢ

Law. Mahir Akbilek : Nevzat Bahtiyar. Although you did not mention YГјksel GГјran in your initial knowledge-giving statements and statements given in the capacity of suspect, is the reason you later spoke of YГјksel GГјran that you remembered this very important detail on the date you mentioned it? Or is there some other matter you have not shared with the honorable court, with the Chief Public ProsecutorвҖҷs Office, and with law enforcement?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know. I have no information.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : I will narrow it and repeat. Despite not mentioning YГјksel GГјran in your earlier sequential statements, is the reason you mentioned YГјksel GГјran in your most recent statementвҖ” stating you saw her and describing that she was cryingвҖ” solely because you remembered it at that time? Is it due to that? Within this framework, is there any other matter you have not related?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, there is no other matter.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Alright. You stated that you spoke with no one regarding Narin until the date of your apprehension, including your family.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Alright. Why then, after you were apprehended, did your family members make statements to include alibi evidence concerning you? For example, your first-degree blood relatives gave statements including testimony that on the date of the incident you were doing plaster work at the villa of a person named DerviЕҹ in PirinГ§lik. Did you direct them in this regard?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : If you did not speak with your family members, why did they feel the need to protect you by creating such a chain of false evidence?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I never spoke with my familyвҖ” I did not speak with my family at all.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Very well. On 15.08 (2024) you are the one who initiated the phone call. You called.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I called.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Yes. On August 21, 2024, at exactly what time did you leave your residence? Or leave the TavЕҹantepe neighborhood? State the time, or as far as you remember.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember the time, that is.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Did you leave in the morning hours?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : In the morning, yes. I had gone to the construction site there. OurвҖ” our house construction. I had called the electrician to pull the wiring.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : To your sonвҖҷs construction?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes. I had called the electrician.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Was anyone else with you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, no one else.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : With which vehicle did you go? By what means did you go? A red vehicle with 23 plates.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The red vehicle.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Was this vehicle with you the whole day? Did it change hands? At 11, at 12, and so on.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, it never changed.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : It was with you continuously?вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : As you stated in your earlier testimony, was it parked on the side of your house facing SГјveyla Г–zkanвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Around fifteen or sixteen oвҖҷclock?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Alright. You also said, in response to the presiding judgeвҖҷs question, that after being called you climbed the slope using the path between the school and the far end of your barn.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : From there, I mean, they go back and forth like that.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You also went up from there, did you not? You said when Salim called you.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You went up on foot?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I went a bit from that side of it, that isвҖ” alright.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You make the call at 15:08. A 42-second callвҖ” it nears 15:09. There is a 3.5вҖ“4 minute discrepancy in the school cameraвҖ” it is not current. So in fact, around 15:11, Narin is climbing the slopeвҖ” she climbed or finished. How is it that you did not encounter her? You would also have to be climbing that slope around 15:10.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : IвҖ” I did not see her.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : At the okra field by ArifвҖҷs house-barn annex, in front of the balcony, between SalimвҖҷs and ArifвҖҷs housesвҖ” did you see or hear Narin and a child with Narin, or another personвҖҷs voices or movements?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Did you go straight? That is, you climbed the slope, straight ahead?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Straight.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You did not see any other person?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I saw no one else.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Yes. Then, while visits were being conductedвҖ” I mean during the time you were in prisonвҖ” especially your brothers, your brother Mehmet Bahtiyar and your brother known as Vecdi/VedatвҖ” did they convey to you only information they had learned from outside?вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : For example, did they tell you why they made false statements about you in the early stages and later changed their statements step by step toward the truth? Or did you speak in a reciprocal dialogue?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : They only came andвҖ” asked after my well-being. On this matterвҖ” I mean, we talked together about no other matter. I mean, onlyвҖ” how are you, are you wellвҖ” my familyвҖ” I especially wantedвҖ” let me see my family, let me see my family. I mean, for no other reasonвҖ” I did not come there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : One moment, let us take this part again. It was a bit fragmented. Would you repeat?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : How, Your Honor?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : That is, none of the family members had ordinary routine conversations with you, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean, they came there to visitвҖ” to visit me.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : They came to visit you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes. I mean, about any other matterвҖ” I do not knowвҖ” only that offerвҖ” only that, they saidвҖ” and nothing else, that is.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : They made a money offer?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean, nothing else, alright.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Mr.В Nevzat, why then did your spouse, Ms.В Gazal, say that you left the house by car immediately after the 15:08 call?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : She had no knowledge of it. I mean, at the back, in the backyardвҖ” she did not know I was there. I was there.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : During your law enforcement statement, did you encounter any unusual pressure or ill-treatment?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Then we may assume that your statements at that timeвҖ” and your behaviors reflected in the scene reconstruction report and its footageвҖ” were made of your free will as here.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : We will not assume; we askedвҖ” and he said yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You asked very well.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He said yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Mr.В Nevzat, how afraid are you of Salim? How much would you fear him?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I meanвҖ” because of thatвҖ” I was a bit hesitant, I was afraid. Otherwise, we have no other fear.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Why has your fear of Salim now passed? You are now able to make more detailed statements.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : After everything came to light, the fear is gone.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : You said you were under the effect of fear when giving your initial statements.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : That is correct.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Then despite your fear, why did you speak about Salim? You said Salim killed the child.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : At that moment as wellвҖ” at that moment, were you not afraid that Salim could do you harm or have harm done to you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not think of it.вҖӢ


Law. Mahir Akbilek : Your Honor, thank you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Thank you, Counsel.вҖӢ



Law. Mustafa Demir вҖӢ

Law. Mustafa Demir : Now first, in his statement he says there was no one there other than the family. Does Nevzat have any kinship with the former mukhtar?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : None at all, near or distantвҖ”any kinship on your motherвҖҷs side, any connection?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Now he says he went to the house in the incident. So should we understand it like this? Salim killed her. The body is in the house. He goes outside. Is he going out to look for you? Why did he go out? Did you talk about this on the phone?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В We did not talk at all.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Alright, you took the body. In your earlier statement you said this: At home, my mother was at home. My children were at home. My wife was at home. The place you called the barn window of your house is actually the roof. You threw the child from the roof. Naturally there should be a sound. Was there no sound? Did no one hear?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : No one hears. So there was no sound.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : I see. Alright, you took the sack. Then how did you enter from the house to the barn?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : From thereвҖ” from that place I entered. In our garden we planted eggplants and so on. From there, from there to the barn.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Is there an entrance to the barn from there? When we looked from there, we did not see any entrance door to the barn.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : From there, from above, I went down into the garden. I went to the vegetable garden. Eggplants and so on. From there I went through the door.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : From the back sideвҖ” from there, did you not enter the barn through the door?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, not through the door. I entered through the window at the back.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : You also entered through the window.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Through the window.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : There is a window there and you entered through that window?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why did you enter through the window then? Why through the window?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Through the windowвҖ” I mean I entered from there. I said if I go from the front perhaps someone will see. Because of that I went from the back and through the window there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Did Salim tell you to do this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В No, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why were you afraid someone would see you? I mean, why did you make such a plan saying someone might see?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean someone from my family might see, because my wife was at home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I asked that. Your mother was at home as well?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My mother was down below.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright. You did this so they would not see.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : How high is the window from the ground? A window you can pass through comfortably?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : I see. Alright, you called at 15:08. You talked about water, correct? You called Salim at 15:08.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : What were you doing at that time? Why did you feel the need to call? How did the water issue come up? You never explained this. Was there no water at home? So what exactly were you doing at that moment?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : At that momentвҖ” there was no other water. I told my wife our water was coming, our water is not coming. Then I called Salim. Let them come, let the crew come and check. What is the reason, that is?вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : I think I was not understood; I will ask again. Now, you went to your sonвҖҷs house in TavЕҹantepe to work. You came home for lunch. It is written like this in your statement.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes. I had come for lunch.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Did you eat?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I ate.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Did you call Salim after lunch?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : After lunch.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So did you need water to wash your hands? Why was there a need for water? I do not understandвҖ” why?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : To water the garden, the trees.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : But the hose was already attached to water the trees, right?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I had drawn that water from my motherвҖҷs.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Was there water in the house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : There was water in the house.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Then your water at home was not cut off?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was taking from my motherвҖҷs. Because there was water.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : I do not understand.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : The counsel is asking this. In the taps in the house, was water flowing? That is the question.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, it was not flowing.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Alright. So you called at 15:08. Lunch and such were over. You called. You have no water. Then did you go out immediately afterward? Or did you sit?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So did you not go out to water the garden immediately?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did go out.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Let us also clarify the garden.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I went out to water.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Let us clarify the garden, so there is no question mark. In front of your house there is a place with a mulberry tree.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : And there is also a place at the back with eggplants. Yes. Which did you water?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Uh, the mulberry tree one.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : A moment ago you said eggplants. When first asked by the panel you said the place with the eggplants.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Eggplants firstвҖ” not first. I mean from thereвҖ” I had gone into the eggplants. ThereвҖ” wateringвҖ” not watering the eggplants. When there were eggplants I had gone there. I mean I did not see my wife.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So let me ask clearly as I understand it. After you spoke at 15:08, did you go to the eggplants or to the place with the mulberries? You need to remember.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember that. I mean as far as I know, finallyвҖ” I had gone out into the courtyard.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Now since in your house we do not know the courtyard, we do not know where you wentвҖ” when you pull the hose, from where is the hose turned on? You also need to turn it on. Is the hose in the back? In the front? I mean on the side with the eggplants.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I mean the hose was on the side of the mulberry trees.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Then where was the endвҖ” the end with which you would water? I am asking this for the following reason. If you went out at 15:08 and you were at the eggplants, there is no possibility you would not see Narin.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : WellвҖ” I did not see Narin. Now if I had seen, I would say I saw.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Alright, we will not accept it. We will in any case explain this narrowed HTS shortly. According to the HTS, after you spoke at 15:08, at 15:10 it says you were in the area between ArifвҖҷs and SalimвҖҷs. By which route did you go up?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : IвҖ” from that sideвҖ” I went up. The eggplants.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So you went up the footpath? I understand. Alright, that sack, the thingвҖ” you walked with it in your hand in an open area. Where was your car parked?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My car was down below.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Where? Where in relation to your house? I mean how far from your door? Was it flush? So when you enter your barn, as we understand, from above there is a flue. There is a window. What else is there? A door?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : There is a door on the inside.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Where does it open to? Where is the place you call the courtyard? Your house? Your motherвҖҷs house? The place with the mulberry tree?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Alright, very good. Then the place with the mulberry treeвҖ” is it visible from inside your house? Can you see the place you call the courtyard from inside your house? From the window, from the door?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : We can see.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Alright. You took the body, put it into a sack. How did you go out with it? From where did you exit? I mean did you exit through the door? Did you exit through the door of the courtyard?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I exited through the courtyard door.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Then did you turn back and take the blanket?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I went out together with the blanket.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : You went out together. No one in the house saw you at that moment. Was there no sound while looking for the sack? You had thrown the child. You yourself entered through that narrow space. There was no sound at all during this? Here you say вҖңmy wife not like that,вҖқ but in her statement taken on 08/10/2024 your wife says: вҖңAfter Nevzat called, he said he would water the trees and went out. He got into the car. I also went out after him. I saw him descend to the lower road.вҖқвҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Is your wife lying?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : IвҖ” such a thingвҖ” did I not go?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You have the right not to answer this question. The spouse who is a witness may face an investigation. One does not ask вҖңIs she lying?вҖқвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, you will not answer this question. No, no, noвҖ” this would put Gazal in the status of suspect, Counsel; this cannot be.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Anyone else among EnesвҖҷs counsel who wishes to ask? Alright. I have finished with EnesвҖҷs counsel. Thank you. We may take questions from YГјkselвҖҷs counsel. Please.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Defense Counsels for YГјksel GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsels for YГјksel GГјran вҖӢ

Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu вҖӢ

Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Thanks to our colleagues and to you, virtually all possible questions were asked. We only want you to explain one point very clearly. Nevzat Bahtiyar, the patience of all Turkey has run out.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : True.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Please answer truthfully. When departing from your house, does Salim GГјranвҖҷs house come first or Arif GГјranвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not fully understand, that is.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : When you leave your house and want to go to Salim GГјranвҖҷs house, does Arif GГјranвҖҷs house come first or Salim GГјranвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Arif GГјranвҖҷs house comes first.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : According to the narrowed base report, which we will later object to, you passed Arif GГјranвҖҷs house at 15:10 and you are seen on the footpath between Salim GГјranвҖҷs and Arif GГјranвҖҷs houses. According to this record, and as determined by the school camera as well, Narin GГјran was last seen at 15:11. That is, according to this record, while Narin had not yet reached the house, you are on the footpath. Did you take Narin from that footpath and go to the barn?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You do not accept this record. Not accepting it, correct? You are asking notwithstanding that narrowed report?вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : We are asking notwithstanding acceptance.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright. Let us begin the sentence that way.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : We are only asking this. Now according to this narrowed base report, based on your movements, you should have seen Narin while she was going on that footpath. Did you not see her at all?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not see at all.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : You did not see at all. Did you love Narin?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Everyone loves Narin.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : I love her too.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My child is the same. She is the same. EveryoneвҖҷs is the same.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : So you loved Narin.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : She was an ordinary child to me. I love her.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Did Narin have a friendship with your grandchild?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : You do not know?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : When you bought things for your grandchild, would you ever buy for Narin?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : If she were there, I would buy for her too.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Did you ever give her chips or such?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I never did.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Did you ever say, вҖңNarin, here, this pocket money is yoursвҖқ?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Alright. My colleague asked a moment ago; we ask again. On the day of the incident, your wife says, вҖңI asked Nevzat to pick up cheese from my sister Zeynep while going.вҖқвҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : That is correct.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : When Nevzat left the house, I was also on the balcony.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : She may have gone out to the balconyвҖ” I mean, IвҖ”вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : She says she saw you go by car. What do you say to this?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not go. I did not go by car.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Alright. In your earlier questioning you said: вҖңWhen I went, I saw Narin lying on the floor inside the house. We wrapped her in a blanket and she was handed over to me that way. I went home,вҖқ correct? She was handed over to you inside the house.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : You say you brought her out together with Salim.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : You say you brought her out together with Salim. Then Salim came to take the blanket?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : He came down by car, correct? By car? When you left the houseвҖ” we have now clearly seen Arif GГјranвҖҷs house from mapsвҖ” when coming from the barn side it is like a platterвҖ” the village square. Correct? It can be seen from everywhere.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : That slope can be seen from everywhere in the village, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean thatвҖ” I mean, the whole villageвҖ”вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : When going to your barnвҖ” when going to the barn from Arif GГјranвҖҷs houseвҖ” would no one in the village see that place?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : But there was no one.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : They could see; there was no one. Well then, while Salim had a car, why did you feel the need to carry with a blanket? Would it not have been more practical to put it in the car?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : How do you not know? BetterвҖ” at least no one would see. What did he refer to when he said it?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He did not see SalimвҖҷs car.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Salim comes down by car for the blanket to the barn.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, noвҖ” I asked in the first statement. Did you see SalimвҖҷs car? He had not seen his car.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : No, I am asking this: If indeedвҖ” he takes the lifeless body. Instead of carrying it in his arms all the way to the barnвҖ”вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I understand what you mean.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Why did you feel the need to carry it in your arms when there was a car?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I had not seen the car.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Where exactly did Salim, by car, take the blanket from you? Exactly where.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Exactly next to the car he took it.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : Where was your car?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My car was in front of the gateвҖ” that is, on the lower side of the courtyard.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : On the lower side of the courtyard, on the school side. Yes.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The road leading to the school.вҖӢ


Law. YДұlmaz DemiroДҹlu : On the side of the road leading to the school. Alright, sir. Thank you.вҖӢ



Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ вҖӢ

Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Did you enter the house where Narin GГјran was together with Salim GГјran? Did you enter Arif GГјranвҖҷs house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes, we entered together.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Did you enter the room together? Narin GГјran was on the floor.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : She was on the floor.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : You entered the room.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember which room it was.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : What was in the room? Can you describe the room?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember much. I mean anythingвҖ” I already do not remember that matter.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : You say an empty room. LetвҖҷs describe that.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : From the entrance of the house, which direction did you turn? You do not remember at all.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : One moment, counsel. Now, you entered the house. After you entered, which direction did you head? To the left side or the right side? Did you go straight? NarinвҖҷs left side, right? Where was NarinвҖҷs body? Which room did you enter?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Honestly I do not clearly remember that. Which room it was.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now I am saying this according to what is stated in the indictment. I am expressly stating the allegation. When Salim GГјran entered the house at 15:22, between 15:22 and 15:26 it was in the empty room opposite the kitchen.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright. Amen.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Sir, we would also like to ask this. There was a vehicle transaction. You had a vehicle transaction with Arif GГјran. After a problem arose with the vehicle, it was returned and money was demanded from you. This was asked at the outset. When money was first demanded from you, did you immediately take the money and pay it? Or was some kind of вҖңassemblyвҖқ formed about this? In colloquial speech, a gatheringвҖ” who was present in that gathering?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : RГјkbettin Kaya was there, Cahit Kaya was there.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Yes. How much did they say you had to pay?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : ThereвҖ” at first he said 50,000 lira. Then вҖңYou will give 40,000 lira.вҖқ Salim said, вҖңI will give 10,000вҖ“20,000 lira.вҖқ He said, вҖңI will give 20,000 and bees.вҖқ Eighty thousand lira. Then Salim said, вҖңI am not giving.вҖқвҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : And I said, if he does not give, I mean I will giveвҖ” I will give 50.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : When Salim did not pay that, you had to pay 50.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I paid the 50.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : How did you pay the money? Where did you obtain it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The landlord first gave 40,000. I got up and sent it. I sent it to Arif. Then for the 10,000 lira I called him. He said, вҖңIвҖҷm at a condolence.вҖқ I said, вҖңSend me the account number. IвҖҷll transfer 10,000 lira to your account.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Did your brother pay the 10,000 lira? Or did you pay it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I sent my brother. Mehmet sent it.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Yes. You did not say that earlier. You said it afterward. Now, in all phases of the investigation you said you were afraid, that you were afraid of Salim GГјranвҖ” which has been asked here repeatedly.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : You said you could not make any statement regarding reaching Narin GГјranвҖҷs lifeless body. Since Salim GГјran was detained on 09/02/2024, the threat was then removed. You were under no threat.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Correct.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : For 6 days, over 3,000 personnel, helicopters, 80 drones continued the search. That is, you were in a more secure position. The threat was gone. Why did you not state the location? You still allowed the searches to continue. Or if she had not been found, would you still have stated the location?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean I did not have the opportunity. I could not find the opportunity. To remove her from there.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : YesвҖ” if you had found the opportunity on the 8th, you would have removed her. So did you remove her? Did you confess, or did law enforcement find her as a result of their investigation?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : So consequently, you are not the confessor.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I came home. I knewвҖ” I knew they would take me. I sat at home, I did not run away. I could have fled. I did not flee.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : So whenever little Narin was found, you would be taken.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I knew this.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : So despite that you did not say it. There was no threat either. Alright sir, thank you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why did you think of taking the body from there, Nevzat? You said you would hide it. I mean why did you feel the need to hide it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : UhвҖ” I thought thatвҖ” thenвҖ” I mean I thought to myself. I said why did I leave it there? I mean I would have taken her out of there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You would have taken her out, but there was no opportunity, is that it?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : There was no opportunity.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was going to leave her on a roadway. Someone would come and take her.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you thought she would be found by coincidence, but you could not do it.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I could not.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You thought of this yourself. You did not plan it with Salim or anything. Then why did you say вҖңI never thought of fleeingвҖқ? I mean why? What was the motive that drove this? Why did you enter such a thoughtвҖ” when thinking вҖңShall I flee? Shall I not flee?вҖқвҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, honestly I never thought of fleeing. I also wanted her to be foundвҖ” I already knewвҖ” why?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You knew you would be caught?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes, I knew.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you said there was no need to run?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No need to run. How would I be caught then.вҖӢ



Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr вҖӢ

Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Before I proceed to my questions, my condolences to our nation for this heinous incident. Our sole aim is for the full material truth to be revealed transparently in this trial. Everyone is here for that purpose. Now, Mr.В Nevzat, in all the statements you have given, you specifically and systematically declare that you were afraid of Salim GГјran. But Mr.В Salim was detained on 09/02/2024. You also say that after he was detained you felt genuine remorse. Why did you not go and confess during that six-day period?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I never thought of it.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Then there is not, in a real sense, anythingвҖ” I mean you have no moral unease?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I did not think of it. I onlyвҖ” I was going to leave her on a street, in a road. So they could find her.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Very well. Now, in your statements you said, вҖңI entered the house. I entered YГјksel GГјranвҖҷs house. After entering the house, I said Narin GГјranвҖҷs body, her dead body, was in a room on the left.вҖқ Now do you remember how many rooms there were on the left?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright, you entered the house. Do you remember which room on the left you entered?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright. Then, were there any furnishings in the room? Or let us assume there were no furnishings. Did any item in the room that could not be moved catch your attention? Alright then. Now, Your Honor, while reserving our objections to the cell-site records, especially the expert reportвҖ” yes, we will say itвҖ” but let us assume the cell-site records are correct. According to your statement, you took the body and put it in the car. My apologies for saying вҖңbody.вҖқ You took NarinвҖҷs lifeless body and put it in the car. You say when you looked back you saw YГјksel GГјran. But in the cell-site recordsвҖ” if they are indeed accurateвҖ” at those times and on that date, YГјksel GГјran appears to be at home. So how did the situation of seeing her on the slope occur?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I saw her there. I only saw her there. I did not see her inside the house.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : So you clearly remember seeing her on the slope. But that conflicts with the cell-site records. Very well. Now, Your Honor, this will be an external question, but one of the points that drew our attention is this: In some statements by your son Д°brahim Bahtiyar and your brother, there is an expression like вҖңStay away from the GГјrans.вҖқ But in most of your statements you say вҖңThe GГјrans are our friends, Salim GГјran is my thirty-year friend.вҖқ Did you ever make such a statement?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : You did not. Alright, my last question then. Can you tell us about the moment and manner of your arrest? How were you arrested? Where were you arrested? And describe the manner of arrest. Chronologically. Where?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : UhвҖ” I was inside the house.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Whose house were you in?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was in my sonвҖҷs house.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Your son?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : In his house, inside the room.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : About what time was it, do you remember?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : AlrightвҖ” for example, law enforcement came. Gendarmerie personnel came. Did the gendarmerie personnel knock and enter, or had you already heard some noise?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : If I described it wrong, the door was open, that is.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : It was open, the gendarmerie personnel entered directly?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Already from down below how they cameвҖ” alright. I already knew they were gendarmerie.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright, when you saw the gendarmerie personnel, how did you react? Or did you go straight before them, or did you feel the need to hide?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was sitting in the room. They took my son. He said today tooвҖ” вҖңDad,вҖқ he saidвҖ” вҖңyou come as well.вҖқ He said, вҖңWho are you?вҖқ I said, вҖңIвҖҷm Nevzat.вҖқ They took me upstairs.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright, I will have one last follow-up. Until that moment, had you considered becoming a confessor, or telling the situation you have describedвҖ” as we see it? Had you thought of telling it? Or did you decide this after seeing the gendarmerie?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : After seeing the gendarmerie.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : You decided this the moment you saw the gendarmerie?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright, thank you.вҖӢ



Law. DoДҹuЕҹ Can Kurucu вҖӢ

Law. DoДҹuЕҹ Can Kurucu : Mr.В Nevzat, I have a question for you as well. You know that Mr.В SalimвҖҷs and Mr.В ArifвҖҷs houses face each other.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Let us take the microphone, counsel. If you take the other microphone, everyone can hear. Hm.вҖӢ


Law. DoДҹuЕҹ Can Kurucu : You said that Mr.В SalimвҖҷs and Mr.В ArifвҖҷs houses face each other. This is clear in the file anyway. As can be clearly seen in the PTS record at 14:33, Mr.В Salim arrives home with the children. Given that his house faces Mr.В ArifвҖҷs, does it make sense to youвҖ” as allegedвҖ” that after having relations with YГјksel GГјran, Mr.В Salim killed Narin and handed her to you? Did you ever question this within yourself? Did you not find it odd? Does it not seem odd to you? Did you never question it? No further questions, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He said, вҖңI never questioned it; it does not seem odd.вҖқ Alright. I am saying it so that it is properly recorded in the minutes.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Nevzat Bahtiyar
section: Defense Counsel for Salim GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsel for Salim GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Onur AkdaДҹ вҖӢ

Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : When did you last see Narin alive?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So you did not see her alive on the day of the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Had you ever seen her alive before the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not knowвҖ” if I had been at home, maybe I might have seen her, I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you gather at SalimвҖҷs house because of the money matter?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : How?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you gather at SalimвҖҷs house because of the money matter?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : The meeting was held there, correct?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : When did you gather then? When did you pay the last installment over the stolen car matter? Regarding the car that was returned because of the car issueвҖ” the final owner filed a lawsuit. Money was sent because of this matter. When did you pay Arif the last 10,000 TL, that last installment?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Was it recently? Very soon after the child was killed, or months earlier?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : The money matterвҖ” when did the meeting occur?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Was it in 2024? Was it summer, winter, spring? When?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : In 2024. Was it summer? I mean I do not remember whether it was summer. Was it summer?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : During the incident, at the time of the incident, did you think at all about Arif? Did Arif ever cross your mind? вҖңI am carrying his child, I cannot bear this burden.вҖқвҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I did not think at all.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : At the time of the incident, were you angry with Arif?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В I was not angry.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : When he said he would get your money back, did you trust Arif? That you could get your money?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I trusted him. He was with his wife then.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you believed him.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : If he got it, he would give the money; if not, you had already paid your money.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : And you believed this. Very well.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So, Salim asked you for the blanket. Did you not find that odd? I mean, he gave you the child, he gave you the entire body. Did he then come after the blanket?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you ever go to, or later visit, the place where the child was foundвҖ” EДҹertutmaz stream?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I never went.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : You never went?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I never went.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Not even for a crime-scene indication?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Not at all. I mean for the crime-scene indication, with the gendarmerieвҖ” I went at the very end.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Then why, in the nights following the incident, did you not sleep in your own home but slept at your sonвҖҷs house in ГҮarДұklДұ? Were you afraid of being taken into custody?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I never slept there. I was always in the village. On the first day, the day I was caught, the roads were already closed. They told us the entrances and exits were closed. Because of that I came to the house in ГҮarДұklДұ. Otherwise I would have gone to the village. If I had gone to the village, I would have been caught there anyway.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Sir, how was your relationship with Salim before the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It was good.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Then why did Salim not call you on the phone for about two or three months?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you call him?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I may have called.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you ever go to the coffeehouse, to play okey, and so on? Did you meet in the village in the context of a closeness, a friendship?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : From time to time he would go to the coffeehouse to play okey, he would go to play okey.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : When did you last go?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : The sense here isвҖ” did you go to play okey after this incident?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : No, no. In the three months before the incident.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright, I understand thatвҖ” and did you ever meet at the coffeehouse after the incident?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So you do not think your relationship with Salim was damaged because of the money matter?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В We were talking.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : When the gathering was held, did Salim make you an offer regarding this plaster work?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The offerвҖ” I mean there was a house. Yes. His brother had a house. We did not agree. We did not agree on money between us. I did not do it.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So afterward, did Salim and his brother not give you the plaster work for the house they would have built?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The plaster, he did not give me the plaster work.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So did you not talk at all about the plaster? You set a price for the plaster. After that, after quoting a very high priceвҖ”вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I quoted 150,000 lira.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Ah, so you talked about it because of the plaster matter, right? Was this because of the car matter, then?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.В It was not about the car matter. I said, if you like, speak to Salim. If he wants, I will still do it. I said it was not a matter about the money. I used that phrase.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : On the day of the incident, when you called Salim at 15:08 about the water matter, did you ever ask where Salim was?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, I never asked.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you ask what Salim was doing?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No, no.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : In her statement, your wife Gazal Bahtiyar said Salim was eating at that time and that he would look into the water matter after eating.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Is your water line the same as your motherвҖҷs water line, or separate?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : It is the same. The same. But since theirs is lower, theirs comes, ours does not.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Is your water line the same as the villageвҖҷs water line, or separate?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : The same.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Now, that day no oneвҖҷs water was cut. Why was your water cut? Why did you call Salim for water?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Our water was not coming anyway. That is why I called. I mean, for the network personnel to come and take a look. I mean, was it clogged or what? Why is it not coming? Because of that I called him.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Now why are you afraid of Salim? Had you ever seen Salim commit any offense before? Beating someone, resisting someone, exercising dominance, or did he ever threaten you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not want to speak on that matter.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : You do not want to speak. Is your family and the family of Gazal Bahtiyar a large family? That is, is your family in ГҮarДұklДұ a large family, or a small nuclear family?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Ordinary, I mean. We are eight siblings.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : You are eight siblings. All adults, right? Yes. And where does Gazal BahtiyarвҖҷs family live? Her brothers, those who are village guards? Are they a large family?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : A large family.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : A large family. When you are in trouble, when someone threatens you, when someone wants to make you do something you do not want to do, would your brothers not come to your aid? Or would Gazal BahtiyarвҖҷs family not come to your aid?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : My brothers would come, but my brothers-in-lawвҖ” I do not think so.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : How would your brothers come?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : One of the brothers would come, the uncles would come.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Whose brothers would come?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I mean if I had aвҖ” I mean if something happened in the cityвҖ” my brothers would come.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Ah, your brothers would come, yes?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Alright. My uncle would come. I mean who else would come.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Alright. I ask again to confirm. How many years have you, as a family, been in the village?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : If not idle, 50вҖ” 56вҖ” 56.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He said since he was born.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Two hours ago it sounded as if you were living in the village like a dependent.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, no, he said since he was born.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : You were not living as a dependent, were you?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I was not living as a dependent, that is.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Let me ask something. Is the GГјran family larger, or the Kaya family?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I do not know.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Are there more members of the GГјran family or the Kaya family? Now, on the day of the incident you said you borrowed 5,000 lira from someone. From whom did you borrow that money?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : I borrowed it from my brother Mehmet. I mean that.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : You said you took it from MehmetвҖҷs wife.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : What is the name of MehmetвҖҷs wife?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : AyЕҹe Batu. I took it from her, I meanвҖ” I paid the electricianвҖҷs fee.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Why, for example, did you not borrow from someone else in the village? Did you need to borrow from AyЕҹe?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Do you have a romantic relationship with Еһeyma Kaya?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Have you ever wanted to strangle someone before? Have you ever tried to strangle someone before?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : I will raise this in my defense. I will mention it over a matter from 4вҖ“5 years ago. AgainвҖ” recall it if you wish. We will address this with our witnesses.вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Mr.В Nevzat, did any public official, the JASAT team, or your wife Gazal Bahtiyar prompt you in any way that led you to frequently change your statements?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : That is, you already said what you needed to say. You said you were afraid of Salim, that Salim killed her. Why then did you change some embellishments in your statements? Did you polish some details?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : At that time I was afraid. Mm-hm.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Could Gazal have seen you when you took the child to your barn or your house?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you tell Gazal about this before you were taken into custody?вҖӢ


Nevzat Bahtiyar : No one, no one, no.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Thank you, sir.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Thank you, counsel. Does the defense counsel for the defendant Nevzat have anything to add at this stage? There is nothing to add at this stage. You will make a detailed defense after the opinion.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Enes GГјran
text:
Reading Time
~ 1 h 42 min


Word Count
19456

title: Testimony of Enes GГјran
section: Presiding Judge вҖӢ
text:
Presiding Judge вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : Yes, Enes, you have heard the accusations. You are aware of the indictment against you. You know your legal rights. You have a lawyer, you have lawyers. Let me remind you once again of the same matter. You have the right not to answer our questions. You may say, вҖңI am exercising my right to remain silent.вҖқ You have the right to express yourself in any way you wish. The microphone is yours; IвҖҷm listening. What do you say? You speak, weвҖҷllвҖҰвҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Should I tell my entire statement?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Start from the beginning, tell whatever you wish to explain.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : I came from Arguvan, Malatya. I was an excavator operator. On the 20th of the month, I came home. I arrived home around half past one at night. My father picked me up from the bus terminal. Then my father went up to the roof to sleep. I heated up the meal my mother had prepared for me. I started eating. My mother came down from the roof. She kissed me. While she was heating the mealвҖ”sorry, while I was heating the mealвҖ”my mother came, she kissed me. She sat for a while. Then she went back up to the roof; I heated my food and ate. In the morning, I woke up around seven-thirty. When I woke up, I saw my mother inside, I saw Muhammed and Eren. I sat with them. Eren came, sat on my lap, we talked together, and later my father Arif GГјran, my brother Baran GГјran and Narin GГјran came down from the roof. After that my mother went to prepare food for us. She cooked, left the meal. Muzaffer GГјran came and joined us for lunch. After we ate and everyone got up, I heard that my father and Muzaffer GГјran would go to Batman; my father and Muzaffer GГјran left for Batman. My brother said he would take his wife shopping. At that time, it was just my mother, Muhammed, Eren and Narin at home. We were sitting, watching TV, the air conditioner was on, it was hot outside, so we didnвҖҷt go out. Then I noticed my mother leaving the house, holding a washbasinвҖ”we call it вҖңteЕҹti.вҖқ Since I came from Arguvan in Malatya, all my clothes were dirty. My mother was taking them to Hediye GГјran. I told her okay. She left. Then Muhammed, Eren, Narin and I stayed home. We sat, watched TV. As it got late, we started to call my mother so she could come prepare dinner. Then my mother came later and prepared food for us. Around 12 oвҖҷclock we sat for lunch. We ate. After the meal I sat on the couch. Narin came next to me. I was on social media; she was watching me. Then I noticed Narin looking at the clock. When I turned around, she was checking the time. She said to my mother, вҖңItвҖҷs one oвҖҷclock, mom, IвҖҷm late for the mosque, IвҖҷll go.вҖқ My mother said, вҖңItвҖҷs hot, donвҖҷt go today.вҖқ Narin said, вҖңHatice and Fatma are going, so IвҖҷll go too.вҖқ My mother said okay, then Narin got up and left. I didnвҖҷt see Narin again. Later, since I went to bed late and woke up early, I was very sleepy. After about five minutes, I lay down on the couch and slept. Around four oвҖҷclock I woke up. While sleeping, someone had called meвҖ”Еһahin from Malatya, a friend from Arguvan. He called me while I was asleep and then hung up. Around four I woke up. I saw my mother and Hediye GГјran. They were chatting. Muhammed was sleeping. I said to my aunt, вҖңWelcome, aunt.вҖқ She said, вҖңThank you. How are you? Are you well?вҖқ I said, вҖңIвҖҷm fine. How are you?вҖқ She said, вҖңIвҖҷm fine.вҖқ Then I went outside, went down toward the fountain. ThereвҖҷs a tree next to the grocery shop. I sat there. Then Tahir Kaya came over. We chatted a bit.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : While leaving the house at that time, did you have your phone with you?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes, my phone was with me.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Around 16:00, approximatelyвҖ”exact timing isnвҖҷt very important. When you went out at 16:00, your phone was with you.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : I was sitting by that tree next to the grocery. Tahir Kaya came to me, we talked. Since it was hot, I wanted to buy an energy drink. I went into the grocery, bought one. I noticed SГјleyman Kaya coming in after me. He is mentally disabled; I felt pity and said, вҖңWhat do you want? Let me get you one too.вҖқ He said okay, вҖңGet an energy drink.вҖқ I bought one for him as well. I had 200 liraвҖ”my father had given it to me that morning before going to Batman. I gave it to the shopkeeper; he gave me the change. When I left the store, I noticed Muhammed YaДҹmur. I went to him, we talked. Then Kerem GГјran and Muhammed GГјran (my brother) came. Kerem said, вҖңWelcome, uncle.вҖқ While Muhammed and I were talking, SГјleyha GГјran came. She told Kerem GГјran to help carry her hay. Kerem said, вҖңOur backs hurt, we canвҖҷt.вҖқ Then SГјleyha noticed Tahir and walked toward him. Meanwhile, Muhammed GГјran and Kerem GГјran went down to the lower part of the village, while Muhammed YaДҹmur and I continued talking. Then I saw Еһevket Susam coming out to his doorway. We chatted a bit. Later I saw Muhammed Kaya in front of Azize KayaвҖҷs house near the grocery. I went over, Еһevket and Muhammed followed me. The four of us sat and talked. Then Muhammed YaДҹmur and Еһevket said they would go home. Muhammed Kaya and I went to the fountain side, and SГјleyman Kaya, the mentally disabled one, came with us. Muhammed Kaya and I were chatting while SГјleyman listened. I saw Muhammed YaДҹmur come out of his house, getting into a car. I said, вҖңWhere are you going?вҖқ He said he was going to wash the car. I asked, вҖңCan you drop me home?вҖқ He said no. I said, вҖңThen drop me by the school, IвҖҷll walk up the hill.вҖқ When I reached the school area, I saw kids carrying hay. My step-grandmother SГјveyla GГјran asked me to help carry her hay; I couldnвҖҷt say no, so I told Muhammed to drop me near the mosque, and then I went straight up the hill home. I sat in the same room, on the same couch.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Around what time did you return home?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Around 17:30.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Then I started using my phone againвҖ”social media, YouTube. Since I had come from working away and my slippers and shoes were torn, and I knew my brother Osman was working at OngГ¶zlГј and would come early, I called him. I said, вҖңBring me a pair of slippers.вҖқ He said, вҖңOkay, brother.вҖқ Then while I was on my phone, my mother came and said, вҖңCall your father and brother; will they make it for dinner or not?вҖқ I looked at my phone and saw it was off. YГјksel GГјran is my mother. I said, вҖңMom, bring your phone, IвҖҷll call them from yours.вҖқ Since my mother cannot read or write, I dialed myself and handed her the phone. Both of them said they would be late for dinner. Then, Your Honor, my mother said, вҖңThe barn window is open; the turkeys are getting out and the dog eats them.вҖқ I said, вҖңOkay, mom.вҖқ I went up toward the barn, told her she could come with me. When I went there, I noticed Ferhat Kaya, Ufuk Kaya and Furkan Kaya on the hillside. Ferhat Kaya kept calling me insistently, вҖңCome, come.вҖқ When I went toward them, they had a red dog. It came to me. Ferhat came near me and said, вҖңCome on, I came to you, if you donвҖҷt come nowвҖҰвҖқ I said, вҖңIвҖҷm not coming, really; my mother will call me anyway.вҖқ He said okay. вҖңWe have guests,вҖқ I said, вҖңThen IвҖҷll go home.вҖқ He said okay. Ufuk Kaya came with me. Furkan Kaya didnвҖҷt. Ufuk and I went to the small hill right next to the barn and sat there. While Ufuk and I were chatting, Ufuk saw Yusuf Kaya coming from the mosque side. Ufuk stood up, waved, and called Yusuf Kaya over. Yusuf came, Your Honor, and we all sat and talked. Then I noticed my mother coming. She came and said, вҖңSon, close the window, weвҖҷll put the turkeys inside.вҖқ I said okay, mom. I went with her. The window was hard to close, so I picked up a stone and a bottle to push it shut. After closing it, we put the turkeys inside. And then againвҖҰвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In the meantime, were you smoking with your friends?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Cigarettes, the regular ones we all know, right?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In DiyarbakДұr they sometimes call marijuana вҖңcigarette.вҖқ We mean ordinary cigarettes, not marijuana, correct?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : After we put the turkeys inside, I went back to my friends. My mother came near us and saw cigarettes in their hands. She said, вҖңItвҖҷs a sin, donвҖҷt smoke, it harms you,вҖқ and left. We kept sitting and chatting. Then Furkan Kaya came to me. I said, вҖңWhy didnвҖҷt you come and greet me earlier?вҖқ He said, вҖңI had just come from work, my clothes were dirty, I smelled bad, I didnвҖҷt want to bother anyone.вҖқ I said, вҖңNo problem.вҖқ While sitting with Furkan Kaya, we were with Yusuf and Ufuk Kaya too. It was getting dark. I noticed my brother Muhammed coming home from behind the mosque. Ufuk said it was getting dark, вҖңLetвҖҷs go home, weвҖҷll go out again later.вҖқ I said, вҖңOkay, uncle.вҖқ Then, Your Honor, as we were heading home, Muhammed Kaya вҖ” sorry, GГјran, Your Honor, the surnamesвҖҰвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ThatвҖҷs all right.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : My brother Muhammed GГјran caught up with me, and we went home together. I went inside again, sat in the same room, on the couch, took my motherвҖҷs phone since mine was off and charging. I saw that my brother Osman had sent photos to her phone. I called Osman and said, вҖңBring me the first pair of slippers you mentioned,вҖқ then hung up. He said okay, brother. Then while playing with Eren, I noticed my mother laying the table and the call to prayer being recited.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In the meantime, didnвҖҷt Narin cross your mind?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Your Honor, when she said at 1 oвҖҷclock that she would go to the mosque with Hatice and Fatma, since she often played with them and sometimes stayed at their houseвҖҰвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you didnвҖҷt suspect anything unusual.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : No, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Then, Your Honor, my mother laid the table, the call to prayer ended, she was about to go to the kitchen when she turned and asked, вҖңWhere is Narin?вҖқ I said, вҖңI donвҖҷt know. The last I heard was that she was going to the mosque at 1 oвҖҷclock.вҖқ Then, Your Honor, my mother took her phone and started calling Hediye GГјran. Hediye said Narin wasnвҖҷt with them. We went up the hillвҖ”the one from where we can see MaЕҹallah GГјranвҖҷs house. We called out, вҖңIs Narin there with you?вҖқ They said no. I took my brother Muhammed and went down toward the mosque. I sent Muhammed to Azize KayaвҖҷs house. I called out softly, вҖңNarin, Narin,вҖқ thinking maybe she was playing somewhere or distracted. When Muhammed came back and said, вҖңBrother, sheвҖҷs not there either,вҖқ I raised my voice, calling вҖңNarin, NarinвҖқ louder. I went toward the fountain, the mosque, the school, but I couldnвҖҷt find her. When I came back toward the mosque again, I noticed my father Arif GГјran had arrived, and by then the villagers were all up searching. We all started looking for Narin GГјran together.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Well, during the period you described, did you ever see Salim GГјran?вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : No, Your Honor. I did not see him at all.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : I answered the phone. He said, вҖңYou went to DiyarbakДұr, you forgot us,вҖқ and so on. I said, вҖңIвҖҷm sleeping; call later.вҖқвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He hung up.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : He said okay and hung up.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now, Enes, this is your most recent account. Like Nevzat, you also have statements at different stages that contradict each other.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes, Your Honor.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : Your Honor, not because of contradiction. There were things I did not remember at the time. For example, there were things I could not say in my statement; there were things I did not remember.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : Exactly, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : I understand. Now, regarding the grocery: the grocer said the shop was not open. Our attorneys suggested he might have said that to avoid being a witness, or that he might have been at home. There is a contradiction here as well, yet you say you went to the grocery.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : I also have witnesses. Muhammed YaДҹmur and Muhammed Kaya know it too.вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : You did not. Then at 16:04вҖ”let me put it this wayвҖ”at 15:57, when you go to SalimвҖҷs house, Salim comes right after you.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : Absolutely not, Your Honor; nothing of the sort.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So nothing of the sort.вҖӢ


Enes GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : No, Your Honor.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : No, Your Honor.вҖӢ

Enes GГјran : No, Your Honor. I never even went to the barn.вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : Now, the witnessesвҖ”Furkan and UfukвҖ”say they were together at the time of the incidentвҖҰ Let me clarify this again, Enes. Enes GГјran : Of course, Your Honor. Your Honor, after we were told by the military and gendarmerie that we had lost Narin, there were Melike GГјran and Yasemin GГјranвҖ”Yasemin is my aunt. Then Melike GГјran said, вҖңI knew this would happen.вҖқ And Yasemin GГјran said to her, вҖңIf you knew, why didnвҖҷt you speak up, why didnвҖҷt you tell the truth?вҖқ Then, Your Honor, Yasemin GГјlвҖ”pardon, Your Honor, Yasemin GГјlвҖ”вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : Yes. YouвҖҷre a rational young man; I say this again. I can clearly see this from your video statements, from your communication with your family, from your behavior here in court. On the contrary, in the file I see an Enes who intervened in the womenвҖҷs fight, as if trying to conceal evidence.вҖӢ
