title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: Presiding Judge вҖӢ
text:
Presiding Judge вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : Yes, the indictment has been delivered to you. YouвҖҷve read it and are aware of the accusations against you.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You have attorneys. To remind you again, you have the right to answer or not answer the questions. You also have the right to remain silent. Will you testify in the presence of your attorney? IвҖҷm listening. Go ahead.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : As usual, I wake up early in the morning. We had hired an irrigator, on a percentage basisвҖ”eight percent.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Please speak a little louder.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : After that, every morning, we go to the field before them or together. When I go, I donвҖҷt just sit around. I work. IвҖҷve been a farmer for as long as I can rememberвҖ”everyone knows that. That day, I woke up in the morning again, and we went to the field together and worked. I went to the well between KarakoГ§ and TavЕҹantepeвҖ”thereвҖҷs one there, and another below. We sat up there, ate, drank, sat around. Around 10 or 11, I came home. I told my children, вҖңThereвҖҷs a wedding. LetвҖҷs go buy you some clothes.вҖқ Except for my son Devran, we all got in the car. We went to DiyarbakДұr BaДҹlar Family Health Center and bought clothes for them. On the way back, before reaching the police checkpoint in ГҮarДұklДұ, I stopped at the Opet station and got TRY 200 worth of fuel. Then I headed from ГҮarДұklДұ toward the village. We got home around 2:45вҖ“2:50 p.m. It was hot. They turned on the air conditioner. My wife prepared food for me. I ate, then lay down to rest for about an hour or an hour and twenty minutes. After resting, I got up, got in the car, and went back to the upper well. While I was there, two electricians came. I asked, вҖңWhatвҖҷs the matter?вҖқ They said, вҖңThereвҖҷs a malfunction in the transformer belonging to your uncle Mehmet Еһerif GГјranвҖҷs son. We came for that.вҖқ I said, вҖңYes, thatвҖҷs true, itвҖҷs been sparking lately.вҖқ They said, вҖңCome with us.вҖқ The field road was rough, and their car was oldвҖ”a blue Еһahin. They sat down and even ate some watermelon. Then we went together. At Mehmet ЕһerifвҖҷs field, the transformer wasnвҖҷt near the car; we had to walk quite a distance. I walked through the cotton plants. I know cotton; IвҖҷve been a farmer all my life. I checked and saw that worms had started appearing on the cotton. I called my cousin and said, вҖңMy cotton looks good, but unfortunately itвҖҷs infested. You should spray it.вҖқ He said, вҖңAll right, cousin.вҖқ He called again later and asked, вҖңWhat should I spray it with?вҖқ I said, вҖңBuy Krojen.вҖқ So we talked on the phoneвҖ”spray insecticide and so on. Meanwhile, Abdulsamet and the other electricianвҖ”whose name I forgotвҖ”вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ItвҖҷs in the file. I donвҖҷt recall either, but itвҖҷs not important.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Anyway, Abdulsamet climbed up the pole. The other one was collecting weeds.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Hasan. Hasan.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Hasan was collecting weeds. He was picking them. I was walking through the cotton, checking the plants. Then Abdulsamet came down and said, вҖңSalim, call your cousin. I wonвҖҷt do this repair for less than three and a half thousand.вҖқ I said, вҖңWhy should I call him? You call.вҖқ So he called. They negotiated, and the price went down from five thousand to three thousand. Then my cousin Mehmet Еһerif called me and said, вҖңHe agreed to do it for three thousand.вҖқ I said, вҖңThatвҖҷs fine, three thousand is reasonable.вҖқ He said, вҖңI need a long stick.вҖқ I said, вҖңWhere am I supposed to get you a long stick from?вҖқ He said, вҖңLetвҖҷs go to the well where weвҖҷre stayingвҖ”maybe weвҖҷll find something useful there.вҖқ So we went there together. When we arrived, they found what they needed and left. I didnвҖҷt go with them. My son Miran was there. I took my son Miran and went home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Around what time was that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : When I got home, it was around six oвҖҷclock.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So around six.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, about six oвҖҷclock.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you were in the field until then?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Of course, yes. Then my uncle HГјseyin had come from Mersin. I hadnвҖҷt seen him yet. I went home, grabbed a device we had, and put it in the car. My son Miran said, вҖңDad, IвҖҷm coming too.вҖқ I said, вҖңAll right, come along.вҖқ We went to see Uncle HГјseyin. My aunt Fatma had also come. I greeted them respectfully. While I was there, Ramazan Atasoy called me. He said, вҖңBrother, thereвҖҷs a suspicious vehicle near where you came from.вҖқ I told my uncle, вҖңThereвҖҷs such a situation.вҖқ My nephew Osman said, вҖңUncle, IвҖҷll come too.вҖқ I said, вҖңNo, donвҖҷt come.вҖқ I dropped off my son Miran. You can see my son Miran on cameraвҖ”heвҖҷs walking up the path. I drove by the school. As I was passing by the side street, I saw Nevzat Bahtiyar among the trees. I passed by without even greeting him. For the past two and a half, three months, I havenвҖҷt sat with this man, eaten with him, drunk coffee with himвҖ”nothing. He shouldnвҖҷt lie. Since the incident with Arif, neither has he called me nor have I called him. I knew he was upset with Arif because Arif refused to pay him. Arif said, вҖңYouвҖҷll pay this money like a donkey,вҖқ he said. вҖңHow can you not pay?вҖқ He insulted him harshly. I said, вҖңArif, thatвҖҷs inappropriate. Why would you say that?вҖқ Since that day, we havenвҖҷt sat together. If we were such close friends, why doesnвҖҷt he stop by and sit with me? He passes by every day, and so do I. I donвҖҷt even greet him anymore. I know he was offended by ArifвҖ”and by us too. About the construction issue: when Arif said that, I told him, вҖңNevzat, weвҖҷre going to build your house anyway. WeвҖҷll have Feyzi do the plastering. YouвҖҷre a plastererвҖ”come and do it. My father will give twenty thousand, IвҖҷll give twenty thousand, and Arif will give forty thousand. That makes eighty thousand.вҖқ He agreed, went to look at the house, then called me back and said, вҖңHe said one hundred fifty thousand to you, but told me two hundred.вҖқ He said, вҖңI wonвҖҷt do it for less than one hundred ninety.вҖқ I said, вҖңCome on, thatвҖҷs not right. You told my brother Memduh one hundred seventy-five. At least do it for one seventy-five. IвҖҷm giving you an extra twenty thousand.вҖқ He said, вҖңNo, I wonвҖҷt do it. Give it to whoever offered one seventy-five.вҖқ I said, вҖңThen IвҖҷm not giving you the twenty thousand either.вҖқ I told him that directly.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right. One momentвҖ”it says the session is closed, right? The recording will be fine, yes? Okay.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : On the day of the incident, I was in the field.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : When did you first learn that Narin was missing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : When I was with Uncle HГјseyinвҖ”around 6:30 or 6:40, IвҖҷm not sure, approximately. Ramazan called me. I went thereвҖ”the two grandsons of our former village head were there. A white Chevrolet was driving around in circles. ItвҖҷs visible on the police stationвҖҷs camera. I said, вҖңWhatвҖҷs going on?вҖқ They said, вҖңWeвҖҷre learning to drive to get our license.вҖқ Then I went there again. I took my phone and went there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, you went there. When did you find out about Narin?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : When I got there? We went thereвҖ”what time was it then? Around six something?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Around six-thirty. All right.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Between six and six-thirty, maybe seven.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Yes, around seven.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : After that, I didnвҖҷt stay put. I canвҖҷt sit still. IвҖҷve been walking around cornfields since I was a child. I climbed up a pole and took a photoвҖ”took a picture of the corn from up there. I called Mehmet Selim Atasoy. He came to me. Then we went around checking the corn again. When we came back near the cooler, I got a phone call. My daughter Gizem called me. She said, вҖңDad, Narin is missing.вҖқвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Gizem?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, my daughter Gizem.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, I just wanted to confirm.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : She said, вҖңDad, Narin is missing.вҖқ I said, вҖңHow could she be missing? Look around, IвҖҷm coming.вҖқ Mehmet Selim Atasoy said, вҖңBrother, wait, IвҖҷll come too.вҖқ He was there with his two sonsвҖ”Ramazan and the younger one, whose name I donвҖҷt recall. Mehmet Selim Atasoy took a flashlight since it was already evening. We went together to the house. I parked the car there and saw that all the villagers were gathered.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So thatвҖҷs when you found out.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs when I found out. When I got the call, I came and saw it was serious. I immediately called Sergeant Еһakir before anyone else even made a report.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : At 20:18.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes. I said, вҖңCommander, my niece is missing.вҖқвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right. Now, we learned something new here as the court panel. ThereвҖҷs a voice recording app on your phoneвҖ”why did you install it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Sometimes I go to meetings and forget the time.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : So I record the time and address to remember them.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then why did you delete it? You just said youвҖҷre forgetful, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : YouвҖҷre the village head, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : LetвҖҷs talk about this region specifically. IвҖҷve been here five years and learned how things work. In a village like yours, for soldiers, police, and the villagers, youвҖҷre the first point of contact, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then that app would have been useful after Narin went missing. Someone couldвҖҷve called and said, вҖңMr.В Headman, I found her here,вҖқ and it wouldвҖҷve been recorded. But you deleted the app on August 22nd.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt delete that app. I didnвҖҷt touch it. They told meвҖ”вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Look, others may object, but according to the data, on 08/22/2024 at 00:31вҖ”half past midnight, the night Narin went missingвҖ”you disabled the app.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You disabled it around midnight, the same night she disappeared.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt understand that app.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Look, Mr.В Salim, I told Enes heвҖҷs a smart boy. And IвҖҷll tell youвҖ”youвҖҷre a smart man. You could outsmart half the people here if you wanted.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : God forbid.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, let me explain what I mean. You installed that app yourself, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told you the name of the person who installed it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ThatвҖҷs not important. You had it installed, and you understood how to use it to record things. The app would have been most useful after the incident. So why delete it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ItвҖҷs still there. I didnвҖҷt delete it from the screen.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But according to the digital report, the app itself was disabled. Look, IвҖҷm reading your call logs right now. At 20:01, вҖңHello, where are you? IвҖҷm by the well. IвҖҷm coming now. I canвҖҷt hear you. TheyвҖҷre saying ArifвҖҷs girl or someone went missing. What happened? IвҖҷll call you back, IвҖҷm coming now.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs from the appвҖҷs log. Then you called the commander.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Right, those were around 8 p.m. that day.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : And that night, you disabled the app.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt disable it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But it was disabled. ThatвҖҷs very suspicious.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I swear, I didnвҖҷt disable that app. Whatever it shows, thatвҖҷs it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : One momentвҖ”the recording froze.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, thereвҖҷs just a system error.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Restarting the recording. Let me clarify: during SalimвҖҷs testimony, the SEGBД°S system froze, so the recording was restarted. If any technical issues arise, weвҖҷll address them using the secondary camera. All right? Geylani, take note of that. Mr.В Salim, IвҖҷll ask againвҖ”you didnвҖҷt intentionally delete or disable that app, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you donвҖҷt know how it got disabled. After the incident, about 15вҖ“20 days later, did you ever check if the app still worked?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, I didnвҖҷt know. Sometimes the storage was full, or maybe the signal didnвҖҷt connect.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right. Everyone, a bit quieter please.вҖӢ


At this point, due to overlapping voices from the presiding judge, attendees, a bar association representative, and one of the plaintiffвҖҷs lawyers, parts of the audio were unintelligible.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, letвҖҷs start again from the top. About this appвҖ”вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I want to speak.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Of course.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt understand that app. I was sitting in the courtyard of Cahit Kaya, my father-in-lawвҖҷs brother. His son, Еһeyhmuz Kaya, installed it for me. While we were having tea, I mentioned that sometimes the app didnвҖҷt record calls. He told me itвҖҷs because it doesnвҖҷt record when thereвҖҷs no signal.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But afterward, your phone clearly had signalвҖ”you were reachable. If you didnвҖҷt disable it intentionally, it shouldвҖҷve still worked.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right. So youвҖҷre saying you didnвҖҷt disable it intentionally. But the phones seized from you had deleted call logs and erased WhatsApp history. Why?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Because I had talked to prostitutesвҖ”escorts. I deleted them.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But you didnвҖҷt delete everything. The escort messages are still there.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I thought I deleted them.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Maybe you talked to more than one. I donвҖҷt know. Deleting that would be understandable. But you didnвҖҷt delete thoseвҖ”you deleted the ordinary messages. IвҖҷve seen it in the file.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Who knows that?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ItвҖҷs in the case file. You deleted messages you shouldnвҖҷt have, while the incriminating ones remain.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs all I know.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ThatвҖҷs another suspicious act. Mr.В Salim, as I said before, youвҖҷre an intelligent man. As a village head, youвҖҷre also experienced in handling investigations. Correct? In DiyarbakДұr, most investigations are conducted through the village head. This missing person case was also managed largely under your direction. IвҖҷll come back to that. NowвҖ”you deleted your WhatsApp chats.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You say you did it so the escort conversations wouldnвҖҷt be exposed.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, I deleted a lot.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But the escort conversations remain.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I thought I deleted them.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You didnвҖҷt. So, who do you think killed Narin?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt see who did it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : When asked before, you seemed to suspect your stepmother. Is that correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : For example.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : No, I mean, when you were first asked who you suspected, you said your stepmother and your step-siblings.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Let me explain, Your Honor. They brought somethingвҖ”what do they call it?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : A sorcerer?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Not a sorcerer exactly, thereвҖҷs another word for it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : A talisman maker? I donвҖҷt know what you call it hereвҖ”what?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : A вҖңblow healer.вҖқ (ГңfГјrГјkГ§Гј)вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : They brought one. They brought him. He said itвҖҷs somewhere around there, around NevzatвҖҷs house.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You didnвҖҷt go to the вҖңblow healerвҖқ yourself?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The healer cameвҖ”thatвҖҷs different. Let me explain.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Ah, so thatвҖҷs a different healer. ThereвҖҷs also one you went to.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : IвҖҷll explain that too.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Go ahead.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt take him there. The security forces took me. I can even give you their names.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Fine, yes, go ahead, give them.вҖӢ

So your current statement doesnвҖҷt match the content of the audio recording. Can you explain this?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Look, Your Honor, as I said, I took a device from home. I took it when I went to Uncle HГјseyinвҖҷs place. When the phone rang, I thought it was the TEDAЕһ (electric company) team calling. I went thereвҖ”it wasnвҖҷt them. It was the muhtarвҖҷs two grandsons. Then I went to Ramazan Atasoy. We have a device we use two or three times a week. Otherwise, the farmers canвҖҷt manage the electricity.вҖӢ


Associate Judge : So the conversation you mentioned with RamazanвҖ”was it about this device, or about the suspicious vehicle?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It was about the suspicious vehicleвҖ”he said there was a suspicious vehicle.вҖӢ


Associate Judge : All right. My second questionвҖ”according to the recordings in the file, you mention several different times for when Narin went missing: вҖңsince sixteen,вҖқ вҖңsince sixteen thirty,вҖқ вҖңsince fifteen,вҖқ вҖңsince seventeen or eighteen,вҖқ вҖңsince nineteen.вҖқ In calls starting from 20:01, the missing time changes each timeвҖ”by nearly half an hour. Why is that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Just like I said earlier, Your Honor, it was crowdedвҖ”one person said they saw her at five thirty, another said five forty, another said six. So I spoke based on that.вҖӢ


Associate Judge : Yes, the statements mention five forty. ThereвҖҷs Maide KayaвҖҷs statement, Д°sa KayaвҖҷs tooвҖ”all after five thirty. Where did вҖңfour oвҖҷclockвҖқ come from then? Who told you that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Maybe I said it, but I donвҖҷt remember. I donвҖҷt know.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : What time did Nevzat call you? At fifteenвҖ”15:08?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He called me about the water issue.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So thatвҖҷs true.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, he called about the water. He said, вҖңMy waterвҖҷs not coming.вҖқ But if one personвҖҷs water doesnвҖҷt come, usually fifteen or twenty people in the village, men and women, would all call me. Strangely, it was only him. The water comes to the whole village from one main pipe at the tower. Why is everyone elseвҖҷs water running, but not his?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why didnвҖҷt you suspect something then, but you do now?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, I meanвҖ”at the time, I didnвҖҷt think much of it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : But you suspect everything elseвҖ”you even suspected the healer.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He could check whether his water was coming or not.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Mr.В Salim, youвҖ”who suspected the healerвҖ”why didnвҖҷt you suspect Nevzat at the time and ask for him to be investigated?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He didnвҖҷt call me again after that.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : YouвҖҷre not answering my question. You, who suspected your stepmother based on something from a healer you didnвҖҷt even believe inвҖ”why didnвҖҷt you suspect Nevzat over this water issue?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt investigate that.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you didnвҖҷt suspect him. Then Vedat kept calling too, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, VedatвҖ”or VejdiвҖ”kept calling, asking, вҖңDid you find her or not?вҖқвҖӢ


Presiding Judge : And despite all this, you never suspected Nevzat?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told the security forces. I said there had been some trouble between me and Nevzat about the car.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : The only detail in the file connecting you to Nevzat is the red car. You mentioned a red car somewhere.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I never said anything about two gypsies or a red car. Did I even talk to such a person?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ItвҖҷs not about talkingвҖ”you told the gendarmerie that two gypsies passed by in a red car. The only red car we have in common is NevzatвҖҷs. You have no other claims about him.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt know that red car. I never said that.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So someone else said it.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It was something people were saying about the gypsies.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : They were saying it, I see. Any questions, Your Honor? Madam Judge? Mr.В Prosecutor, do you have any questions? Go ahead.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: Trial Prosecutor вҖӢ
text:
Trial Prosecutor вҖӢ

Trial Prosecutor : Salim GГјran, the issue of the red car that the presiding judge mentioned earlier also appears in the Kurdish-translated transcripts of your deleted recordings. Not once, not twiceвҖ”several times. You even have conversations with the officers. You talk about an old red car, correct? Do you deny having such a conversation?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely. I donвҖҷt remember talking about two gypsies or a red car.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : All right, letвҖҷs see. At 15:08, when Nevzat called you about the water issue, where were you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I was at home.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : At home. How long did you speak?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He said, вҖңThe waterвҖҷs not coming.вҖқ I said, вҖңAll right then.вҖқвҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : You mentioned fixing the issue, reaching someone about it. Did you make any official call regarding the water outage?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So you stayed home until around 16:00.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I ate something and rested for a bit.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So you didnвҖҷt call anyone to fix the water?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, no one called me, and I didnвҖҷt call anyone.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : But Nevzat called you about the water.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, he did. No one else did.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : All right. After that, did you take any action to fix the water or report it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, I didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Okay. You said someone else installed that recording app on your phone, correct? So you claim you didnвҖҷt delete it yourself.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Did the person who installed it delete it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.В I never asked anyone to do that.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : In the translated transcripts from the recordings, you mention someone named вҖңBadin,вҖқ or Bahattin.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes. HeвҖҷs a phone repairman. Yes, yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : You thanked him quite a lot for fixing a button.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : RamazanвҖҷs phone had broken. Yes, thatвҖҷs right. Badin KaratayвҖ”his shopвҖҷs in Karamuz. He said heвҖҷd repair it for TRY 900. It was at his shop.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : You said things like вҖңYouвҖҷre a lion, a hero, well done for fixing it,вҖқ didnвҖҷt you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Because they had taken it to three or four other places, and no one could fix itвҖ”but he did.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Could he have deleted the app for you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It wasnвҖҷt even my phone.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Could that Badin have helped you with that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, definitely not. It was RamazanвҖҷs phone, and maybe it still wasnвҖҷt fixed then. I donвҖҷt know.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Now IвҖҷll refer to the cell tower data. Around 22:00, on the evening Narin went missing, thereвҖҷs a signal from near Dicle University. ThereвҖҷs supposedly a tea garden there. Do you know whose that is? Does someone from the GГјran family run a tea garden there? ThereвҖҷs one, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, my uncle GГјran has one there.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : The signal came from that area. You donвҖҷt have to admit anythingвҖ”IвҖҷm just asking. Devran GГјran and Muhammed Kaya came from the Derik districtвҖ”Mardin Derik. When they arrived, their phones pinged the same tower.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs trueвҖ”they went there to hand out cards.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : The timing overlaps with yours. ThatвҖҷs my point. You claim you didnвҖҷt meet anyone, but the tower data shows otherwise.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : The next morningвҖ”Muhammed Kaya is your nephew, right? YouвҖҷre his uncle.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Did you see Muhammed Kaya that evening? They came from Derik, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, I saw Muhammed.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Then how can you deny my Dicle University point? AnywayвҖ”did you see Muhammed Kaya the night Narin went missing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It was crowdedвҖ”all my nephews were there. He was probably there too.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Do you remember? Do you recall? Hm? Do you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Most likely he was there. I donвҖҷt really knowвҖ”there were hundreds of people.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So, along with the gypsy and Syrian claims, the next morning Muhammed Kaya supposedly found a slipper near the Syrian tents.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs true.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : True.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, all right. Please, no interruptions. LetвҖҷs maintain order.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : You can respond after I finish. I just ask for courtesy.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : RightвҖ”no interruptions. Thank you, counsel. Please proceed, Mr.В Prosecutor.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : YouвҖҷre the one who mentioned the Syrians and the gypsies in your recordings. The next day, thereвҖҷs a claim that a slipper was found near the tentвҖ”but the gendarmerie didnвҖҷt find one. Muhammed Kaya kept the slipper in his car for an hour and a half, claiming the Syrians had dropped it. Did you arrange that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not. I have nothing to do with it.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : According to the tower dataвҖ”again, you donвҖҷt have to answer; IвҖҷm stating the claimвҖ”you gave off a signal at 22:44 from the site where NarinвҖҷs body was found. When the gendarmerie and AFAD arrived and things got chaotic, the claim is that you went there and, after Nevzat said вҖңI didnвҖҷt pile up brush, I just put one stone,вҖқ you added two more stones and branches on top. Is that true?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not. Look, Mr.В ProsecutorвҖ”maвҖҷamвҖ”that stream isnвҖҷt a pond. ItвҖҷs a long creek, kilometers in length. Is it a lake? A small pond? The area was searched eight times and no body was found. He hid it that well. Why would I be the one to find it?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you didnвҖҷt go to the creek at all, right? All right.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Earlier, the presiding judge mentioned the DNA in your carвҖ”which you denied. But according to the report, the DNA found in your car matches the DNA from NarinвҖҷs clothing. Do you understand the weight of that statement?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : That day, Narin didnвҖҷt ride in that car.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Do you understand what that means? ItвҖҷs not someone elseвҖҷs hairвҖ”itвҖҷs DNA taken from NarinвҖҷs clothes on the day of the incident. A biological trace, not hair.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not. That day Narin didnвҖҷt get into the car, because the car was with me.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : The prosecution isnвҖҷt claiming she rode in the car. The claim is that when foam came from her mouth, it got on your hand, and when you entered the car, you wiped it on the seat. Right, Mr.В Prosecutor? ThereвҖҷs no claim that Narin was in the carвҖ”only that traces transferred from your hand to the car seat.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThereвҖҷs no such thing.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : What I mean is, this isnвҖҷt about her randomly getting into the car that day вҖ” this DNA is a trace found on NarinвҖҷs clothes, formed on the day of the incident.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ItвҖҷs not about whether she got in the car or not.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : After I left that car there, I didnвҖҷt get into it again.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, IвҖҷm just stating the allegation.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : My brother Fuat drove the car after he came back from work. Fine. I got into my nephewsвҖҷ or my brother KurtuluЕҹвҖҷs car instead.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : When did you leave your uncle HacДұ HГјseyin, who had come from Mersin?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Around 06:35вҖ“06:40.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Around 06:35вҖ“06:40. And at what time did you supposedly take Mehmet Selim AtasoyвҖҷs daughters somewhere?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : IвҖҷm mixing up the 20th and 21st of the month.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So you actually took them a day earlier, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : But your earlier statement said otherwise.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : That was due to stress, I guess.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Mehmet Selim Atasoy called you, saying there was a suspicious vehicle. You were at your uncle HacДұ HГјseyinвҖҷs house, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Did you leave immediately?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I was sitting with my uncle.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : But you said earlier you left in a hurry.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I greeted them politely and left.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : So you left right away?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : The moment he called?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The moment he calledвҖ”within a minute or two, I left.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Mehmet Selim Atasoy called you at 18:27. You appear on the school camera at 18:57. ThatвҖҷs a 30-minute gap.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It wasnвҖҷt Mehmet Selim, it was Ramazan Atasoy who called.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : ItвҖҷs registered under Mehmet SelimвҖҷs name, ending in 1521. Right? Yes. Officially under his name, but itвҖҷs Ramazan calling. At 18:27 he calls you. You appear on camera at 18:57. From HacДұ HГјseyinвҖҷs place to there.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I left straight from my uncleвҖҷs house.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : I see, but thatвҖҷs still 30 minutes, not 2 minutes. You said you dropped Miran off right before thatвҖ”thereвҖҷs a 30-minute gap.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I left as soon as he called, thatвҖҷs all I know.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : Do you understand my question?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Miran went up the path, and I went toward the field.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : All right, but thereвҖҷs a 30-minute gap. So you didnвҖҷt leave immediately.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I really donвҖҷt know.вҖӢ


Trial Prosecutor : All right, Mr.В President, thank you.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: DiyarbakДұr Bar Association вҖӢ
text:
DiyarbakДұr Bar Association вҖӢ

Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir вҖӢ

Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Mr.В Salim, your son is Devran GГјran, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you ever tell Devran to locate all the cameras in or around the village?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told everyone вҖ” identify every camera there is.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Why did you take that upon yourself? Did you have an order from the gendarmerie?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I identified them all myself. I showed them to JASAT and intelligence. I pointed them out one by one вҖ” all the cameras, the roads. I got out of the car and checked. One of them вҖ” my brother nowвҖҰвҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you hand over the location data to the gendarmerie? Yakup TunГ§ вҖ” did he send you coordinates through Devran? Did Devran send you the camera locations?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He sent one.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you deliver it to the gendarmerie?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He sent it to the gendarmerie.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : But he sent it to you first, didnвҖҷt he?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : But he also sent it to the gendarmerie.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did he send it to you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.В I told him to send it directly to the gendarmerie.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : So you never received the file yourself.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : As far as I know, no. I told him, вҖңSend it to the gendarmerie, why are you sending it to me?вҖқвҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : All right. Another question. Based on the contents of your phoneвҖҷs data image, thereвҖҷs a conversation where you say: вҖңThey saw her last at around three, three-thirty, maybe fourteen-thirty or fifteen-thirty. Around three-thirty, four.вҖқ In that conversation, youвҖҷre giving a time frame for when Narin went missing вҖ” and that call took place at exactly 20:46. So how did you know Narin had gone missing around three-thirty or four?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt know. I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The gendarmerie arrived early. They came and asked about the cameras. I said thereвҖҷs one at the school.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : But searches began around seven oвҖҷclock.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Sabri KaГ§an came. They opened the school camera footage.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Yet in that call, you said she went missing at three-thirty or four. How did you know that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt know. I donвҖҷt remember saying that.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : According to all the reports, searches in the village didnвҖҷt start until 18:30вҖ“19:00.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Maybe it was just talk вҖ” what people were saying.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Who told you that the child went missing at three-thirty or four?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You donвҖҷt remember. Could someone have told you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Then how did you hear that the gypsies might have kidnapped her? Who told you that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I just told the presiding judge earlier вҖ” I was the last one to go there.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : All right, but in your conversations, you give very specific details about the gypsies and the slippers. Who told you that? How did you know?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : My family and the villagers went there.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Can you name anyone from the village who told you this information about the gypsies?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I personally went there вҖ” I went to where the security forces were, to the gypsiesвҖҷ area.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Let me repeat. Did one of your relatives tell you that the gypsies might have kidnapped Narin? Where did you learn that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You donвҖҷt remember. Did you give the gendarmerie any such information?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The gendarmerie went there before me.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : ThereвҖҷs no report of that in the file.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : There was a rumor about two gypsies вҖ” if I said that, I donвҖҷt know. I didnвҖҷt say anything else.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : All right. After Narin went missing вҖ” on the first day вҖ” did Nevzat ever call you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Not once? You didnвҖҷt call each other? Did you search together?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt notice him that evening, but the next day the villagers said, вҖңCome, weвҖҷre opening the doors вҖ” everyone should help. WeвҖҷre family.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you search together with Nevzat?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He joined.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : He joined.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Did you talk to him during that time?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You never spoke with Nevzat?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : We didnвҖҷt talk.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : But in his statement, he said, вҖңWe were friends for thirty years, very close.вҖқ Let me finish my question. Your wife also said, вҖңThey were like brothers.вҖқ And Arif, the victimвҖҷs father, said, вҖңThey were like brothers; they used to go to restaurants together.вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I only took him out for meat twice вҖ” we ate together those two times.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : ThatвҖҷs not what Arif said. What IвҖҷm asking is вҖ” given how close you supposedly were, didnвҖҷt it seem strange that he didnвҖҷt search with you or contact you afterward?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It was crowded that night. Maybe he joined the searches during the day. He went into houses himself.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : He never came to offer you any support or solidarity?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : So he didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : There are some WhatsApp records that were recovered вҖ” call history. TheyвҖҷre synchronized with the time of the incident, around when the act likely occurred. You had calls with Mehmet GГјran, Mehmet Еһerif GГјran, and Nevzat Bahtiyar shortly afterward.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I already mentioned Mehmet GГјran earlier. We were talking about the field. Nevzat Bahtiyar called me about the water issue.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Why did you speak with Mehmet Еһerif GГјran?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It was about the field and the school. The electricians had come вҖ” two of them.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Between 16:43 and 17:59 вҖ” a little over an hour.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs right.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Exactly five calls, totaling 353 seconds.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Correct. I said earlier вҖ” we spoke several times. He called me.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : Were you at the field during those calls? The same field you mentioned?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, during the calls with Mehmet Еһerif, I was at the field.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : You were at the field.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. AydДұn Г–zdemir : The electricians came, and you went with them.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ

Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : My colleague asked earlier. IвҖҷll ask you again in relation to the evening calls. We accept that you were home until four oвҖҷclock. Were all your children at home? What are your daughtersвҖҷ names?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Devran wasnвҖҷt home.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Devran went to the creek.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : While I was resting, Dilan went from her auntвҖҷs place to the drilling site. My daughters were at home.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So, officially recorded as Dilek, Rezan, Rojin, and Gizem вҖ” they were home. According to the indictment and cell tower data, after Ramazan left the house at 15:36, you called Dilek at 15:39 вҖ” you spoke for 16 seconds. Then at 15:45, Dilek called you вҖ” a 7-second call. You were in the same house. Why were you calling each other?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember, I donвҖҷt know. I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So you didnвҖҷt have any calls with Dilek at 15:39 or 15:45?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Are those numbers the same?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Let me tell you. Dilek вҖ” 0531 858 14 21. You called this number via WhatsApp at 15:39. Six minutes later, at 15:45, she called you back. You spoke for 7 seconds that time.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : One moment, continue. I just need to handle something. Go on, Mr.В Eren.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : IвҖҷd like you to hear this too, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then give me 30 seconds, please. Go ahead. Sorry about that.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So, did you or did you not make those two calls?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Mr.В Eren, IвҖҷve arranged for the next witnesses to be brought in вҖ” at least five or six of them.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Are we hearing witnesses today?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : By GodвҖҷs will, yes. WeвҖҷre here until morning.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Your Honor, just a second вҖ” letвҖҷs stay focused. Every time I get into the rhythm, you break my concentration. Honestly, I lose the thread.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Everyone calm down. WeвҖҷll still hear the witnesses. If anyone wants to leave, weвҖҷll excuse them after SalimвҖҷs statement. Go ahead, Mr.В Eren.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So you donвҖҷt remember calling your daughter at 15:39 and 15:45?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember, no. What would I remember?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ItвҖҷs been two months. How should I know what I talked about?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : On the day of the incident.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : But you were in the same house. Your daughters say they left around four oвҖҷclock.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : I see. So you donвҖҷt remember whether you made those calls or not?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Multiple voices from the complainantsвҖҷ attorneys were heard simultaneously, making it indistinguishable.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : One more question. You went shopping that day. Your wife вҖ” pardon, Hediye, or rather Melek вҖ” said, вҖңWe came home and had dinner.вҖқ Do you remember what you ate that day?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I usually eat breakfast-type food. They must have prepared that for me.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You ate with your daughters?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.В I think it was me and my two sons.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So Dilek and Rojin, the daughters I mentioned, didnвҖҷt eat with you. Yet your wife says you left the house, while you claim you didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I rested for a bit after eating.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You rested. Did you see your children trying on the clothes they bought from the market?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Some of them changed and showed them.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So you saw them trying clothes on. All right. My colleague asked earlier вҖ” I want to make this concrete. You said you donвҖҷt remember the calls with Dilek. At 19:22 вҖ” meaning about 15 minutes after you were seen on the schoolвҖҷs camera at 18:57 or 18:59.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Which camera?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : The one near the school. When you passed quickly by HГјseyinвҖҷs house. That footage.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThatвҖҷs just the road we always use.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Sure, IвҖҷm not disputing that. My question is this вҖ” I want to remind you, since you said you donвҖҷt remember. You said earlier that Ramazan called you about a suspicious car, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How long did it take you to get there вҖ” to the drilling site?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Three or four minutes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : After arriving there, did you speak on the phone with Mehmet Еһerif GГјran?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Maybe youвҖҷll recall if I give you the times. Again, these are WhatsApp calls вҖ” not the daytime 353-second ones my colleague asked about.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember that.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : At 19:22, you called him. At 19:34, he called you. At 19:38, you called him. At 19:40, he called you. At 19:41, you called him. And then he called you again at 20:37.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you or did you not have those WhatsApp calls?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : When I called him on WhatsApp, I also sent him the photo of the pump.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : During the day. What time did you go to the garden and take those photos?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : With the electricians?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Yes. You said you were home at four.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Around four, maybe five. IвҖҷm not exactly sure.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Four or five. Did you ever speak to Vecdin on the phone?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt call вҖ” he called me.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did he ever call you?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, he did.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : They asked you before, but IвҖҷll ask again because the calls are sequential вҖ” you call him, then he calls Nevzat, then Nevzat calls you. I mentioned earlier that there were four or five calls between you. Do you remember the content of those conversations?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Look, Arif was there. I said, вҖңVedat keeps calling me nonstop.вҖқ He asked, вҖңDid they find her?вҖқ I said, вҖңNo, not yet. Hopefully, they will.вҖқ Then Nevzat showed up. I said, вҖңLook at that bastard вҖ” so thatвҖҷs why he kept calling me.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : As the village headman, did you witness all the searches conducted by the gendarmerie?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, it was very broad in scope.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : During the first week, since searches were conducted in the upper part of the EДҹertutmaz stream, all the water from the DSД° channel was diverted there.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Correct.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : And EДҹertutmaz was supplied with water from the DSД° canal for about a week to ten days.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Correct.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Were you present during that process?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How long did it take?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I went there myself. ItвҖҷs a long distance вҖ” we cut off the water in two places.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How long did the DSД° water diversion to EДҹertutmaz last? When did the water return to its normal flow?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : After the searches ended.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How long after? According to the file, where and how was NarinвҖҷs body found?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I have no information.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You never wondered where it was?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Should I have gone there from prison?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Not to go вҖ” I mean, there are images in the file. Through your lawyers, or on TV, you could have seen them. Did you ever have that opportunity?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So you donвҖҷt know the exact location where she was found?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Even after she was found вҖ” because when you were arrested, she hadnвҖҷt been found yet вҖ” even afterward, you donвҖҷt know?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It wasnвҖҷt in a creek.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Can you picture the place where she was buried in your mind right now?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt know. I canвҖҷt picture it.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You donвҖҷt know. You canвҖҷt imagine it. Let us explain вҖ” you havenвҖҷt seen it. Her body was left in a shallow pit, just beside the soil, a few centimeters from the surface. When the water from DSД° was diverted to EДҹertutmaz, do you think that water reached over the place where her body was buried?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : It must have.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : By how many meters?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : If it was a big flow and reached the pond, then it was already under the water.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : What IвҖҷm trying to understand вҖ” since you were the village headman and part of the searches вҖ” I mean NarinвҖҷs bodyвҖҰвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt go to that stream. I didnвҖҷt take part in the search there.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : But you said the water was diverted there.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt go to that stream. I just heard they diverted the water.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You just said that searches were conducted eight times in EДҹertutmaz вҖ” you said it yourself.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said it because my lawyer told me to.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : ThatвҖҷs exactly what IвҖҷm asking about. Do you know whether the DSД° (State Hydraulic Works) canal water continued flowing into the EДҹertutmaz area or not? A clear question.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Not exactly, but it flowed there for quite a while.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Between the 27th and 31st, to prevent EДҹertutmazвҖҷs water from causing damage in ГҮarДұklДұ, excavators from the DiyarbakДұr Metropolitan Municipality were brought in to create a new flow path, working for four days to divert the water downstream completely. Were you involved in that?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Were you aware of it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Only that when we were recording with JASAT, from our village to GГ¶nenli вҖ” on our way back toward ГҮarДұklДұ вҖ” I saw the excavator working there.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So you saw the excavator working. Do you recall whether the DSД° water was still flowing into EДҹertutmaz at that time?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt remember.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You were asked this before, but IвҖҷll ask again вҖ” according to the cell tower data, arenвҖҷt you the one who drove to the place where Narin was taken and hidden by Nevzat?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not. If I had gone, then the entire village wouldвҖҷve gone.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Yet the cell tower still places you there.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt know what a cell tower is, but I didnвҖҷt go.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : WhatвҖҷs a cell tower? IвҖҷm here right now, right? My phone shows me here. It measures where I connect from. It can tell whether connections overlap between towers.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I donвҖҷt believe in cell towers.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You donвҖҷt believe in them, fine.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt go to ArifвҖҷs house. YouвҖҷre saying I did.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : IвҖҷm not saying that вҖ” the report says it. Now, letвҖҷs talk about when you first heard the news. I want the audio recording played. Dilek calls you. She says, вҖңDad, NarinвҖҰ Narin is missing.вҖқ What did you say?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : What?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : You didnвҖҷt understand at first вҖ” yes, the signal was bad, it cut off. You then told Mehmet Selim Atasoy, вҖңCome on, letвҖҷs go.вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : ItвҖҷs on the recording. Can we please play it? ItвҖҷs in the audio file. May I play it for confirmation?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Play it вҖ” or just read the transcript. ThatвҖҷs sufficient, Mr.В Eren.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : IвҖҷd prefer to play it, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Go ahead.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : The phone recorded not only the conversation but also the background sounds вҖ” people nearby, neighborhood noise.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Fine, I told you вҖ” Selim Atasoy came to the village with me. What are you after?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : IвҖҷm asking you directly вҖ” is that dialogue correct? Is that dialogue correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told you, he came with me.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you say, вҖңCome on, letвҖҷs go,вҖқ or not? ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷm asking.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He said it to me вҖ” вҖңWait, IвҖҷm coming too.вҖқ He left his two sons there and came to the village with me.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : IвҖҷm not asking about the content вҖ” just to verify the voice. LetвҖҷs play it to confirm itвҖҷs you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : If you tell us the file number, we can open it on our computer.вҖӢ


The court panel, defense attorneys, and complainantsвҖҷ lawyers attempted to locate and play the audio file. Due to overlapping sounds, this part was not transcribed.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Yes. The female voice вҖ” around eight oвҖҷclock, correct?вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Correct.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : The female caller вҖ” a small girl beside her says, вҖңGrandpa.вҖқ Then the woman says, вҖңSalim, Narin is missing.вҖқ Salim says, вҖңHow did she go missing?вҖқ The woman says, вҖңNarinвҖ”вҖқ followed by static. Salim says, вҖңHello? Hello?вҖқ Then to someone nearby вҖ” вҖңMehmet Еһirin, come with me.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷm asking about вҖ” Mehmet Еһirin.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Do you remember?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said I did.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Earlier, you said you didnвҖҷt. Shall we play the recording, Your Honor?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told you, I went to the village with Mehmet Еһirin. ThatвҖҷs when I understood Narin was missing.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : The call was cut, right? You didnвҖҷt try calling again?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I went вҖ” it took about two minutes. I was already there.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : Did you fully understand that she was missing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, we realized she was missing.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : How? What kind of disappearance made you go?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I was there within two or three minutes.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : No вҖ” I mean, how did you perceive it? What kind of disappearance did you think it was?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Answer properly, in a decent tone.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, no.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : If you donвҖҷt remember, say so.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said I remember.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : DonвҖҷt say, вҖңWhat are you after?вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : IвҖҷd like to remain silent.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Then say that вҖ” вҖңI donвҖҷt want to answer.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs fine.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : If you say you donвҖҷt wish to answer this question, weвҖҷll move on. Go ahead, Mr.В Eren.вҖӢ


Law. Nahit Eren : So is it this question you donвҖҷt want to answer, or all of them in general? If itвҖҷs just this one, fine. Do you wish to remain silent in general, or just on this topic?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Just this one.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, thatвҖҷs fine.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: Ministry of Family and Social Services вҖӢ
text:
Ministry of Family and Social Services вҖӢ

Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz вҖӢ

Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Melike GГјran gave a statement вҖ” you know her, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, sheвҖҷs my uncleвҖҷs daughter.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Right. She said вҖ” and this is her statement, not mine вҖ” that you told her to say that Narin went missing at 17:40. Is that true?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Did you tell Birsen GГјran the same thing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No, I didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Well, Birsen reportedly told her mother that you did.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Then why would they lie? Why?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Ask them why theyвҖҷre lying.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : We will. But IвҖҷm asking you now вҖ” because they said you did.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : All right. Do you know that Hediye GГјran changed her phone a few days after Narin went missing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Who changed it?вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Hediye GГјran.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I had no idea.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Okay. Now, according to Arif GГјranвҖҷs statement вҖ” and IвҖҷm quoting вҖ” he said their relations with Nevzat were good, and also good with you. He even said, вҖңWe searched together.вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told you already вҖ” I hadnвҖҷt spoken to him for two and a half months.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Salim, look at me.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : But your brother said, вҖңWe searched together вҖ” all of us.вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : After the plastering work on that house, I told him not to call me, and I didnвҖҷt call him either.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, youвҖҷve answered that. WeвҖҷve asked three times.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : Do you know Gazal Bahtiyar?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I do.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : SheвҖҷs Mr.В NevzatвҖҷs wife. She said вҖ” and again, this is from her witness statement вҖ” that you and Nevzat called each other вҖңbrother.вҖқвҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ThereвҖҷs no such thing. ThatвҖҷs a lie.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : She also said that after Narin went missing, вҖңThey excluded us.вҖқ Referring to you.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : When I gave my statement, I said we were just normal friends вҖ” like with any other villager. They exaggerate it as вҖңclose friends.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : ThatвҖҷs your version, but Ms.В GazalвҖҷs testimony says otherwise.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : She also said that after Narin disappeared, the GГјran family вҖ” mainly you вҖ” didnвҖҷt let outsiders in. For reference: Narin disappeared on the 21st, you were arrested on September 2, and she was found on September 8. Please keep those dates in mind.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So вҖ” is that true or not?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay, thatвҖҷs enough.вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : These are statements taken for information. IвҖҷm just asking if theyвҖҷre true. Why would they lie? The Chief Judge already noted there are about twelve contradictory statements in the file. You claim to remember only what benefits you, and you reject the rest вҖ” like the cell tower data.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Of course I reject it. Why should I accept something about a place I never went?вҖӢ


Law. Abdullah YДұlmaz : No need to get angry. Finally, Your Honor, IвҖҷll close with one question. The EДҹertutmaz stream вҖ” it appears three times in the file, and the Judge said eight. Did you go there with the gendarmerie for the searches вҖ” eight times?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I told you, I didnвҖҷt go there. I didnвҖҷt take part in the searches.вҖӢ



Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan вҖӢ

Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : Can you hear my voice?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Yes, we can.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : Do you ever carry a gun? Do you own one?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I have an official service weapon.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : Because Mr.В Nevzat stated in his testimony that you threatened him with a gun.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : HeвҖҷs lying. HeвҖҷs making it up. HeвҖҷs not afraid of anyone. Once, Gazal called me one evening вҖ” she said, вҖңHurry, come! HeвҖҷs killed your brother!вҖқ I went to my brotherвҖҷs house вҖ” he had entered and was hitting him on the head with a rifle butt. Hitting him! If I hadnвҖҷt arrived, my brother would have been dead.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : After you learned about the disappearance, did you go home at all?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : What?вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : After you learned she was missing.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : Did you go home or join the search?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I went home.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : You went home. You said your house and ArifвҖҷs house are across from each other. You did go home, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Еһeyhmus ErdoДҹan : So you deny changing your clothes, correct?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : He said he didnвҖҷt change.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: Defense Counsel for Enes GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsel for Enes GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Mustafa Demir вҖӢ

Law. Mustafa Demir : ThereвҖҷs a document said to be retrieved WhatsApp data, but nowhere here does it actually say itвҖҷs WhatsApp. Where did that come from? It says in the document that a program was used to recover deleted data. After running that program, some call logs appeared. They show names and call durations вҖ” incoming or outgoing. The prosecution likely checked whether he spoke with Nevzat вҖ” and yes, it says he did, at 17:46:32. But when they checked the HTS records, there was no such call. So they assumed it must have been a WhatsApp call. ThereвҖҷs no technical data confirming that. I compared these calls side by side with the HTS logs вҖ” they are identical. The only difference is a time shift of 2 hours, 38 minutes, and 27 seconds. If you add that offset to all HTS calls, they perfectly match. Same durations, same order. Even the one said to be a WhatsApp call вҖ” 444 69 96 вҖ” is actually DEPSAЕһ, the electricity company. So apparently theyвҖҷre saying he called an electricity hotline through WhatsApp. Clearly, this isnвҖҷt WhatsApp.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay, your question?вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Right. As I said earlier, much of this case has been shaped by perceptions. I have a small map here вҖ” we planned to prepare a larger one, but this will do. Here is where NarinвҖҷs body was buried. Can he show us where the cornfield is?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Of course.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : The spot where NarinвҖҷs body was found вҖ” whereвҖҷs the cornfield?вҖӢ


The map was shown to the defendant Salim GГјran, and he marked it.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : The area we shaded вҖ” is that correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : The yellow dot there вҖ” how far is it? Speak into the microphone, please. This is important because the so-called вҖңnarrowed HTS dataвҖқ indicates movement toward where NarinвҖҷs body was found. But according to Mr.В SalimвҖҷs HTS records, he was simply within the cornfield area. What is the size of this cornfield?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : About 135 dГ¶nГјms.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So within 135 dГ¶nГјms, it could be anywhere. But they interpreted that as вҖңhe went to the body.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs how they read the narrowed HTS data. There are many issues like this. Also, thereвҖҷs a key detail in another conversation вҖ” apparently with the gendarmerie. It says around 3 or 3:30. What I understand is that everyone gave different times, which caused confusion вҖ” people even claimed to see things at times they werenвҖҷt there. Someone outside the core family said they saw a red car in the village around that time. Later, at 20:29, thereвҖҷs another conversation. Do you remember such a talk?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt have such a conversation. Maybe they mentioned вҖңgypsies,вҖқ but not a red car.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Whether knowingly or not, you gave useful information. ThereвҖҷs another recorded talk at 20:39 with a gendarmerie officer. The officer says, вҖңWeвҖҷre searching everywhere.вҖқ The gendarme asks, вҖңDid you check the hill?вҖқ The reply: вҖңYes, commander, the whole village is out searching.вҖқ The officer says, вҖңThe hillвҖҷs camera?вҖқ and he replies, вҖңYes, commander, the hillвҖҷs camera shows it.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs key вҖ” youвҖҷve lived there a long time, right?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : ThereвҖҷs a military base across the village, correct?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Correct.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : How clearly does that baseвҖҷs camera see your village?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Like a mirror вҖ” perfectly clear.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Really?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes. Unless curtains block the windows in KamДұЕҹlo, you can see people clearly. How could it not see our place?вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : Did you ever request that footage?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : WeвҖҷve been asking вҖ” they wonвҖҷt look at it. I told the judge, вҖңYour Honor, I want that camera footage.вҖқ That camera would show exactly how Narin was taken.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : In your village, during weddings or when shots were fired, did that same camera record it?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, one evening shots were fired. They came from the outpost and said, вҖңIt wasnвҖҷt us вҖ” it was you.вҖқ I said, вҖңBring the footage, then.вҖқвҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : ThatвҖҷs what IвҖҷm emphasizing. There are camera recordings in the file. IвҖҷd like to show two of them вҖ” four total, actually. TheyвҖҷre already in the file, but ours are low quality due to scanning. The key point is this: in one video at timestamp 12:00, it shows a vehicle turning left from the road below the school in TavЕҹantepe neighborhood toward the DiyarbakДұrвҖ“Mardin highway. So clearly, the cameras can capture not just cars but even people moving in the village. If they can report that, then more is possible. We once thought TГңBД°TAK had those images вҖ” we hoped theyвҖҷd clarify everything. They mention 03:00вҖ“03:30 in the logs. The gendarme was informed after 20:00. That means the footage exists. We know this. If it were reviewed, and as alleged you entered the familyвҖҷs house, would that be visible?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : If instead you took another path вҖ” say, near the school, or the route Nevzat claims, to get a blanket вҖ” would that also be visible?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Of course. EverythingвҖҷs visible. There are no blind spots.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : YouвҖҷd know that better as the village headman.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I know it very well. Let them check вҖ” at the exact minute Narin walked up the path. Open that footage. Everyone will see. IвҖҷm ready.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : When were you taken into custody, Mr.В Salim?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : On the second. Then I was detained. Before that, they brought me in and out a few times.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You said you know all this very well, yet in your earlier statements you never requested those recordings.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I said theyвҖҷd check the cameras. How was I supposed to know? They checked after six, when the sun was setting, and said вҖңthe sunlight blocks the view.вҖқ But when she walked up the path, the sun wasnвҖҷt even low вҖ” it was overhead.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So you didnвҖҷt push for it because you thought the sun affected visibility?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Otherwise, I would have, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : ItвҖҷs a very clear camera вҖ” IвҖҷve seen it.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay, weвҖҷll ask about it.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : One more question вҖ” did you ever delete anything from the listening or recording app on your phone? Did you deliberately erase any recordings?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I used to delete things before too.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So, just like clearing WhatsApp chats вҖ” part of your normal habit, not after the incident?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes, I used to delete them regularly.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : All right. Your Honor, IвҖҷd like to present this last point briefly.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : WeвҖҷll take it at the end вҖ” or now, if you prefer.вҖӢ


Law. Mustafa Demir : So, about the 17:46 call вҖ” itвҖҷs actually the same as the 15:08 call. ThereвҖҷs only a shift of two hours, thirty-eight minutes, and twenty-seven seconds вҖ” even milliseconds match. Thank you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : You said earlier you didnвҖҷt go to the cornfield at night?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : I didnвҖҷt. I went in the morning.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right. Proceed.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of Salim GГјran
section: Defense Counsel for Salim GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsel for Salim GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Onur AkdaДҹ вҖӢ

Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Your Honor, Mr.В Nahit Eren persistently questioned my client about WhatsApp calls вҖ” in good faith, of course вҖ” and Mr.В Mustafa Demir just explained politely. But hereвҖҷs the crucial issue: since the prosecution couldnвҖҷt produce solid evidence against my client, they fabricated one. The document claiming to вҖңrestore WhatsApp call dataвҖқ is a forgery. The HTS log for August 21 was copied entirely, and every timestamp was shifted by about two hours and thirty-nine minutes to create a fake вҖңWhatsApp list.вҖқ For example, in HTS records, Nevzat called Salim at 15:08 вҖ” in this fake list, it appears as 17:46. ThereвҖҷs also a 444 69 96 call to DEPSAЕһ in HTS вҖ” the same number appears in the so-called deleted WhatsApp calls. Can anyone call a 444 number through WhatsApp, Your Honor?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : IвҖҷve learned many things from this case. IвҖҷll test that myself.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Please do вҖ” I already tried and couldnвҖҷt. 444 69 96 is DEPSAЕһвҖҷs number, Your Honor.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : IвҖҷll test it tomorrow.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Between 13:00 and 16:06, he spoke with his daughter Dilek. Do you know where? While shopping in DiyarbakДұr.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Are you making a defense or asking a question?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : IвҖҷm clarifying, Your Honor вҖ” so the same mistake isnвҖҷt repeated against my client.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : All right, please sit. Two or three minutes for defense.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Add two hours and nine minutes вҖ” 15:39 and 15:46. There вҖ” thatвҖҷs the tragic end of the supposed вҖңrecovered WhatsApp logs.вҖқ My clientвҖҷs statement is clear: Nevzat buried the girl, then called Salim and said heвҖҷd done so. This entire theory was planted in the prosecutorвҖҷs mind. WeвҖҷre stating this now so it wonвҖҷt be repeated later. We planned to cover it in our defense, but we were provoked. Now, IвҖҷll just ask a few brief questions. When was the last time you called Nevzat Bahtiyar?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Me?вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Yes. Approximately when? Not the day of the incident вҖ” just roughly.вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : IвҖҷve been in custody for two months. Before that, I hadnвҖҷt spoken to him for two and a half months. Definitely not.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did you ever talk with Nevzat Bahtiyar about women вҖ” flirtation, escorts, that kind of thing?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Absolutely not.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : So you didnвҖҷt have that kind of closeness with him?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : In his first statements, Nevzat mentioned only you вҖ” not YГјksel. Later, he shifted to include YГјksel. Why do you think that is?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : He follows the media.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Exactly. On September 9, during Didem ArslanвҖҷs TV program, the вҖңSalim and NevzatвҖқ accusation was first broadcast. After that, NevzatвҖҷs statements began to include YГјksel too. My client had said earlier вҖ” вҖңHe studied his lesson on TV for a week.вҖқ ThatвҖҷs what he meant. Now, why do you think Nevzat mentioned your name at all?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Why? They detained me. They said, вҖңYour car вҖ” we need you.вҖқ Then my lawyer, Seda TuДҹrul, suddenly quit вҖ” as if something was wrong. I have a daughter too. She quit and made it look suspicious вҖ” like sheвҖҷd seen something. The media attacked me вҖ” everyone did.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Did the late Narin GГјran ever play with your children in front of your house? Did she ride in your car?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : In the evenings, yes, sheвҖҷd play outside вҖ” sometimes sheвҖҷd get in the car. She was a child. That old car actually belonged to my brother Fuat GГјran. We all used it вҖ” me, Arif, and the others.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Was any of your carвҖҷs windows broken?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : Yes.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Which one?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The driverвҖҷs window вҖ” when lowered, it drops crookedly, head-first. Needs fixing. The other one doesnвҖҷt go down at all.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : The front one?вҖӢ


Salim GГјran : The rear right window вҖ” it doesnвҖҷt move at all. ItвҖҷs broken.вҖӢ


Law. Onur AkdaДҹ : Well, in Nevzat BahtiyarвҖҷs first statement, he said, вҖңWe pulled up, and I took her through the right window.вҖқ The glass report from October 9 actually confirms my clientвҖҷs version. I wanted to note that. Thank you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Thank you.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of YГјksel GГјran
text:
Reading Time
~ 1 h 23 min


Word Count

title: Testimony of YГјksel GГјran
section: Presiding Judge вҖӢ
text:
Presiding Judge вҖӢ

Presiding Judge : Yes, the indictment has arrived. I already summarized it briefly this morning. YouвҖҷre aware of the indictment. You have attorneys. You have the legal right not to answer our questions. You have the right to remain silent. As I reminded the other defendants this morning, you have legal rights. Yes, IвҖҷm listening to you. You are on trial for killing your daughter together with the other defendants. What do you say?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Yes. IвҖҷll say this in front of everyone. My Turkish is not very strong. Sometimes I mix in Kurdish. Please excuse me.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : ThatвҖҷs fine. WeвҖҷll understand each other in Turkish and Kurdish, hopefully. Go ahead.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : IвҖҷll start from the morning. On the day of the incident. I woke up at five in the morning.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : One moment вҖ” thereвҖҷs noise, friends. The sound isnвҖҷt reaching the microphone clearly. LetвҖҷs be a bit quieter. Yes, quieter now. LetвҖҷs all be quiet. Go ahead, Ms.В YГјksel.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : I woke up at 5. At five I went to pick okra in my garden. I picked the okra and came back вҖ” looked around, and saw a dead turkey in front of the house. I said, вҖңThe dog must have eaten our turkey.вҖқ I came home around six, six-thirty, woke up Osman, and sent him to work in OngГ¶zlГј. When Arif had come home late the night before, and his mother returned from the bus station, heвҖҷd said, вҖңYГјksel, wake me a little early in the morning. IвҖҷm going to Batman.вҖқ So, in the morning, I went to pick okra, sent Osman off, and went into the kitchen. I was so happy вҖ” two or three of my sons had come home from working abroad. I was cooking, frying things вҖ” I couldnвҖҷt get enough joy from it. Then my other children started coming downstairs one by one. While I was finishing breakfast, I told them, вҖңWake your father and your older brother, have them come down.вҖқ Then I saw Arif talking on the phone with Muzaffer. I donвҖҷt know who called who. He said, вҖңYГјksel,вҖқ and told me, вҖңMuzaffer will come for breakfast.вҖқ I said, вҖңOkay.вҖқ Muzaffer came. We left the table as it was. I was so happy that day. Something inside me said, вҖңI could die now. Osman is the only one missing from us. May God not accept my wish. This is our last joyful breakfast.вҖқ IвҖҷm telling this to everyone.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Why do you call it your last breakfast?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Because afterward, they poisoned our lives.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Ah, I see what you mean.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : IвҖҷm saying this before everyone. After breakfast, Muzaffer, Arif, and Baran left together. Muzaffer and Arif were going to Batman. Baran was taking his wife shopping. Then I told my son Enes, вҖңGo take a bath.вҖқ Because Enes is young, he forgets things. I saw from the statements he mentioned events out of order. After Enes came out of the bathroom, I also washed Narin and Eren. Then I called my sister. I said, вҖңMy washing machine is broken.вҖқ HediyeвҖ” no, my sister Salihe GГјran. I called her and she said, вҖңSister, I have two loads of laundry. Bring them after noon.вҖқ Then I called my sister-in-law, Hediye GГјran. She said, вҖңBring them.вҖқ I told Enes, вҖңIвҖҷll take the clothes to Hediye.вҖқ She said, вҖңOkay, bring them.вҖқ All the clothes belonged to Enes. I took them to Hediye GГјranвҖҷs house, carried them into the kitchen. She said, вҖңSit,вҖқ but I didnвҖҷt sit.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Do you remember what time this was?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Morning. IвҖҷm talking about before noon now. In the morning, Narin was still at home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay. Narin was at home.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Yes. When I came back from HediyeвҖҷs, Narin and Eren were playing on the balcony. They were very happy. I went inside because my other children were home. I did my chores. Sometimes Eren or Enes and Narin would run to me: вҖңMom, when are we going to buy clothes?вҖқ вҖңMom, will you buy me a wedding dress?вҖқ вҖңMom, buy me this.вҖқ I told my daughter, вҖңOkay, dear. I promise, IвҖҷll buy it tomorrow.вҖқ May God not forgive them вҖ” they didnвҖҷt let me buy her that dress. Then sheвҖҷd run to her brothers: вҖңBrother, why didnвҖҷt you bring me a toy?вҖқ вҖңMy boss didnвҖҷt pay me yet, but I promise, when I get money, IвҖҷll buy one for you.вҖқ I finished my chores and washed the balcony. When I looked, my older sons were happy inside. I turned off the water pump. My uncleвҖҷs daughter-in-law had come from Batman; she was staying at my sisterвҖҷs. I said, вҖңLet me go and say welcome.вҖқ I went вҖ” they were in the kitchen drinking tea and coffee. I sat with them; they brought me coffee too. I drank it, sat a while, then Ferhat Kaya came and said вҖ” I think it was Enes or Eren, I donвҖҷt remember вҖ” he said, вҖңMom, come home, weвҖҷre hungry.вҖқ I went home, because we had a wedding soon. When I got there, Muhammed had a music device and was playing songs. I took Narin and Eren by the hand, and we danced a little.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now, Ms.В YГјksel, when you went out of the house for these things, did you take your phone with you, or leave it at home?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : My phone stays at home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Always at home?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Always. When Muhammed and Narin are home, my phone is always there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Because the children play with it?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Yes. When I go out вҖ” to the yard or garden вҖ” they stay home.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : I go out.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So the children play on the phone?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Yes, thatвҖҷs why theyвҖҷre quiet. The phone was with them. Then Narin said, вҖңMom, weвҖҷre hungry. Make us fries.вҖқ Luckily, I made them. I fried potatoes and gave some to my daughter. I was preparing lunch. I saw Muhammed and Narin fighting over the phone. I took it away. When we sat down to eat, they started arguing again. I remember this clearly. They kept asking me the time вҖ” вҖңWhat time is it?вҖқ I looked at the clock; it was 1:00.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Now, Ms.В YГјksel, how many people in the house had a phone?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Everyone in the house had one.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Did Narin have a phone?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : Only Muhammed, Narin, Eren, and I shared one phone.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So Narin didnвҖҷt have her own?вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : No, she didnвҖҷt.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Okay.вҖӢ


YГјksel GГјran : When we sat down to eat, I remember it well. I looked at the clock; it was 1:00. We ate, I washed the dishes, vacuumed the rug, and sat on the couch. I saw Narin dusting the TV. She glanced at the clock. Because the night before, when we visited HГјseyin GГјran, Hatice told her, вҖңCome tomorrow вҖ” weвҖҷre going to QurвҖҷan class.вҖқ She glanced at the clock and said, вҖңMom, IвҖҷm late for QurвҖҷan class.вҖқ I said, вҖңDonвҖҷt go, itвҖҷs too hot.вҖқ I tried to stop her, but she insisted. вҖңPlease, Mom, it ends at 4:00, and then IвҖҷll go to Hatice and FatmaвҖҷs.вҖқ I said, вҖңDonвҖҷt go. Your uncle is sick.вҖқ I couldnвҖҷt convince her. She convinced me instead. She got up happily, shouted with joy, and said, вҖңClass ends at 4, then IвҖҷll play with Hatice until evening.вҖқ Normally, kids in the village go out at 5 and stay out till dark вҖ” we have to drag them home. She went to QurвҖҷan class. I even told her, вҖңDear, you shouldnвҖҷt go out with those legs.вҖқ She said, вҖңMom, IвҖҷll change my clothes.вҖқ I swear вҖ” when Narin walked out of that room, I never saw her again. Enes and I were sitting together; he was playing on the phone. Nothing seemed unusual. Enes even said, вҖңMom, if my boss doesnвҖҷt pay, how will we afford my brotherвҖҷs wedding before he goes to the army?вҖқ I said, вҖңDonвҖҷt worry, your father will handle it.вҖқ I was tired вҖ” IвҖҷd been up since five. Enes had come home at midnight. I lay down; I donвҖҷt know how long I slept. When I got up, Muhammed was asleep, Enes was asleep, and Eren was playing on the phone. I went to the kitchen, drank some water, came back, and lay down again. When I woke up again, Muhammed and Eren were awake, Enes was still asleep. They told me, вҖңMom, aunt Hediye brought our clothes.вҖқ I said, вҖңWhy didnвҖҷt you wake me?вҖқ They said, вҖңAunt Hediye didnвҖҷt let us.вҖқ I was tidying the room. I donвҖҷt remember if Muhammed went out then. Enes woke up after that. I told Hediye, вҖңThe boys told me you came while I was asleep.вҖқ She said, вҖңYes, I came, but you were sleeping. I said, вҖҳLet her rest.вҖҷвҖқ The water pump is near the headmanвҖҷs gate. I ran it, got water, and went to turn it off. Hediye came again; we sat and talked вҖ” about clothes, the wedding, BaranвҖҷs military service. Then I remembered to get EnesвҖҷs suitcase and clothes from the room. I was folding them when EnesвҖҷs phone rang вҖ” I think twice. I didnвҖҷt let it wake him. He answered and spoke to a friend. I asked, вҖңWho was it, son?вҖқ He said, вҖңMy friend.вҖқ He also asked his aunt something, and she asked him back. Then Enes went out. I donвҖҷt know how long he stayed out. Hediye and I kept talking. I didnвҖҷt check the time. I just know it was toward evening. Then Hediye said, вҖңIвҖҷll go home.вҖқ We went to the door. Then I saw Enes coming.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : So, when Hediye came, was Enes at home?вҖӢ

YГјksel GГјran : Enes came. We closed the barn window. I put the turkeys inside for two minutes. Then I went to the headmanвҖҷs house. Because MelekвҖҷs father had eye surgery. Nazan was there.
