How is your father?вҖқ They said, вҖңThank God, heвҖҷs fine.вҖқ While we were talking, I said, вҖңIвҖҷd better go вҖ” my rice will burn.вҖқ I ran home. When I got there, I saw Muhammed coming from that direction, Eren coming, Enes too. The kids said they were hungry. I said, вҖңMuhammed, weвҖҷre calling each other from the hilltop вҖ” call Narin, tell her to come home.вҖқ I ran to the kitchen. I think it was Eren вҖ” I said, вҖңSon, set the table.вҖқ As I was putting the rice on the stove, Muhammed came into the kitchen and said, вҖңMom, Narin isnвҖҷt there.вҖқ I said, вҖңWhat do you mean she isnвҖҷt there? Narin went that way.вҖқ He said, вҖңAunt Hediye said Narin is here.вҖқ Then I called Hediye. She said, вҖңYГјksel, Narin isnвҖҷt here вҖ” maybe she went to Damla or Ecrin or Yasemin or GГјl.вҖқ I went up the hill. I sent Enes and Muhammed down and said, вҖңGo to the mosque, Narin must be there, bring her back.вҖқ It never crossed our minds that Narin was missing. I called up to MaЕҹallah on the hill. MaЕҹallah said, вҖңYГјksel, Narin isnвҖҷt here.вҖқ I said, вҖңTell the girls, Narin was going to visit you.вҖқ He spoke to them, but I couldnвҖҷt hear the girlsвҖҷ voices. He said, вҖңYГјksel, I swear, Narin isnвҖҷt here.вҖқ I didnвҖҷt know she hadnвҖҷt gone there after noon. I thought she might have gone, then left. It didnвҖҷt occur to me she was missing. Either to HediyeвҖҷs or YaseminвҖҷs.вҖқ I called Hediye again, since IвҖҷd already called before. She said, вҖңYГјksel, the girls havenвҖҷt come yet.вҖқ I told Eren to get YaseminвҖҷs number вҖ” I didnвҖҷt have it. Eren and Muhammed were there, I donвҖҷt remember exactly. We called Yasemin. She said, вҖңYГјksel, Narin isnвҖҷt here.вҖқ I called my sister Saliha Kaya вҖ” I knew her number from ErenвҖҷs phone photo. Azize had told her, вҖңNarin, donвҖҷt go вҖ” weвҖҷll go together in the evening.вҖқ I ran there, knocked on AzizeвҖҷs door, asked, вҖңDid Narin come here?вҖқ She said, вҖңNo, YГјksel, she didnвҖҷt.вҖқ I got scared. I said, вҖңThe mosque is big; itвҖҷs under construction. Maybe she was playing there and got hurt.вҖқ I ran to the mosque, banged on the door with both hands: вҖңOpen the door! Narin is missing!вҖқ People gathered around. I saw Д°sa Kaya beside me. He said, вҖңYГјksel, Narin was here at six.вҖқ When he said that, I relaxed a little. I thought, вҖңShe must be with her school friends, playing with the carrots.вҖқ We all started searching вҖ” up and down, everywhere, looking for Narin. We couldnвҖҷt find her. Even Gazal, NevzoвҖҷs wife, came with me, comforting me: вҖңDonвҖҷt worry, YГјksel, nothingвҖҷs wrong. Maybe she fell asleep somewhere.вҖқ I remember it clearly.
