Law. Muhammed Fatih Demir : Then would Narin go if Nevzat Bahtiyar told her to come? Would she say, вҖңHello Uncle Nevzat,вҖқ greet him?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : Since I did not see it, I cannot say anything about that.вҖӢ


Law. Muhammed Fatih Demir : You did not see. I am not asking you for something you did not witness. But since you are in the village, you can make an inference. It is a general situation.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : LetвҖҷs not take conjecture. She said she did not see.вҖӢ


Law. Muhammed Fatih Demir : Thank you.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Thank you.вҖӢ

title: Testimony of MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran
section: Defense Counsels for YГјksel GГјran вҖӢ
text:
Defense Counsels for YГјksel GГјran вҖӢ

Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr вҖӢ

Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : How were relations between you and YГјksel GГјran?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : Very good. Good with all of them.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Before and after the day of the incident, did you ever notice any unusual act or behavior by YГјksel GГјran?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : When she called me, she called me in her normal manner. She called me as she does every day.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright. Now, there is a report drawn up by the gendarmerie personnel dated 09/08/2024. In that report there is an interpretationвҖ” this is our view as the defense. The interpretation of an interpretation has been carried into the indictment. I will ask only this: At the time the argument took place, was YГјksel GГјran there? Or during that argument did YГјksel GГјran have, say, a nervous breakdown? Could you tell us this incident in full detail?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : YГјksel GГјran fainted. She fainted before that argument took place. We took her into the ambulance. We took her into the ambulance. I returned to my place. Then this argument happened.вҖӢ


Law. Furkan ГҮakДұr : Alright. Thank you.вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : YГјksel was not there.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright. Thank you very much.вҖӢ



Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ вҖӢ

Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : Now, it may merely be hearsay, but I am asking to clarify. It is said that there was a problem arising from vehicle trade between Arif and Nevzat Bahtiyar. It is said the congregation imposed a penalty on Nevzat BahtiyarвҖ” that a payment was imposed on him. And after he paid, there was unrest within the household. Later, from your house, Gazal BahtiyarвҖ”that is, Nevzat BahtiyarвҖ”вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Let him finish his question.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : While she was at your place, it is said she made a statement like, вҖңI do not give my blessing. We paid this money. We were put in a difficult position. We do not give our blessing.вҖқ It may be just such a saying, but it is said this incident took place in your house. Did such an incident occur?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : Absolutely not. Absolutely not in my house. Not in my house.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : In your house, did Gazal Bahtiyar ever make such a statement of the kind, вҖңBecause we paid this money, we do not give our blessingвҖқвҖ” something like a protest?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : I do not remember that. I was not at home. I was not at home for a month and a half.вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : After little Narin disappeared, among the women who came to visit you, did Gazal Bahtiyar ever say something like, вҖңWe are leaving here anyway. We will move our home. We will go to another province. We will go to IstanbulвҖқ?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : When she disappeared?вҖӢ


Law. Tuncay ErkuЕҹ : In the dates after the disappearanceвҖ” it could be a few days later, a week later.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : In other words, did Gazal say such a thing?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : No.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Alright. Thank you. Thank you.вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : In fact, I want to say this.вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : Of course.вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : There was no fire. I mean, it had not broken out. The day before that we were at YГјkselвҖҷs. We sat and talked. I had a dream. ГҮilyeвҖ” that is, TavЕҹantepeвҖ” was burning. She even cried. I also asked for a cigarette. I gave her a cigarette. Then the next day the village burned. Could such a thing be?вҖӢ


Presiding Judge : It can. Why not? There is a realm of dreams. I mean, I believe in dreams. Not вҖңthe presiding judge believed in dreams,вҖқ but I do believe. DonвҖҷt you?вҖӢ


MaЕҹЕҹallah GГјran : I do.вҖӢ
